Genesis24:7 Yehova Morimo oa legorimo, eo o ’nntsitseñ kua tluñ ea ga rre, le kua hatsiñ ya litsala tsa me, eo o la a bua le ’na, eo o la a inkanela, a re, Lehatsi ye ki tla le naea losika loa gago; ena o tla romela moengela oa gague ha pele ga gago, gore u tsele moroake mosari gona." 
Genesis24:8 Mi ha mosari a gana go gu sala morago yalo u tla bo u ikholotse mo ikanoñ e ea me: gosi, u si ise moroake gona." 
Genesis24:9 Mi motlanka a baea atla sa gague tlatse ga serope sa ga Aberahame muñuague, mi a mo ikanela kaga seo se." 
Genesis24:10 ¶ Mi motlañka a cula likamela li ten tsa likamela tsa ga muñoague, mi a eta, (gone lithoto cotle tsa ga muñoague li mo atleñ sa gague:) mi a nanoga a etela Mesopotamia, go motseñ oa ga Nahore." 
Genesis24:11 Mi a khubamisa likamela tsa gague kua eintle ga motse, ha seribeñ sa metse, ka matsiboea, motla o basari ba coelañ go ga metse." 
Genesis24:12 Mi a re, Yehova Morimo oa ga Aberahame muñoake, kia gu rapela, ’nnaea letlogonolo ka yenu, mi u rihele Aberahame muñoake pelunomi." 
Genesis24:13 Bona, ki eme ha mocoeriñ oa metse, mi bomoroaria banona ba motse ba coela go ga metse:" 
Genesis24:14 A go rihale gore moroetsana eo ki tla mo raeañ, A ko u sekege eñkho ea gago gore ki noe, mi ena a re, Noa, mi ki tla nosa le cona likamela tsa gago: a e ne ena eo u mo laoletseñ Yitsake motlañka oa gago; mi gore ki itse ka mouo ha u shuperitse muñoake pelunomi." 
Genesis24:15 ¶ Mi ga rihala, ka a e si a khutle go bua, bonañ, Rebeke a tla, eo o la a tsecoe ki Betuele, moroa Meleke, mosari ca ga Nahore, monna Aberahame, mi a na le eñkho ea gague ha ruriñ ya gague." 
Genesis24:16 Mi moroetsana a bo a le mointle bogolu mo sehatlogoñ, e le kharebe, mi a e si a itsioe ki monona: mi a hologela mocoeriñ, mi a tlatsa eñkho ea gague, mi a tlatloga." 
Genesis24:17 Mi motlañka a tabogela go mo khatlantsa, mi a re, A ko u ’me ki noe metsenyana eñkhoñ ea gago." 
Genesis24:18 Mi a re, Noa, muñoaka; mi a akoha a rolela eñkho ea gague mo atleñ sa gague, mi a mo naea a noa." 
Genesis24:19 Mi eare a sina uetsa go mo naea go noa, a re, Ki tla gela le cona likamela tsa gago e tsamaee li khutle go noa." 
Genesis24:20 Mi a akoha, a thela eñkho ea gague mo mogopoñ o o noelañ, mi gape a tabogela seribeñ go ga, mi a gela likamela tsa gague cotle." 
Genesis24:21 Mi monona a mo gakhamalela, mi a ririmala a elatloko ha Yehova a tsegaharitse eto loa gague, khotsa nya." 
Genesis24:22 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka likamela li sina khutla go noa, monona a tsaea manyena a gouda a sehatlogo, a bokete yoa aona bole bole eintla eñue ea shekela, le mehitsana ea mabogo e le tu, e bokete yoa eona bole bole lishekela li ten tsa gouda;" 
Genesis24:23 Me a re, A ko u ’mpulelele: u moroaria mañ? a bonno bo gona mo tluñ ea ga rago kua re ka lalañ gona?" 
Genesis24:24 Mi a mo raea, Ki moroaria Betuele moroa Meleke, eo o la a mo tsala le Nahore." 
Genesis24:25 Gape a hela a mo raea, Re na le motlaka le liyo li li lintsi, le bonno go lala gona." 
Genesis24:26 Mi monona a oba tlogo ea gague, mi a obamela Yehova;" 
Genesis24:27 Mi a re, Go bakoe Yehova Morimo oa ga Aberahame muñoake, eo o sa kañ a tlosa bopelunomi yoa gague le boamarure yoa gague go muñoake: kaga me, Yehova o ’nkhogile mo tseleñ go ea kua tluñ ea bomoroa‐rague muñoake." 
Genesis24:28 Mi moroetsana a taboga, mi a bulelela ba eintlu ea ga mague lilo tse." 
Genesis24:29 ¶ Mi Rebeke a bo a na le khantsarie eo leina ya gague e leñ Labane: mi Labane a tabogela kua mononeñ kua eintle, kua mocoerin." 
Genesis24:30 Mi ga rihala ka a sina bona manyena a sehatlogo le mehitsana ea mabogo mo atleñ tsa ga khantsarie; mi ka a sina utlua mahuku a ga Rebeke khantsarie, a re, Monona a ’mpuisa yalo, a tla go monona eo; mi bonañ a bo a eme le likamela ha mocoeriñ." 
Genesis24:31 Mi a re, Tsena mo teñ, motsegaharioi oa ga Yehova; u emetseñ kua eintle, gone ki bakantse eintlu, le bonno yoa likamela." 
Genesis24:32 Mi a lere monona mo tluñ; mi a belesholola likamela tsa gague, a naea likamela motlaka le liyo, le metse go tlacoa noa tsa gague, le linao tsa banona ba ba nañ nae." 
Genesis24:33 Mi ga beoa go ya ha pele ga gague; mi ena a re, Ga ’nkitla ki ya, go tlo go tsamaee ki bulele loeto loa me. Mi a re, Bua." 
Genesis24:34 ¶ Mi a re, Ki motlañka oa ga Aberahame;" 
Genesis24:35 Mi Yehove o tsegaharitse muñoake segolu; ea tsamaea a na mogolu; mi o mo neile liñku, le matlape, le selevera, le gouda, le batlañka, le malata, le likamela, le liesela." 
Genesis24:36 Mi Sarahe mosari oa ga muñoake o la a tsala le muñoake mosimane ka a sina cohala, mi o mo neile cotle tse o nañ naco." 
Genesis24:37 Mi muñoake o la a inkanisa, a re, U si tsele moroake mosari oa bomoroaria Bakanana, ba hatsi ya bona ki nntseñ go yeona;" 
Genesis24:38 Mi u ee kua tluñ ea ga rre, le kua sikeñ loa me, m u tsele moroake mosari." 
Genesis24:39 Mi ka raea muñoake, Etlare khotsa mosari a si ke a ’ntsale morago." 
Genesis24:40 Mi a ’nthaea, Yehova eo ki sepetseñ ha pele ga gague, o tla romela moengeli oa gague nau, mi o tla tsegahatsa eto loa gago: mi u tla tsela moroake mosari kua sikeñ loa me, le mo tluñ ea ga rre:" 
Genesis24:41 Ereha gona u tla bo u ikholotse mo ikanoñ ea me, mogañ u tlañ mo sikeñ loa me, mi etlare ha ba sa gu nele ope, u tla bo u ikholotse mo ikanoñ e ea me." 
Genesis24:42 Mi ki le ka tla ka yenu ha mocoeriñ, mi ka re, Yehova Morimo oa ga Aberahame muñoake, ha yana u tsegahatsa tsela ea me e ki tlañ ka eona;" 
Genesis24:43 Bona, ki eme ha mocoeriñ oa metse: a go rihale, go re, moroetsana eo o tla tlañ go ga, eo ki tla mo raeañ, A ko u ’nnee ki noe metsenyana mo eñkhoñ ea gago;" 
Genesis24:44 Mi ena a ’nthaea, Noa, mi ki tla gela le likamela tsa gago: a eouo e ne ena mosari eo Yehova o mo laoletseñ moroa muñoake." 
Genesis24:45 Mi eare ki e si ki khutle go bua mo peluñ ea me, bonañ, ga tla Rebeke, mi a bo a na le eñkho ea gague mo ruriñ ya gague; mi a hologela mo mocoeriñ, mi a ga: mi ka mo raea, A ku u ’nnee ki noe." 
Genesis24:46 Mi a akoha a rola eñkho ea gague mi a re, Noa, mi ki tla nosa le likamela tsa gago: mi ka noa, mi a nosa le cona likamela." 
Genesis24:47 Mi ka motsa ka re, U moroaria mañ? Mi a re, Moroaria Betuele, moroa Nahore, eo Meleke o mo tsetseñ nae. Mi ka baea manyena mo hatlogoñ sa gague, le mehitsana mo atleñ tsa gague." 
Genesis24:48 Mi ka ikoba tlogo ka obamela Yehova, mi ka baka Yehova Morimo oa ga Aberahame muñoake eo o la a ’nkhogela mo tseleñ e e siameñ, go tsela moroa muñoake moroaria monna muñoake." 
Genesis24:49 Mi yana ha lo tla rihela muñoake ka pelunomi le boikanyo, ’mpulelelañ: mi ha go sa na yalo, le gona ’mpulelelañ; gore ki ee mo atleñ se se siameñ, khotsa go sa molema." 
Genesis24:50 ¶ Ereha gona Labane le Betuele ba arabañ, mi ba re, Seo se se rule go Yehova: ga re kake ra bua boshula khotsa molemo go uena:" 
Genesis24:51 Bona, Rebeke o ha pele ga gago, mo tsee, mi u tsamaee, mi a a ne mosari oa ga moroa muñoago, yaka Yehova a buile." 
Genesis24:52 Mi ga rihala ka motlañka oa ga Aberahame a utlua mahuku a bona, a ikobela hatsi ha pele ga Yehova." 
Genesis24:53 Mi motlañka a entsa mekhabo ea selevera le mekhabo ea gouda, le liaparo, mi a li naea Rebeke: mi a naea khantsarie le mague lilo tse ri rategañ." 
Genesis24:54 Ereha gona ba yañ ba noa, ena, le banona ba ba nañ nae, mi ba lala; mi ba coga ka mosho, mi a re, ’Mphañ tsela, ki ee go muñoake." 
Genesis24:55 Mi khantsaria Rebeke le mague ba re, A moroetsana a tlole le rona malatsi mañue, leha a le ten; morago ga mouo o tla tsamaea." 
Genesis24:56 Mi ena a ba raea, Si ’nkhaneleñ, ecoa Yehova a tsegaharitse tsela ea me; mphañ tsela, gore ki ee go muñoake." 
Genesis24:57 Mi ba re, A re bitseñ moroetsana, mi re botse molomo oa gague." 
Genesis24:58 Mi ba bitsa Rebeke, mi ba mo raea, A u tla tsamaea le monona eo? Mi a araba, Ki tla tsamaea." 
Genesis24:59 Mi ba bolotsa Rebeke khantsaria bona, le moamusi oa gague, le motlanka oa ga Aberahame, le banona ba gague," 
Genesis24:60 Mi ba tsegahatsa Rebeke, mi ba mo raea, U ne ma bothousanda yoa bomilion, mi a losika loa gago lo rue khoro ea ba ba lo ilañ." 
Genesis24:61 Mi Rebeke a nanoga, le baroetsana ba gague, mi ba palama likamela ba sala monona morago: mi motlanka eo a tsaea Rebeke, mi a tsamaea." 
Genesis24:62 ¶ Mi Yitsake a tla a coa tseleñ ea seriba sa Laha‐roi; gone a la nntse mo hatsiñ ya Souta. 
Genesis24:63 Mi Yitsake a bo a ile go akanya kua nageñ ka matsiboea: mi a culetsa maitlo a gague, mi a bona, mi bonañ, likamela tsa bo li tla." 
Genesis24:64 Mi Rebeke le ena a culetsa maitlo a gague, mi eare a bona Yitsake a pagologa kamela." 
Genesis24:65 Gone a la a raea motlañka, Monona eo o tlañ go re khatlantsa mo nageñ e mañ? Mi motlanka o la a re, Ki muñoake: ki gona a tsaea setsiro, mi a itsira." 
Genesis24:66 Mi motlañka a kakanyetsa Yitsake cotle tse o li rihileñ. 
Genesis24:67 Mi Yitsake a isa Rebeke mo tenteñ ea ga Sarahe mague, mi a tsaea Rebeke, mi a na mosari oa gague; mi a mo rata. Mi Yitsake a gomorioa morago ga loshu loa ga mague." 
Genesis25:1 MI Aberahame a hela a tsaea mosari, mi leina ya gague e le le Keture." 
Genesis25:2 Mi a tsala nae Simerane, le Yokeshane, le Medane, le Midiane, le Ishebake, le Shuahe." 
Genesis25:3 Mi Yokeshane a tsala Shebe, le Dedane. Mi bomoroa Dedane e le le Baashura, le Baletusha, le Baleuma." 
Genesis25:4 Mi bomoroa Midiane e le le Efe, le Efere, le Hanoke, le Abide, le Eledahe. Botle ba, e le le bana ba ga Keture." 
Genesis25:5 ¶ Mi Aberahame a naea Yitsake cotle tse o la na naco. 
Genesis25:6 Mi bomoroa bagariñuana ba ga Aberahame, ba o la na nabo, Aberahame a ba naea lineo, a ba tlosa go Yitsake moroaue, ka a sa tserile, a ba isa kua Iseta, kua hatsiñ ya Iseta." 
Genesis25:7 ¶ Mi a, ki aona malatsi a nyaga tsa tselo yoa ga Aberahame, a o la a a tsela, linyaga li hundereda le sevente‐faeve." 
Genesis25:8 Mi Aberahame a gonoga, mi a shua ka cohalo e kholu, mocohe, a tletse linyaga, mi a phutheloa bathuñ ba gague." 
Genesis25:9 Mi Yitsake le Ishemaele bomoroaue ba mo hitla mo moñoboñ oa Makepela mo leoteñ ya ga Eferone moroa Tsohare oa Mohita, o o lebaganyeñ le Mamera;" 
Genesis25:10 Leota ye Aberahame o la a le reka go bomoroa Hete: Aberahame a hitloa gona le Sarahe mosari oa gague. 
Genesis25:11 Mi morago ga loshu loa ga Aberahame, Morimo oa tsegahatsa Yitsake moroaue; mi Yitsake a nna kua Bere‐lahai‐roi." 
Genesis25:12 ¶ Mi yana, tse ki litsika tsa ga Ishemaele, moroa Aberahame, eo Hagare oa Moegepeto, lelata ya ga Sarahe o la mo tsala le Aberahame:" 
Genesis25:13 Mi maina ua ki a bomoroa Ishemaele, kaha tsika tsa bona li birioañ ka gona: oa burure oa ga Ishemaele e le le Nabayote; le Kedare, le Adebele, le Mibesame," 
Genesis25:14 Le Misheme, le Dume, le Mase;" 
Genesis25:15 Hadare, le Teme, le Yeture, le Nafishe, le Kedeme:" 
Genesis25:16 Bana bauo, ki ba ga Ishemaele, mi maina a bona e le le ua, kaha metsaneñ ea bona, le liturio tsa bona; likhosana li tueleve kaha meraheñ ea bona." 
Genesis25:17 Mi nyaga tse ki tsa botselo yoa ga Ishemaele, li uan hundereda le ter-te‐seven: mi a gonoga, mi a shua, a phutheloa bathuñ ba gague." 
Genesis25:18 Mi ba nna go simolola ka Havila go ea Shura, eo o ha pele ga Egepeto, ka u ea Asiria: mi a shuela ha pele ga bomoroa rague botle." 
Genesis25:19 Mi tsika tse ki tsa ga Yitsake, moroa Aberahame: Aberahame a tsala Yitsake." 
Genesis25:20 ¶ Mi Yitsake o la a le nyaga li forte, ka a itsela Rebeke mosari, moroaria Betuele Mosiria, oa Padan‐arama, khantsaria Labane, oa Mosiria." 
Genesis25:21 ¶ Mi Yitsake a rapelela mosari oa gague Yehova thata, ka gone a le moöpa: mi Yehova a rapeloa ki ena, mi Rebeke mosari oa gague a ithuala." 
Genesis25:22 Mi bana ba khoromana teñ ga gague; mi a re, Ana gontse yañ? kintse yañ yalo? mi a ea go botsa Yehova." 
Genesis25:23 Mi Yehova a mo raea, Merahe e tu e mo sepopeloñ sa gago; caba li tu li tla coa teñ ga gago; eñue e tla na thata bogolu go e eñue; mi eo mogolu o tla rihela eo motlana." 
Genesis25:24 Mi erile malatsi a gague a go khubama a tlile, bonañ mahatla a le mo sepopeloñ sa gague." 
Genesis25:25 Mi oa eintla a coa a hubitse gotle yaka seaparo sa boboea; mi ba mo sha leina ya Esaue. 
Genesis25:26 Mi morago ga mouo ga coa monnaue, mi atla sa gague se cuere serethe sa ga Esaue; mi leina ya gague ya birioa Yakobe: mi Yitsake a bo a le nyaga li sekesete ka Rebeke a ba bona." 
Genesis25:27 ¶ Mi basimane ba tutuga: mi Esaue a na mocomi eo o tlalehileñ, monona oa naga: mi Yakobe e le le monona oa bori, a nna mo litenteñ." 
Genesis25:28 Mi Yitsake a rata Esaue, gone a ya nama ea pholoholo ea gague: mi Rebeke a rata Yakobe." 
Genesis25:29 ¶ Mi Yakobe a apaea kapeo: mi Esaue a coa mo nageñ a lapile. 
Genesis25:30 Mi Esaue a raea Yakobe, A ko u ’mme ki ye ga bohibiru; bohibiru yo, gone ki lapile: ki gona leina ya gague le biricoeñ Edome." 
Genesis25:31 Mi Yakobe, a re, ’Mpaparisa tsalo yoa eintla yoa gaga ka yenu." 
Genesis25:32 Mi Esaue a re, Bona, Kia shua, mi tsalo yoa eintla yo, bo tla ’ntemo-haletsañ?" 
Genesis25:33 Mi Yakobe a re, inkanele ka yenu; mi a mo ikanela: mi a bapatsa go Yakobe tsalo yoa eintla yoa gague." 
Genesis25:34 Ereha gona Yakobe o naeañ Esaue señkhue le kapeo ea linaua; mi a ya a noa; mi a nanoga a tsamaea: Esaue a nyatsa yalo tsalo yoa eintla yoa gague. 
Genesis26:1 MI gabo gole loshekere mo hatsiñ, morago ga loshekere lo lo le mo metleñ ea ga Aberahame. Mi Yitsake a ea go Abemeleke, khosi ea Bafileseta, kua Gerara." 
Genesis26:2 Mi Yehova a iponatsa go ena, a mo raea, U si ee Egepeto: u nne mo hatsiñ ye ki tla le gu bulelelañ:" 
Genesis26:3 Tlolatlola ma hatsiñ yenu, mi ki tla na nau, mi ki tla gu tsegahatsa; gone ki tla gu naea, le losika loa gago, mahatsi aotle ua: mi ki tla tlomamisa ikano e ki e ikanetseñ Aberahame rago." 
Genesis26:4 Mi ki tla intsihatsa losika loa gago yaka naleri tsa legorimo, mi ki tla naea losika loa gago mahatsi aotle ua mi merahe eotle ea lehatsi e tla tsegaharioa ka losika loa gago:" 
Genesis26:5 Ka gone Aberahame o aketse koru ea me, a tsegetsa molomo oa me, le taolo tsa me, le litaeo tsa me, le melao ea me." 
Genesis26:6 ¶ Mi yalo Yitsake a nna mo Gerara. 
Genesis26:7 Mi banona ba helo hoñ ba motsa kaga mosari oa gague; mi a re, Khantsariake; ka a boiha go re, Mosari oa me; gone ekare khotsa, go bua ena, banona ba helo ha, ba mpolaee kaga Rebeke; gone o la le moiñtle go leyoa." 
Genesis26:8 Mi ga rihala a sina na gona motla o molele, Abemeleke khosi ea Bafiliseta a leba ka seboni, mi a bona, mi bonañ Yitsake a tsameka le Rebeke mosari oa gague." 
Genesis26:9 Mi Abemeleke a bitsa Yitsake, mi a re, Bona, mosari oa gago rure: mi u lu u buelañ, u re, Khantsariu? Mi Yitsake a mo raea, Gone ka re, Ekare khotsa ’nka mo shuela." 
Genesis26:10 Mi Abemeleke a re, Se se eñ se u se re rihelañ? moñue oa bathu ba o kabo a letse hela le mosari oa gago, mi u kabo u re lereritse molatu." 
Genesis26:11 Mi Abemeleke a laola bathu ba gague botle, a re, Eo o amañ monona eo, leha e le mosari oa gague, o tla bolaeloa rure." 
Genesis26:12 Mi Yitsake a yala mo hatsiñ yeuo, a bona ga hundereda mo ñuageñ ouo; mi Yehova a mo tsegahatsa." 
Genesis26:13 Mi monona eo, a na mogolu, mi a totahala segolu, ga tsamaea a na mogolu bogolu." 
Genesis26:14 Gone a na le lithuo tsa macomane, le lithuo tsa matlape, le boutsi yoa batlañka: mi Bafileseta ba mo golegela." 
Genesis26:15 Mi liriba cotle tse batlañka ba ga rague ba le ba li epa mo metleñ ea ga Aberahame rague, Bafileseta ba li tsiba; ba li katela ka ombu." 
Genesis26:16 Mi Abemeleke a raea Yitsake, Huruga go rona, gone u totahetse segolu bogolu go rona." 
Genesis26:17 Mi Yitsake a huruga gona, mi a itlaolela mo mogorogoroñ oa Gerara, a nna gona." 
Genesis26:18 ¶ Mi Yitsake a ba a epa liriba tsa metse, tse ba le ba li epa mo metleñ ea ga Aberahame rague; gone Bafileseta ba le ba li katela morago ga loshu loa ga Aberahame; mi a bitsa maina a cona kaha maineñ ua rague o la li bitsa ka aona." 
Genesis26:19 Mi batlañka ba ga Yitsake ba epa mo mogorogoroñ, mi ba bona mocoeri oa metse a a elañ." 
Genesis26:20 Mi barisi ba Gerara ba ganela le barisi ba ga Yitsake, ba re, Metse ua ki a rona: mi a bitsa leina ya seriba se, Etseka; gone ba le ba mo patika." 
Genesis26:21 Mi ba epa seriba se señue, mi le shona ba se ganela; mi a bitsa leina ya shona, Sitena." 
Genesis26:22 Mi a coa gona, a epa seriba se señue; mi ga ba ka ba se ganela: mi a bitsa leina ya shona, Rehobota, mi a re, Gone yana Yehova o re rihetse bonno, mi re tla ata mo hatsiñ." 
Genesis26:23 Mi a tloga gona a ea Bere‐sheba. 
Genesis26:24 Mi Yehova a iponatsa go ena mo sigoñ, mi a re, Ki Morimo oa ga Aberahame rago: u si boihe, gone ki na nau, mi ki tla gu tsegahatsa, ki intsihatsa losika loa gago ka eintla ea ga Aberahame motlañka oa me." 
Genesis26:25 Mi a aga aletara gona, a bitsa leina ya ga Yehova, mi a tloma tenta ea gague gona: mi batlañka ba ga Yitsake ba epa seriba gona." 
Genesis26:26 ¶ Mi Abemeleke a ea go ena a coa Gerara, le Ahusete tsala ea gague, le Pikole eo mogolu oa entua ea gague nae." 
Genesis26:27 Mi Yitsake a ba raea, Lo tletseñ go ’na, ecoa lo ’nkila, lo ’ntsitse go lona?" 
Genesis26:28 Mi ba re, Re bonye rure ha Yehova a na nau: mi ra re, A ikano e ne gare ga rona, eboñ gare ga rona le uena, mi a re riheñ kholagano nau:" 
Genesis26:29 Gore u si re rihele boshula, yaka re si ka ra gu ama, mi yaka re si ka ra gu rihela sepe ha e si molemo, ra gu lesa ua ea ka kagisho: yana u tsegaharicoe ki Yehova." 
Genesis26:30 Mi a ba rihela moletlo, mi ba ya ba noa." 
Genesis26:31 Mi ba phakela, ba ikanalana: mi Yitsake a ba lesa, mi ba mo tlogela ka kagisho." 
Genesis26:32 Mi ga rihala tsatsiñ yeuo, batlañka ba ga Yitsake ba tla ba mulelela kaga seriba se ba le ba se epa, mi ba re, Re bonye metse." 
Genesis26:33 Mi a se bitsa Sheba: ki gona leina ya motse ouo ki Bere‐sheba le ka yenu. 
Genesis26:34 ¶ Mi Esaue a bona cohalo ea nyaga li forte ka a itsela mosari, eboñ Yudite moroaria Beëre, Mohita, le Basheme moroaria Elone Mohita," 
Genesis26:35 Ba ba leñ bogalaka yoa moea oa ga Yitsake le Rebeke. 
Genesis27:1 MI ga rihala, ka Yitsake a cohetse, mi maitlo a gague a hihala ga tsamaea a paleloa ki go bona, a bitsa Esaue moroaue oa borure, a mo raea, Moroaka: mi a mo raea, Ki hanu." 
Genesis27:2 Mi a re, Bona yana, ki cohetse, ga ki itse letsatsi ya loshu loa me:" 
Genesis27:3 Ki gona yana, a ko u tsee libolao tsa gago eboñ tlobolo ea gago, le bora yoa gago, mi u ee nageñ, mi u ’ncomele pholoholo;" 
Genesis27:4 Mi u ’ntihele liyo tse ri lokiloeñ yaka tse ki li ratañ, mi u li lere go ’na, gore ki ye; gore moea oa me o gu tsegahatse ki e si ki shue." 
Genesis27:5 ¶ Mi Rebeke a utlua ka Yitsake a bua le Esaue moroane. Mi Esaue a coela kua nageñ go coma pholoholo, go e lere." 
Genesis27:6 ¶ Mi Rebeke a bua le Yakobe moroaue, a re, Bona, ki le ka utlua rago a bua le Esaue mogoluü, a re," 
Genesis27:7 ’Nteretse pholoholo, mi ’ntihela liyo tse ri lokiloeñ gore ki ye, ki gu tsegahatse ha pele ga Yehova, pele ga loshu loa me." 
Genesis27:8 Ki gona yana, moroaka, utlua koru ea me mo go se ke se gu laolelañ." 
Genesis27:9 Ea yana mo lecomaneñ, mi u ’nteretse lipotsane li tu tse ri molemo; mi ki tla rihela rago liyo tse ri lokiloeñ ka cona, yaka tse o li ratañ." 
Genesis27:10 Mi u li isetse go rago, gore a ye, a gu tsegahatse, pele ga loshu loa gague." 
Genesis27:11 Mi Yakobe a raea Rebeke mague, Bona, Esaue ’nkholule ki monona eo o boboea, mi ki monona eo o borethe." 
Genesis27:12 Kampo rre o tla ’nkapa‐apa mi ki tla ’na yaka motsietsi mo maitloñ a gague: mi ki tla iteretse thogo, esiñ tsegahaco." 
Genesis27:13 Mi mague a mo raea, Moroaka, a thogo e ne go ’na; akela koru ea me gosi, mi u ee, u li ’nteretse." 
Genesis27:14 Mi a ea a li tsaea, a li lere go mague, mi mague a riha liyo tse ri lokiloeñ ka cona, yaka tse rague o li ratañ." 
Genesis27:15 Mi Rebeke a tsaea aparo tse ri eletsegañ tsa ga Esaue moroaue eo mogolu, tse li li na nae mo tluñ, mi a li apesa Yakobe moroaue eo motlana." 
Genesis27:16 Mi a apesa atla tsa gague, le borethe yoa thamo ea gague ka matlalo a lipotsane." 
Genesis27:17 Mi liyo tse ri lokiloeñ tseuo, le señkhue se o la a se itletsa, a li tsenya atleñ sa ga Yakobe moroaue." 
Genesis27:18 ¶ Mi a tla go rague, mi a re, Rra; mi a re, Ki hanu; u ohe, moroaka?" 
Genesis27:19 Mi Yakobe a raea rague, Ki Esaue, oa burure oa gago; ki rihile yaka u lu ua bua le ’na: A ko u nanoge, u lule, u ye ga pholoholo ea me, gore moea oa gago o ’ntsegahatse." 
Genesis27:20 Mi Yitsake a raea moroaue, Moroaka, gontse yañ ka u e bonye ka kakoho yalo? Mi a re, Gone Yehova Morimo oa gago o e ’ntereritse." 
Genesis27:21 Mi Yitsake a raea Yakobe, Moroaka, a ko u atamele, gore ki gu apa‐ape, ha u le Esaue moroake rure, khotsa nya." 
Genesis27:22 Mi Yakobe a atamela Yitsake rague, eo o mo apa‐apañ, a re, Koru ki koru ea ga Yakobe, mi liatla ki liatla tsa ga Esaue." 
Genesis27:23 Mi a si ka a mo itse, gone atla tsa gague li li boboea, yaka atla tsa ga Esaue mogoluüe: mi a mo tsegahatsa." 
Genesis27:24 Mi a re, A u Esaue moroake rure? Mi a re, Ki ena." 
Genesis27:25 Mi a re, E ’nkatametse, mi ki tla ya ga pholoholo ea ga moroake, gore moea oa me o gu tsegahatse. Mi a e mo atametsa, mi a ya: mi a mo leretse boyaloa yoa movine, mi a noa." 
Genesis27:26 Mi rague, Yitsake, a mo raea, Moroaka, ’nkatamele yana, mi u ’nkatle." 
Genesis27:27 Mi a atamela, a mo atla: mi a rupa loñko loa aparo tsa gague, a mo tsegahatsa, a re, Bona, loñko loa ga moroake lo cuana le loñko loa naga e Yehova o e tsegaharitseñ:" 
Genesis27:28 Ki gona, a Morimo o gu nee ga monyo oa legorimo, le ga monono oa lehatsi, le letlotlo ya mabele le boyaloa." 
Genesis27:29 A licaba li gu rihele, a merahe e ikobele go uena; u ne morena oa bomoroa rago: mi a bomoroa mago ba ikobele go uena: a go rogoe ena eo o gu rogañ; mi a go tsegaharioe ena eo o gu tsegahatsañ." 
Genesis27:30 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka Yitsake a sina khutla go tsegahatsa Yakobe, mi Yakobe ka a sa coa ha pele ga rague, Esaue mogoluüe a coa kua comoñ ea gague." 
Genesis27:31 Le ena a riha liyo tse ri lokiloeñ, a li leretse rague, mi a raea rague, A rre a nanoge, a ye pholoholo ea ga moroaue, gore moea oa gago o ’ntsegahatse." 
Genesis27:32 Mi Yitsake rague a mo raea, U mañ? Mi a re, Ki ’na Esaue moroau, oa burure oa gago." 
Genesis27:33 Mi Yitsake a roroma segolu ka thoromo e kholu, a re, Mañ eo o co-mileñ ploloholo, a e ’nteretse? mi ki yele ga cotle pele u e si u tle, ki mo tsegaharitse: mi o tla tsegaharioa." 
Genesis27:34 Mi erile Esaue a utlua mahuku a ga rague, a goa ka khöo e kholu le e e galakañ, mi a raea rague, Rra, le na, ’ntsegahatsa, E, le ’na." 
Genesis27:35 Mi a re, Monnau o tlile ka tsieco, me o tlositse tsegahaco ea gago." 
Genesis27:36 Mi Esaue a re, A ga a birioa Yakobe ka go siameñ? gone o ’ntsieritse ga tu: o la a tsaea tsalo yoa eintla yoa me; mi bona, yana o ’ntsetse tsegahaco. Mi a re, A ga ua ka ua ’ntsiela tsegahaco?" 
Genesis27:37 Mi Yitsake a araba a raea Esaue, Bona, ki mo rihile morena oa gago, mi bana ba ga rague, botle ki ba mo neile batlañka; mi ki mo otlile ka mabele le boyaloa; mi yana, moroaka, ki tla gu rihelañ?" 
Genesis27:38 Mi Esaue a raea rague, Rra, a u na le letsego ye yeosi? Rra, ’ntsegahatsa, E, le ’na. Mi Esaue a culetsa koru ea gague, mi a lela." 
Genesis27:39 Mi Yitsake rague, a araba, a mo raea, Bona, boago yoa gago bo tla na monono oa lehatsi, le yoa monyo oa legorimo o o coañ gorimo." 
Genesis27:40 Mi u tla tsela ka caka ea gago, mi u tla rihela monnau; mi go tla rihala mogañ u busañ, u tla roba iokue ea gague mo thamoñ ea gago." 
Genesis27:41 ¶ Mi Esaue a ila Yakobe ka eintla ea letsego ye rague o la a mo tsegahatsa ka yeona: mi Esaue a ithaea mo peluñ ea gague, motla oa go lelela rre o gauhe; ereha gona ki tla bolaeañ Yakobe ’nnake." 
Genesis27:42 Mi mahuku ua, a ga Esaue moroaue eo mogolu, a buleleloa Rebeke: mi a roma a bitsa Yakobe moroaue eo motlana, mi a mo raea, Bona, Esaue a ikhomotsa kaga gago, ha a tla gu bolaea." 
Genesis27:43 Ki gona yana, moroaka, retsa koru ea me; nanoga, u tsabele go Labane khantsariake, kua Harana;" 
Genesis27:44 Mi u tlole nae malatsi mañue go tsamaea bocarara yoa ga mogoluü bo hete; 
Genesis27:45 Go tsamaea bogale yoa ga mogoluü bo boee go uena, mi a lebala se u se mo rihetseñ: mi ki tla roma, ki gu entsa gona: Ke tla bo ke latlegeloa ke lona lo ba tu ka tsatsi le le leñue, go reñ?" 
Genesis27:46 Mi Rebeke a raea Yitsake, Ki tenoe ki go tsela, ka eintla ea bomoroaria Hete: etlare ha Yakobe a itsela mosari eo o cuanañ le bomoroaria lehatsi yenu, botselo yoa me bo tla nañ go ’na?" 
Genesis28:1 MI Yitsake a bitsa Yakobe, a mo tsegahatsa, mi a mo laola, a mo raea, U si tsee mosari oa bomoroaria Kanana." 
Genesis28:2 Nanoga, u ee Padan‐arama, kua tluñ ea ga Betuele ra mago; mi u tsee mosari gona oa bomoroaria Labane, khantsaria mago." 
Genesis28:3 Mi Morimo Mothatietle a o gu tsegahatse, mi a o gu atise, le go gu intsihatsa, gore u ne bontsi yoa bathu:" 
Genesis28:4 Mi a o gu nee letsego ya ga Aberahame, uena, le losika loa gago nau, gore u rue lehatsi, ye u leñ moeñ go yeona, ye Morimo o lo oa le naea Aberahame." 
Genesis28:5 Mi Yitsake a bolotsa Yakobe: mi a ea Padan‐arama go Labane, moroa Betuele Mosiria, khantsaria Rebeke, ma Yakobe le Esaue." 
Genesis28:6 ¶ Mi eare Esaue a bona Yitsake a tsegaharitse Yakobe, a mo romela kua Padan‐arama go tsaea mosari gona; le yaka a mo tsegaharitse a mo laotse, a re, U si tsee mosari oa bomoroaria Kanana;" 
Genesis28:7 Le gona ka Yakobe a la a utluile rague le mague, mi a ile kua Padanarama;" 
Genesis28:8 Mi Esaue ka a bona bomoroaria Kanana ba le boshula mo maitloñ a ga Yitsake rague: 
Genesis28:9 Ereha gone Esaue o eañ kua go Ishemaele, mi a tsela mosari eo moñue basariñ ba gague, eboñ Mahale moroaria Ishemaele, moroa Aberahame, khantsaria Nebayote." 
Genesis28:10 ¶ Mi Yakobe a coa Bere‐sheba, mi a ea Harana." 
Genesis28:11 Mi a hitla heloñ goñue, mi a lala gona, gone letsatsi le le phirimile; mi a tsaea maye mañue a helo hoñ, mi a itihela mosamo, mi a itatsa heloñ ha go robala." 
Genesis28:12 Mi a lora, mi bonañ sepalamo sa bo se tlomiloe ha hatsi, se setloa sa shona se hitlelelañ legorimo: mi bonañ, baengeli ba Morimo ba tlatloga ba hologa ka shona." 
Genesis28:13 Mi boñan, Yehova a bo a eme kua gorimo ga shona, mi a re, Kina Yehova Morimo oa ga Aberahame rago, le Morimo oa ga Yitsake; lehatsi ye u letseñ go yeona, ki tla le gu naea, le losika loa gago;" 
Genesis28:14 Mi losika loa gago lo tla na yaka lorole loa ombu, mi u tla namela kua Ueseta, le Iseta, le Noreta, le Souta: mi litsika cotle tsa lehatsi li tla tsegaharioa ka uena, le ka losika loa gago." 
Genesis28:15 Mi bona, ki na nau, mi ki tla gu buluka mo maheloñ aotle kua u tla eañ gona, mi ki tla ba ki gu lere mo hatsiñ ye: gone ga ’nkitla ki gu tloboga, e tla e tsamaea ki riha cotle tse ki li buileñ nau." 
Genesis28:16 ¶ Mi Yakobe a ruloa thobaloñ ea gague, mi a re, Amarure, Yehova o mo heloñ ha; mi ga kia ka ka itse." 
Genesis28:17 Mi a boiha, mi a re, Helo ha go boitsega yañ! go si go sele, ki eona eintlu ea Morimo, mi ki eona khoro ea legorimo." 
Genesis28:18 Mi Yakobe a phakela, mi a tsaea leincue ye e le le mosamo oa gague, mi a le tloma pilara, mi a thela loukuane gorimo ga yeona." 
Genesis28:19 Mi a bitsa leina ya helo ha Bete‐ela: mi leina ya motse o eabo e le Lusa gale. 
Genesis28:20 Mi Yakobe a ikana ka ikano, a re, Etlare ha Morimo o tla na le ’na, le go ’mpuluka mo tseleñ e ki etañ ka eona, le go ’nnaea liyo go ya, le liaparo go apara," 
Genesis28:21 Gore ki be ki boele tluñ ea ga rre ka kagisho; ereha gona Yehova o tla nañ Morimo oa me: 
Genesis28:22 Mi leincue ye ki le tlomileñ pilara, le tla na eintlu ea Morimo: amarure ki tla gu naea sa‐bo‐ten sa cotle tse u tla li ’nnaeañ." 
Genesis29:1 EREHA gona Yakobe o culetsañ nao tsa gague, mi a etela kua hatsiñ ya bathu ba Iseta." 
Genesis29:2 Mi a leba, mi bonañ, gabo gole seriba mo nageñ, mi bonañ, macomane a teri a liñku a bothile ha go shona, gone ba nosa macomane mo seribeñ se, mi letlapa ye legolu ya bo le le ha molomoñ oa seriba." 
Genesis29:3 Mi macomane antse a phutheloa gona, mi ba hirikolola letlapa mo molomoñ oa seriba, ba nosa macomane ua; mi ba bo ba baea letlapa mo molomoñ oa seriba, heloñ ga yeona." 
Genesis29:4 Mi Yakobe a ba raea, Bana ba ga rra, lo coa kae? mi ba re, Re ba ga Harana." 
Genesis29:5 Mi a ba raea, A lo itse Labane moroa Nahore? mi ba re, Rea mo itse." 
Genesis29:6 Mi a ba raea, A ontse seiñtle? Mi ba re, Ontse seiñtle: mi bona, Rakele moroarie o tla le liñku." 
Genesis29:7 Mi a re, Bonañ, go sale motsegare, mi ga si lobaka loa go phutha likhomu; lo nose liñku, mi lo ee lo li hurise." 
Genesis29:8 Mi ba re, Ga re kake ra riha yalo macomane a tsamaea a phuthoa pele, le letlapa le hirikololoe molomoñ oa seriba; ereha gona re nosañ liñku." 
Genesis29:9 Ka a sa bua le bona, Rakele a tla le liñku co rague; gone e le le morisa oa cona." 
Genesis29:10 Mi ga rihala ka Yakobe a bona Rakele moroaria Labane, khantsaria mague, le liñku co Labane, khantsaria mague, Yakobe a atamela a hirikolola letlapa mo molomoñ oa seriba, a nosa lecomane ya ga Labane khantsaria mague." 
Genesis29:11 Mi Yakobe a atla Rakele, mi a culetsa koru ea gague a lela." 
Genesis29:12 Mi Yakobe a bulelela Rakele ha e le ena mogola rague, le moroa Rebeke. Mi Rakele a taboga a bulelela rague." 
Genesis29:13 Mi ga rihala Labane a utlua mahuku a ga Yakobe moroa khantsarie, a taboga go mo khatlantsa, a mo tlamparela, a mo atla, a mo isa mo tluñ ea gague. Mi a kakanyetsa Labane cotle tse." 
Genesis29:14 Mi Labane a mo raea, Amarure u sapo ya me le nama ea me. Mi a na nae ka khueri eñue hela." 
Genesis29:15 ¶ Mi Labane a raea Yakobe, Ka u le ñuana oa ga rre, a u ka ’ntihelela lehela? ’mpulelela tuelo ea gago." 
Genesis29:16 Mi Labane a na le bomoroarie ba tu: leina ya eo mogolu e le le Lie, mi leina ya eo motlana e le le Rakele." 
Genesis29:17 Lie a le maitlo a bori, mi Rakele o la le mele moiñtle, le sehatlogo." 
Genesis29:18 Mi Yakobe a rata Rakele; mi a re, ki tla gu rihelela Rakele moroariu eo motlana nyaga li seven." 
Genesis29:19 Mi Labane a re, Go molemo go mo gu naea, esiñ go mo naea monona o sele: nna le ’na." 
Genesis29:20 Mi yalo Yakobe a rihelela Rakele nyaga li seven; mi li li le go ena yaka malatsi a si mantsi ka eintla ea lorato lo o la a mo rata ka lona. 
Genesis29:21 ¶ Mi Yakobe a raea Labane, ’Nnaea mosari oa me, gone lobaka loa me lo hetile gore ki ee mo go ena." 
Genesis29:22 Mi Labane a phutha banona ba helo hoñ, mi a riha moletlo." 
Genesis29:23 Mi ga rihala ka mabanyane a tsaea Lie moroarie, a mo isa go ena; mi a ea mo go ena." 
Genesis29:24 Mi Labane a naea Lie Silepe lelata ya gague, go na lelata." 
Genesis29:25 Mi ga rihala moshoñ, bonañ, e le le Lie: mi a raea Labane, Eñ se u se ’ntihetseñ? a ga kia ka ka gu rihelela Rakele? U ’ntsieleritseñ?" 
Genesis29:26 Mi Labane a re, Ga go rihoe yalo mo hatsiñ ye ya rona go naea eo motlana pele ga oa borure." 
Genesis29:27 Uetsa ueke ea eo, mi le eo moñue re tla mo gu naea ka tihelo e u tla ’ntihelañ nyaga li seven tse riñue ka eona." 
Genesis29:28 ¶ Mi Yakobe a riha yalo, mi a uetsa ueke ea eo; mi a mo naea le ena Rakele moroarie go na mosari." 
Genesis29:29 Mi Labane a naea Rakele moroarie Bilehe lelata ya gague, go na lelata ya gague." 
Genesis29:30 Mi le gona a ea mo go Rakele, mi a rata le ena Rakele bogolu go Lie; mi a hela a mo rihelela ka nyaga li seven tse riñue." 
Genesis29:31 Mi erile Yehova a bona ha Lie a sa kaioe, a bula sepopelo sa gague: mi Rakele a le moöpa." 
Genesis29:32 Mi Lie a ithuala, a bona mosimane, mi a mo sha leina ya Rubene: gone a re, Amarure Yehova a lebile pogisho ea me: ki gona yana monona oa me o tla ’nthatañ." 
Genesis29:33 Mi a ba a ithuala, a bona mosimane; mi a re, Era gone Yehova o utluile ki sa kaioe, ki gona o ’nneileñ le eo: mi a mo sha leina ya Simeone." 
Genesis29:34 Mi a ba a ithuala, mi a bona mosimane, a re, Yanuñ, monona oa me o tla kopana le ’na, gone ki tsetse nae basimane ba teri; ki gona leina ya gague le birioañ Leve." 
Genesis29:35 Mi a ba a ithuala, mi a bona mosimane: mi a re, Yana ki tla baka Yehova: ki gona a mo sha leina ya Yude; mi a khutla go bona bana." 
Genesis30:1 MI Rakele ka a bona a sa tsale bana le Yakobe, Rakele a huhana le mogolüe, mi a raea Yakobe, ’Nnaea bana, mi ha go sa na yalo, ki tla shua." 
Genesis30:2 Mi bogale yoa ga Yakobe yoa tukela Rakele: mi a re, A ki mo bonnoñ yoa Morimo o o gu timañ lotsalo?" 
Genesis30:3 Mi a re, Bona, Bilehe lelata ya me ki eo, u ee mo go ena; me o tla khubamela ha mañoleñ a me, gore le ’na ki bone bana ka ena." 
Genesis30:4 Mi a mo nela Bilehe lelata ya gague go na mosari; mi Yakobe a ea mo go ena. 
Genesis30:5 ¶ Mi Bilehe a ithuala, mi a tsala le Yakobe mosimane." 
Genesis30:6 Mi Rakele a re, Morimo o ’nkha-neletse, mi le gona o utluile koru ea me, o ’nneile mosimane: ki gona o mo shañ leina ya Dane." 
Genesis30:7 Mi Bilehe lelata ya ga Rakele a ba a ithuala, mi a tsala le Yakobe mosimane oa bo tu." 
Genesis30:8 Mi Rakele a re, Ki shukashukanye le mogolule ka cukacukano tse ri kholu, mi ki hentse: mi a mo sha leina ya Nafetale." 
Genesis30:9 ¶ Erile Lie a bona a khutlile go bona bana, a tsaea Silepe lelata ya gague, mi a mo nela Yakobe go na mosari." 
Genesis30:10 Mi Silepe lelata ya ga Lie a tsala le Yakobe mosimane. 
Genesis30:11 Mi Lie a re, Leshomo le etla: mi a mo sha leina ya Gade." 
Genesis30:12 Mi Silepe lelata ya ga Lie a tsala le Yakobe mosimane oa bo tu. 
Genesis30:13 Mi Lie a re, Ki tlogonolo, gone bomoroaria bathu ba tla ’nkaea letlogonolo: mi a mo sha leina ya Ashere." 
Genesis30:14 ¶ Mi Rubene a ea mo motleñ oa thobo ea mabele, mi a bona lidudaia kua nageñ, mi a li lere go Lie mague. Ereha gona Rakele o raeañ Lie, A ko u ’nnee ga lidudaia tsa ga moroau." 
Genesis30:15 Mi a mo raea, A ki se senye ka u ’ntsetse monona oa me? mi a u tla ba u tsaea le cona lidudaia tsa ga moroake? Mi Rakele a re, Ki gona o tla lalañ le uena sigoñ yonu ka lidudaia tsa ga moroau." 
Genesis30:16 Mi ga coa Yakobe kua nageñ matsiboea, mi Lie a coela go mo khatlantsa, a re, U tle mo go ’na; gone rure ki gu thapetse tuelo ka lidudaia tsa ga moroake. Mi a lala nae sigoñ youo." 
Genesis30:17 Mi Morimo oa retsa Lie, mi a ithuala, a tsala le Yakobe mosimane oa bo faeve." 
Genesis30:18 Mi Lie a re, Morimo o ’nneile tuelo ea me; gone ki netse monona oa me lelata ya me. Mi a mo sha leina ya Yisakare." 
Genesis30:19 Mi Lie a ba a ithuala, mi a tsala le Yakobe mosimane oa bo sekes." 
Genesis30:20 Mi Lie a re, Morimo o ’nnetse neo ea molemo; yana monona oa me o tla nna le ’na; gone ki tsetse nae basimane ba le sekes: mi a mo sha leina ya Sebulone." 
Genesis30:21 Mi morago ga mouo a bona mosetsana, mi a mo sha leina ya Dine." 
Genesis30:22 ¶ Mi Morimo oa gopola Rakele, mi Morimo oa mo retsa, mi oa mula sepopelo." 
Genesis30:23 Mi a ithuala, mi a bona mosimane; mi a re, Morimo o tlositse khobo ea me:" 
Genesis30:24 Mi a mo sha leina ya Yosefe: mi a re, Yehova o tla ’nkokeletsa ka mosimane eo moñue." 
Genesis30:25 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka Rakele a sina bona Yosefe, Yakobe a raea Labane, Mma ki huruge, ki ee heloñ ga me, le kua hatsiñ ya me." 
Genesis30:26 ’Nnaea basari ba me le bana ba me, ba ki ba gu riheletseñ, mi ki huruge; gone u itse tihelo ea me e ki e gu rihetseñ." 
Genesis30:27 Mi Labane a mo raea, A ’nke ki bone tsalano mo maitloñ a gago: ki lemogile ha Yehova a ’ntsegaharitse ka uena." 
Genesis30:28 Mi a re, ’Ntlaloganyetsa tuelo ea gago, mi ki tla e gu naea." 
Genesis30:29 Mi a mo raea, Ua itse kaha ki gu rihetseñ, le kaha lihutsane tsa gago li li na le ’na ka gona." 
Genesis30:30 Gone bobotlana yo u lu u na nayo ki e si ki tle bo totaharitse bontsi, mi Yehova o gu tsegaharitse ka tihelo ea me: mi yana ki tla rihelela le eona eintlu ea me leñ?" 
Genesis30:31 Mi a re, Ki tla gu naeañ? Mi Yakobe a re, U si ’nnee sepe: ha u ka ’ntihela seo se, ki tla ba ki hurisa ki risa comane ya gago." 
Genesis30:32 Mi ki tla ralala comane yeotle ya gago ka yenu, ki tlaola go yeona, cotle tse ri khuana le khuebana, le cotle tse ri tloana tse ri mo liñkuñ, le tse ri khuebana, le khuana mo liporiñ: mi tseuo li tla na tuelo ea me." 
Genesis30:33 Yalo tsiamo ea me e tla ’nka-rabela motleñ o o tlañ, ha tuelo ea me e tla tla ha pele ga hatlogo sa gago: eñue le eñue e esiñ khuana le khuebana mo liporiñ, le tloana mo liñkuñ e tla kaioa e ucuiloe ha go ’na." 
Genesis30:34 Mi Labane a re, Bona, intla go ka na yaka huku ya gago." 
Genesis30:35 Mi a tlaola mo tsatsiñ yeuo liphoko tse ri tilori, le tse ri khueba, le pori tse ri namagari tse ri khuana, le khuebana, le eñue le eñue e e nañ le boshueu mo go eona, le cotle tse ri tloana mo liñkuñ, mi a li nela mo atleñ tsa bomoroaue." 
Genesis30:36 Mi a laola sebaka sa malatsi a teri gare ga gague le Yakobe: mi Yakobe a hurisa tse ri setseñ tsa macomane a ga Labane. 
Genesis30:37 Mi Yakobe a tsaea thupa tsa tlare se se talana sa mopopulera, le tsa mo-hasela, le tsa mokasetanya, mi a obola meralari mo go cona, a bonatsa boshueu yo bo mo lithupeñ." 
Genesis30:38 Mi a baea thupa tse o la a li obotse ha pele ga macomane mo likatiñ, le mo megopuñ ea metse ha lecomane le noañ gona, go lebagana le macomane ha a tla go noa, gore a nemeruhale ha a tla go noa." 
Genesis30:39 Mi macomane a nemeruhala ha pele ga lithupa, mi a tsala bolilotsana, le boguana, le boguebana." 
Genesis30:40 Mi Yakobe a tlaloganya likuana, mi a bosetsa hatlogo tsa macomane kua go tse ri tilotsana le ntloana cotle tse ri mo comaneñ ya ga Labane; mi a baea macomane a gague ka aosi, mi a sa a tsenye mo comaneñ ya ga Labane." 
Genesis30:41 Mi ga rihala ka tse ri nonohileñ tsa macomane tsa nemeruhala Yakobe a baea lithupa ha pele ga maitlo a macomane mo likatiñ gore, li nemeruhale mo lithupeñ." 
Genesis30:42 Mi eare ha macomane a phe-phile marapo a si ka a a bela lithupa, ea tsamaea a a phephileñ marapo a na a ga Labane, mi a a nonohileñ a na a ga Yakobe." 
Genesis30:43 Mi monona eo a totahala segolu, mi a na le macomane a le mantsi, le malata, le batlañka, le likamela, le liesela." 
Genesis31:1 MI a utlua mahuku a bomoroa Labane, ba re, Yakobe o cotse cotle tsa ga ra rona; mi o bonye lohumo lotle lo, ka tse e leñ tsa ga ra rona." 
Genesis31:2 Mi Yakobe a bona hatlogo sa ga Labane, mi bonañ, se le se sa na go ena yaka mo metleñ e e hetileñ." 
Genesis31:3 Mi Yehova a raea Yakobe, Boela hatsiñ ya borago, le kua tsaleñ tsa gago: mi ki tla na nau." 
Genesis31:4 Mi Yakobe a roma a biletsa Rakele le Lie kua nageñ, kua lecomaneñ ya gague." 
Genesis31:5 Mi a ba raea, Ki bona hatlogo sa ga ra lona ga sea na go ’na yaka mo metleñ e e hetileñ; mi Morimo oa ga rre o loa na le ’na." 
Genesis31:6 Mi loa itse ki rihetse ra lona ka nonoho ea me eotle. 
Genesis31:7 Mi ra lona o ’ntsieritse, mi o hetotse tuelo ea me ga ten; mi Morimo ga oa mo lesa go ’ntihela ka boshula." 
Genesis31:8 Erile a re yalo, Tse ri khuana li tla na tuelo ea gago; ereha gona lecomane yeotle le tsalañ boguana: mi erile a re yalo, Tse re tilotsana li tla na tuelo ea gago; ereha gona lecomane yeotle le tsalañ bolilotsana." 
Genesis31:9 Morimo o tlositse lithuo tse ga ra lona yalo, mi o li ’nneile." 
Genesis31:10 Mi ga rihala motleñ o lecomane le nemeruhala ka culetsa maitlo a me, mi ka bona mo toroñ, mi bonañ, lipheleu tse ri bekarañ macomane, e le le tse ri tilori, le tse ri uñkhue, le tse ri thamaga." 
Genesis31:11 Mi moengeli oa ga Yehova a bua le ’na mo toroñ, a re, Yakoba; mi ka re, Ki hanu." 
Genesis31:12 Mi a re, Culetsa maitlo a gago yana, mi bona lipheleu cotle tse ri bekarañ macomane li tilori, le uñkhue le tse ri thamaga, gone ki bonye cotle tse Labane o li gu rihelañ." 
Genesis31:13 Ki ’na Morimo oa Bete‐ela, kua u lu ua tlotsa pilara gona, kua u lu ua inkanela ikano: nanoga yana, huruga hatsiñ ye, mi u boele hatsiñ ya tsala tsa gago." 
Genesis31:14 Mi Rakele le Lie ba araba ba mo raea, A re santse re na le kabelo, khotsa boshua mo tluñ ea ga ra rona?" 
Genesis31:15 A ga re kaioa baeñ ki ena? gone o re baparitse, mi le gona o nyeleleritse mari a rona rure." 
Genesis31:16 Gone mahumo aotle a Morimo o a tloseritseñ ra rona, ki a rona, le a bana ba rona: mi yana, u rihe cotle tse Morimo o li gu buleletseñ." 
Genesis31:17 ¶ Ereha gona Yakobe o nanogañ, mi a baea bomoroaue le basari ba gague mo likameleñ;" 
Genesis31:18 Mi a isa lithuo tsa gague cotle, le lithoto tsa gague tse o la a li rihela cotle, (lithuo tse o li ruileñ, tse o la a li bapala kua Padanarama,) gore a ee kua go Yitsake rague mo hatsiñ ya Kanana." 
Genesis31:19 Mi Labane o la a ile go tloba liñku tsa gague: me Rakele a ucua literafa tse e leñ tsa ga rague. 
Genesis31:20 Mi Yakobe a ikucua go Labane Mosiria, ecoa a sa mulelele a tsaba." 
Genesis31:21 A tsaba yalo le cotle tse o nañ naco; mi a nanoga a khabaganya molapo, mi a lebeganya hatlogo sa gague le thaba ea Gileada." 
Genesis31:22 ¶ Mi ga buleleloa Labane tsatsiñ ya boteri, Yakobe o tsabile." 
Genesis31:23 Mi a tsaea bana ba ga rague nae, mi a mo khonatelela loeto loa malatsi a seven; mi a mo hitlela mo thabeñ ea Gileada." 
Genesis31:24 Mi Morimo oa tla go Labane Mosiria ka toro bosigo, oa mo raea, U itise gore u si bue le Yakobe molemo, khotsa boshula." 
Genesis31:25 ¶ Mi Labane a hitlela Yakobe. Mi yana Yakobe o la a tlomile tenta ea gague mo thabeñ; mi Labane le bana ba ga rague ba tloma ea bona thabeñ ea Gileada. 
Genesis31:26 Mi Labane a raea Yakobe, U rihileñ ka u ikucuile go ’na, mi u tseile bomoroariake, yaka bacuaroi ba caka?" 
Genesis31:27 U tsabetseñ ka go sa itsioeñ, u ikucuile go ’na: u sa ’mpulelele, gore ’nke ki gu bolorisa ka turueco le ka lihela, le ka moropa, le ka harepe?" 
Genesis31:28 Le gona u lu u si ka ua ’ntesa go atla bomoroake le bomoroariake: yana u silohetse ka go riha yalo. 
Genesis31:29 Go mo nonohoñ ea atla sa me go lo rihela boshula: mi Morimo oa ga rago o buile le ’na sigoñ yo bo hetileñ, oa re, U itise, u si bue le Yakobe molemo, khotsa boshula." 
Genesis31:30 Mi ereka yana, u lu ua rata go huruga, ka gone u lu ua tlologelela eintlu ea ga rago segolu, u ucuetseñ merimo ea me?" 
Genesis31:31 Mi Yakobe a araba a raea Labane, Gone ki le ke boiha; ka re, Ekare khotsa u tla ’ntsela bomoroariu ka thata." 
Genesis31:32 Leha e le mañmañ, eo u tla bonañ merimo ea gago ha go ena, a a si tsele: u lemoge ha pele ga bana ba ga rra echo sa gago se se ha go ’na, mi u se itsele. Gone Yakobe a sa itse ha Rakele a la a e ucua." 
Genesis31:33 Mi Labane a tsena mo tenteñ ea ga Yakobe, le mo tenteñ ea ga Lie, le mo tenteñ tsa malata a tu; mi ga a ka a e bona. Mi a coa mo tenteñ ea ga Lie, a tsena mo tenteñ ea ga Rakele." 
Genesis31:34 Mi Rakele o la a tsaea literafa, a li tsenya mo libeeleloñ tsa kamela, a lula go cona. Mi Labane a hukutsa tenta eotle, mi a si ka a li bona." 
Genesis31:35 Mi Rakele a raea rague, A morena oa me a si tuke ka ki paleloa ki go nanoga ha pele ga gago; gone ki rihegile mokhua oa bosari. Mi a kheleisa, mi a si ka a bona literafa." 
Genesis31:36 Mi Yakobe a tuka, mi a ganela le Labane: mi Yakobe a araba a raea Labane, Tlolo ea me ki eñ? mi seleo sa me ki eñ ka u ’nkhukhetse ka bocarara?" 
Genesis31:37 Ka u hukuritse liloana tsa me cotle, u bonyeñ ga lithoto tsa eintlu ea gago cotle? Se bee ha, ha pele ga bana ba ga rra eno le bana ba ga rra echo mi a ba siamise gare ga rona ro ba tu." 
Genesis31:38 Ki le ki na nau nyaga tse tuente tse; liñku tse ri namagari tsa gago, le pori tse ri namagari tsa gago ga lia ka tsa holotsa, mi lipheleu tsa comane ya gago ga ’nka ka li ya." 
Genesis31:39 Se se gagocoeñ ki libatana ga ’nka ka se isa go uena; ki se ipelesi-tse; u lu ua se lopa atleñ sa me, ha se le sa ucuioa motsegare khotsa se se ucuioañ bosigo." 
Genesis31:40 Ki le ki le ka mogote o ’nnyeletsa motsegare, le serame bosigo; mi thobalo e le ea tlogela maitlo a me." 
Genesis31:41 Yalo ki le ki le nyaga li tuente mo tluñ ea gago; ka gu rihelela bomoroariu ba ba tu nyaga li forten, le macomane a gago nyaga li sekes: mi u hetotse tuelo ea me ga ten." 
Genesis31:42 Ekabo e si Morimo oa ga rre, Morimo oa ga Aberahame, le poiho ea ga Yitsake e e le e na le ’na, u ko u mpositse ki iphotlere rure. Morimo o bonye pogisho ea me, le tapisho ea atla tsa me, o gu buetse sigoñ yo bo hetileñ." 
Genesis31:43 ¶ Mi Labane a araba a raea Yakobe, Bomoroariake ba, mi bana ba, ke bana ba me, mi lihutsane tse tsa me; E, cotle tse u li bonañ ki tsa me; mi ’nko ki rihelañ bomoroariake ba ka yenu? le go bana ba bona ba ba ba bonyeñ?" 
Genesis31:44 Ki gona yana, a re ee, re rihe kholagano, ’na le uena; mi a e ne seshupo gare ga me le uena." 
Genesis31:45 Mi Yakobe a tsaea leincue, a le emisa pilara." 
Genesis31:46 Mi Yakobe a raea bana ba ga rague, Rorañ maye; mi ba tsaea maye ba riha mokoa; mi ba yela gona mo mokoeñ." 
Genesis31:47 Mi Labane a o bitsa Yegarasahe-duta, mi Yakobe a o bitsa Galeda." 
Genesis31:48 Mi Labane a re, Mokoa o ki seshupo gare ga me le uena ka yenu. Ki gona leina ya ona ya birioa Galeda," 
Genesis31:49 Le Mitsepa; gone a re, A Yehova o lebalebe gare ga me le uena, mogañ re khaoganyeñ." 
Genesis31:50 Ere ha u bogisa bomoroariake, leha e le ha u tsaea basari bogolu go bomoroariake, (ga go ope ha go rona;) bona, Morimo o tla na moshupi gare ga me le uena." 
Genesis31:51 Mi Labane a hela a raea Yakobe, Bona mokoa o, mi bona pilara e, ki li khobotlantseñ gare ga me le uena;" 
Genesis31:52 A mokoa o, a o shupe, le pilara e, a e shupe, ha ki si kitla ki heta mokoa o go ea go uena, mi le uena ha u si kitla u heta mokoa o le pilara e go tla go ’na go shulatsa." 
Genesis31:53 A Morimo oa ga Aberehame, le Morimo oa ga Nahore, Morimo oa ga rabo o sekise gare ga rona. Mi Yakobe a ikana ka poiho ea ga Yitsake rague." 
Genesis31:54 Ereha gona Yakobe o tlabañ tlabo mo thabeñ, mi a bitsa bana ba ga rague go ya liyo: mi ba ya liyo ba lala bosigo mo thabeñ." 
Genesis31:55 Mi Labane a phakela a atla bomoroaue le bomoroarie, a ba tsegahatsa: mi Labane a ea a boela heloñ ga gague." 
Genesis32:1 MI Yakobe a ea tseleñ ea gague, mi baengeli ba Morimo ba mo khatlantsa." 
Genesis32:2 Mi eare Yakobe a ba bona, a re, E ki leshomo ya Morimo: mi a bitsa leina ya helo ha Mahanaima." 
Genesis32:3 ¶ Mi Yakobe a romela baroñoi ha pele ga gague go Esaue mogoluue, kua hatsiñ ya Seira, naga ea Edoma." 
Genesis32:4 Mi a ba laola, a re, Lo bue yalo le Esaue morena oa me; Yakobe motlañka oa gago, a re, Ki le ki tlotsetlo-tse le Labane, mi ki riegile gona le yana:" 
Genesis32:5 Mi ki na le likhomu, le liesela, le macomane, le batlañka, le malata: mi ki romile go bulelela morena oa me, gore ki bone tsalano maitloñ a gago." 
Genesis32:6 ¶ Mi baroñoi ba boela go Yakobe, ba re, Re hitlile go Esaue mogoluü, mi le ena o etla go gu khatlantsa, le banona ba for hundereda ba na nae." 
Genesis32:7 Mi Yakobe a boiha segolu, mi a pitlagañoa: mi a khaoganya bathu ba ba nañ nae, le macomane, le likhomu, le likamela go na mashomo a le tu;" 
Genesis32:8 Gone a re, Etlare ha Esaue a tla a khemetha leshomo ye leñue, ereha gona ye leñue ye le setseñ le tla tsabañ." 
Genesis32:9 ¶ Mi Yakobe a re, Morimo oa ga rre Aberahame le Morimo oa ga Yitsake rre, Yehova eo o ’ntheileñ, ua re, Boela kua hatsiñ ya gago, le kua tsaleñ tsa gago, mi ki tla gu rihela molemo;" 
Genesis32:10 Ga kia cuaneloa ki sepe sa bopelunomi yotle, le sa boikanyo yotle yo u bo rihetseñ motlañka oa gago; gone ki le ka khabaganya Yoredane eo ka tsama ea me; mi yana ki rihegile mashomo a le tu." 
Genesis32:11 Kia gu rapela, ’nkholola mo atleñ sa ga ’nkholule, mo atleñ sa ga Esaue: gone kia moiha, gore e si re khotsa a tla a ’nkhemetha le bana, le bo‐mabo." 
Genesis32:12 Mi uena u lu ua re, Ki tla gu rihela molemo rure, ki riha losika loa gago yaka moshaua oa leoatle o o sa kakeñ oa baloa ka bontsi yoa ona." 
Genesis32:13 ¶ Mi a lala gona sigoñ youo; mi a tsela Esaue mogoluue neo ea tse o nañ naco. 
Genesis32:14 Pori tse li namagari li le tu hundereda, le liphoko li le tuente, liñku tse li namagari li le tu hundereda, le lipheleu li le tuente." 
Genesis32:15 Likamela tse ri amusañ li le terete le likamelana tsa cona, le meroba ea likhomu li le forte, le lipoana li le ten, le liesela tse ri namagari li li le tuente, le lieselana li le ten." 
Genesis32:16 Mi a li nela atleñ tsa batlañka ba gague, lekhathi leñue le ye leñue ka yeosi; mi a raea batlañka ba gague, ’Mphetelañ pele, mi entsañ sebaka gare ga lekhathi leñue le leñue." 
Genesis32:17 Mi a laola eo o kua pele pele, a re, Ere ha Esaue ’nkholule a khatlana nau, a gu botsa, a re, U oa ga mañ? mi u ea kae? mi tse, tse ri ha pele ga gago, ki co mañ?" 
Genesis32:18 Erehe gona u reñ, Ki co Yakobe motlañka oa gago; ki neo go Esaue morena oa me: mi bona, le ena o kua morago ga rona." 
Genesis32:19 Mi a laolela le ena oa bo‐tu, le oa bo‐teri, le botle ba ba salañ ma-khathi morago, a re, Ere lo mona, buañ le Esaue ka huku ye." 
Genesis32:20 Mi lo hele lo bua, lo re, Bona Yakobe motlañka oa gago o kua morago. Gone, o la re, Ki tla mo ruanya ka neo e eañ pele ga me, mi morago ga mouo ki tla bona hatlogo sa gague: ekare khotsa a ’nñoka." 
Genesis32:21 Neo ea mo etelela pele yalo: mi ena ka esi a lala le leshomo sigoñ youo. 
Genesis32:22 Mi a coga ka sigo youo, mi a tsaea basari ba gague ba ba tu, le malata a gague a a tu, le bana ba gague ba ba eleven, mi ba khabaganya ka letsibogo ya ga Yaboka." 
Genesis32:23 Mi a ba tsaea, mi a ba khabagantsetsa moseya oa molacoana, mi a khabagantsetsa cotle tse o nañ naco kua moseya." 
Genesis32:24 ¶ Mi Yakobe a sala a le esi, mi monona moñue a kampana nae ea tsamaea bosigo yoa sa." 
Genesis32:25 Mi eare a bona a sa mo henye, a ama khuti ea rope sa gague; mi khuti ea rope sa ga Yakobe ea khuiga ka a sa kampana nae." 
Genesis32:26 Mi a re, ’Ntesa ki tsamaee gone bosigo boa sa, mi a re, Ga ’nkitla ki gu lesa e tla e tsamaea u ’ntsegahatsa pele." 
Genesis32:27 Mi a mo raea, Leina ya gago, o mañ? Mi a re, Yakobe." 
Genesis32:28 Mi a re, Leina ya gago, ga le kitla le tlola le birioa Yakobe, mi le tla birioa Yeserele, gone u na le thata mo Morimoñ le mo bathuñ, mi u hentse." 
Genesis32:29 Mi Yakobe a bitsa, a re, A ko u ’mpulelele Leina ya gago. Mi a re, Gontse yañ ka u botsa Leina ya me? Mi a mo tsegahatsa gona." 
Genesis32:30 Mi Yakobe a bitsa leina ya helo hoñ, Peniela: gone a re, Ki bonye Morimo re lebantse lihatlogo, mi botselo yoa me bo golocoe." 
Genesis32:31 ¶ Mi letsatsi ya mo tlabela ka a ralala Peniela, mi a tlotsa noka." 
Genesis32:32 Ki gona bana ba Yeserele ba sa yeñ losika lo lo repileñ lo lo mo khutiñ ea serope le ka yenu: gone a ama khuti ea serope sa ga Yakobe, mo sikeñ lo lo repileñ." 
Genesis33:1 MI Yakobe a tlatlosa maitlo a gague, mi a leba, mi bonañ, Esaue a bo a tla le banona ba for hundereda ba ba nañ nae. Mi a khaoganyetsa bana go Lie, le go Rakele, le go malata a a tu." 
Genesis33:2 Mi a baea malata le bana ba bona kua pele, mi Lie le bana ba gague kua morago, mi Rakele le Yosefa kua moragorago." 
Genesis33:3 Mi a hetela pele ga bona, mi a inamela ha hatsi ga seven, ga tsamaea a hitla go mogoluue." 
Genesis33:4 Mi Esaue a tabogela go mo khatlantsa, mi a mo tlamparela, mi a oela thamoñ ea gague, mi a mo atla; mi ba lela." 
Genesis33:5 Morago ga mouo a culetsa maitlo a gague, a bona basari le bana, mi a re, E bo mañ ba ba nañ nau? Mi a re, Bana ba Morimo o ba neileñ motlañka oa gago, ka boicuarelo." 
Genesis33:6 Ereha gona malata le bana ba aona ba atamelañ, mi ba ikoba." 
Genesis33:7 Le ena Lie a atamela, le bana ba gague, mi ba ikoba: mi morago ga mouo ga atamela Yosefa le Rakele, mi ba ikoba." 
Genesis33:8 Mi a re, shomo yeotle ye ki kha-tlanyeñ nayeo ki go reñ? Mi a re, Ki go bona tsalano maitloñ a morena oa me." 
Genesis33:9 Mi Esaue a re, ’Nnaka ki na le tsecu li ’ntekanye; rua tse u nañ naco." 
Genesis33:10 Mi Yakobe a re, Au! nya, a ereka yana ki bonye tsalano maitloñ a gago, ki gona yalo cula neo ea me mo atleñ sa me, gone ki bonye hatlogo sa gago yaka ki bonye hatlogo sa Morimo, mi u nateheloa ki ’na." 
Genesis33:11 A ko u cule tsegahaco ea me e e isicoeñ go uena: gone Morimo o ntihetse boicuarelo, gone ki na le go lekanye. Mi a na a mo emelela ea tsamaea a e cula." 
Genesis33:12 Mi a re, A re coelele pele etoñ loa rona, mi ki tla gu etelela pele." 
Genesis33:13 Mi a mo raea, Morena oa me oa itse, bana ba, ba sale liramatla-na, mi ki na le lihutsane le khomu tse ri namagari ha go ’na, tse ri amusañ; mi ha li khuerioa bobe ka tsatsi le le leñue, lihutsane cotle li ka shua." 
Genesis33:14 A ko a morena oa me a hete-le pele ga motlañka oa gague: mi ki tla goga ka pepetleco kaha lilo li tsamaeañ ka gona, le kaha bana ba nonohileñ ka gona, ki tsamaea ki hitla moreneñ oa me kua Seira." 
Genesis33:15 Mi Esaue a re, A ko ki gu tlogelele bañue ba bathu ba ba nañ le ’na: mi a re, Ana kañ? a ki bone tsalano maitloñ a morena oa me." 
Genesis33:16 Mi yalo Esaue a boela mo tseleñ ea gague e eañ Seira mo tsatsiñ yeuo. 
Genesis33:17 ¶ Mi Yakobe a hurugela kua Sukota mi a ikagela eintlu, mi a rihela likhomu liobo: ki gona leina ya helo hoñ le birioañ Sukota." 
Genesis33:18 ¶ Mi Yakobe a tla ka pulukego mo motseñ oa Shekema o o mo hatsiñ ya Kanana, ka a coa kua Padanarama, mi a tlaolela ha pele ga motse." 
Genesis33:19 Mi a reka kabelo ea naga, ha o tsarololelañ gona tenta ea gague; a e reka mo atleñ tsa bomoroa Hamore, ra Shekeme ka mari a hundereda." 
Genesis33:20 Mi a agela aletara gona, mi a e e bitsa Ela‐elohe‐Yeserela." 
Genesis34:1 MI Dine moroaria Lie, eo o la mo tsala le Yakobe, a coela go bona bomoroaria lehatsi." 
Genesis34:2 Mi eare Shekeme, moroa Hamore, Moheva, khosana ea lehatsi ye, a mona, a mo tsaea, a mo kholela taloñ." 
Genesis34:3 Mi moea oa gague oa ñaparela Dine moroaria Yakobe; mi a rata moroetsana eo, mi a bua le moroetsana ka khobisho pelu." 
Genesis34:4 Mi Shekeme a bua le Hamore rague, a re, ’Ntseisa moroetsana eo go na mosari." 
Genesis34:5 Mi Yakobe a utlua ha a itsekolotse Dine moroarie: mi ka bomoroaue ba le ba na le likhomu kua nageñ, Yakobe a ririmala ea tsamaea ba tla." 
Genesis34:6 Mi Hamore ra Shekeme a coela go Yakobe go bua nae. 
Genesis34:7 Mi bomoroa Yakobe ba coa mo nageñ ba sina utlua mouo; mi banona ba, ba hutsaharioa, mi ba tuka bogolu, gone o la a lotsahala mo Yesereleñ, ka go lala le moroaria Yakobe; e e sa cuanelañ go rihoa." 
Genesis34:8 Mi Hamore a bua le bona, a re, Moea oa ga Shekeme moroake o tlologeleloa moroaria lona; a ko lo mo mo nee go na mosari." 
Genesis34:9 Lo nyalane le rona, lo re nee bomoroaria lona, mi lo itsele bomoroaria rona." 
Genesis34:10 Mi lo tla ’nna le rona: mi lehatsi ye, le tla na ha pele ga lona; lo nne, lo bapale, mi lo amogele mashua mo go yeona." 
Genesis34:11 Mi Shekeme a raea ra Dine le bomoroa ’rague, A ki bone tsalano maitloñ a lona, mi se lo tla se mpole-lelañ ki tla se naea." 
Genesis34:12 Lo ka ’ntopa bogari le neo kaha lo ratañ ka gona, mi ki tla lo naea yaka lo tla mpolelela, lo ’nnee moroetsana go na mosari; ki gona gosi." 
Genesis34:13 Mi bomoroa Yakobe ba araba Shekeme le Hamore rague ka tsieco, mi ba re, (Era gone a itsekolotse Dine khantsaria bona:)" 
Genesis34:14 Mi ba ba raea, Ga re kake ra riha seo se, go naea moñue eo o sa guerisioañ khantsaria rona; gone mo, e na le khobo go rona:" 
Genesis34:15 Mi re tla rumalana le lona ka se: Ha lo ka na yaka rona, mi ha lonona lotle lo lo mo go lona lo guerisioa;" 
Genesis34:16 Ereha gona re tla lo naeañ bomoroaria rona, mi re tla itsela bomoroaria lona: mi re tla nna le lona, mi re tla na bathu bañue hela." 
Genesis34:17 Mi ha lo gana go re retsa, go guerisioa; ereha gona re tla tsaean moroaria rona, mi re tla huruga." 
Genesis34:18 Mi mahuku a bona a khatla Hamore, le Shekeme, moroa Hamore." 
Genesis34:19 Mi lekau le si ka ya riega go riha seo se: gone le khatiloe ki moroaria Yakobe; mi a le tlotlego bogolu go botle ba eintlu ea ga rague. 
Genesis34:20 ¶ Mi Hamore le Shekeme moroaue ba tla khoroñ ea motse oa bona, mi ba bua le banona ba motse oa bona, ba re," 
Genesis34:21 Banona ba, ba agisanya le rona; ki gona a ba nne mo hatsiñ ye, ba bapale mo go yeona; gone bonañ, lehatsi le ba lekanye; a re itseleñ bomoroaria bona go na basari, mi a re ba neeñ bomoroaria rona." 
Genesis34:22 Mi banona ba tla rumalana le rona go nna le rona go na bathu bañue hela ka seo se shosi; ha lonona lotle lo lo mo go rona lo guerisioa, yaka ba guerisicoe." 
Genesis34:23 Lithuo tsa bona le thoto tsa bona, le khomu tsa bona cotle a ga li kitla li na tsa rona? a re rumalaneñ le bona gosi, mi ba tla nna le rona." 
Genesis34:24 Mi botle ba ba coañ khoroñ ea motse oa gague, ba retsa Hamore le Shekeme moroaue: mi lonona lotle loa guerisioa, lotle lo lo coañ khoroñ ea motse oa gague." 
Genesis34:25 Mi ga rihala tsatsiñ ya bo teri, ka ba le tlukuhaloñ, bomoroa Yakobe ba le tu, eboñ Simeone le Leve bomoroa rague Dine, ba tsaea caka tsa bona, mi ba ea motseñ ka pelukhale, mi ba bolaea lonona lotle." 
Genesis34:26 Mi ba bolaea Hamore, le Shekeme moroaue ka boyetla yoa caka, mi ba entsa Dine mo tluñ ea ga Shekeme, mi ba coa gona." 
Genesis34:27 Bomoroa Yakobe ba tla go ba ba khemethoañ, mi ba thopa motse, ka gone ba le ba itsekolola khantsaria bona." 
Genesis34:28 Mi ba gapa liñku tsa bona, le khomu tsa bona, le esela tsa bona, le cotle tse li li le mo motseñ, le cotle tse li li le mo nageñ." 
Genesis34:29 Ba thopa le lohumo lotle loa bona; mi banyana botle ba bona, le basari ba bona ba ba cuara; mi ba thopa cotle tse li li le mo matluñ." 
Genesis34:30 ¶ Mi Yakobe a raea Simeone le Leve, Lo ’mphuruile go ’nnkhisa seboru mo banniñ ba hatsi ye, mo go Bakanana le Baperesa: mi ka ki le monye mo paloñ, ba tla ’mphuthegela ba ’mpolaea, mi ki tla señoa, ’na, le eintlu ea me." 
Genesis34:31 Mi ba re, A o ko a rihela khantsaria rona yaka seaka?" 
Genesis35:1 MI Morimo oa raea Yakobe, Nanoga, hurugela kua Bete‐ela, mi u nne gona; mi u rihele Morimo aletara gona, o o gu ipontsitseñ mogañ ka u tsaba hatlogo sa ga Esaue mogoluü." 
Genesis35:2 Mi Yakobe a raea ba eintlu ea gague, le botle ba ba nañ nae, Tlosañ merimo ea seeñ mo go lona, mi lo iitsekise, mi hetolañ aparo tsa lona:" 
Genesis35:3 Mi a re nanogeñ, re hurugeleñ kua Bete‐ela, mi ki tla rihela Morimo aletara gona, o o ’nkarabileñ tsatsiñ ya tlalelo ea me, mi o lo o na le ’na mo tseleñ e ki le ka tla ka eona." 
Genesis35:4 Mi ba naea Yakobe merimo ea seeñ eotle e ba le ba na naeo, le manyena a tsebe a bona a a la le tsebeñ tsa bona; mi Yakobe a e hitla tlatse ga tlare sa moterebenta se se leñ ha go Shekema." 
Genesis35:5 Mi ba huruga: mi therego ea Morimo e le le mo metseñ e e mo tikologoñ ea bona, mi ba si ka ba khonatelela bomoroa Yakobe." 
Genesis35:6 ¶ Mi yalo Yakobe a hitla go Lusa, (o e leñ Bete‐ela) o e leñ mo hatsiñ ya Kanana, ena le bathu botle ba ba nañ nae." 
Genesis35:7 Mi a agela aletara gona, mi a bitsa helo hoñ Ele‐bete‐ela: gone Morimo o lo oa iponatsa go ena gona, ka a tsaba hatlogo sa ga mogoluue." 
Genesis35:8 ¶ Mi Debore moamusi oa ga Rebeke a shua, mi a hitloa tlatse ga Bete‐ela, tlatse ga tlare sa moöka: mi leina ya shona ya birioa Alona‐bakuta." 
Genesis35:9 ¶ Mi Morimo oa ba oa iponatsa go Yakobe, ka a coa Padan‐arama, mi oa mo tsegahatsa." 
Genesis35:10 Mi Morimo oa mo raea, Leina ya gago ki Yakobe: leina ya gago ga le kitla le tlola le birioa Yakobe, mi leina ya gago le tla na Yeserele: mi oa bitsa leina ya gague Yeserele." 
Genesis35:11 Mi Morimo oa mo raea, Kina Morimo Mothatietle: ata, mi u intsihale; merahe le leshomo ya merahe le tla coa go uena, mi likhosi li tla coa mañkopeñ a gago:" 
Genesis35:12 Mi lehatsi ye, ki le ka le naea Aberahame le Yitsake, ki tla le gu naea; mi lehatsi ye ki tla le naea losika loa gago hularoñ sa gago." 
Genesis35:13 Mi Morimo oa tlatloga go coa go ena, heloñ ha o lo oa bua nae gona." 
Genesis35:14 Mi Yakobe a tloma pilara heloñ ha o lo oa bua nae gona, eboñ pilara ea leincue, mi a thela cupelo ea nōo mo go eona, mi a thela loukuane mo go eona." 
Genesis35:15 Mi Yakobe a bitsa leina ya helo ha Morimo o lo oa bua nae gona, Bete‐ela." 
Genesis35:16 ¶ Mi ba huruga ba coa Bete‐ela; mi gabo gole sebakanyana go hitla go Eferata; mi Rakele a belega, mi a na le pelego e e thata:" 
Genesis35:17 Mi ga rihala ka a le pelegoñ e e thata, melegisi a mo raea, U si boihe; gone le gona mosimane eo, u tla mona." 
Genesis35:18 Mi ga rihala ka moea oa gague o coa, (gone a shua,) a bitsa leina ya gague Ben‐oni: mi rague, a mitsa Benyamine." 
Genesis35:19 Mi Rakele a shua, mi a hitloa ha tseleñ e eañ Eferata, o e leñ Betelehema." 
Genesis35:20 Mi Yakobe a tloma pilara gorimo ga phupu ea gague: ki eona pilara ea phupu ea ga Rakele le ka yenu. 
Genesis35:21 Mi Yeserele a eta, mi a tsarolola tenta ea gague kua pele ga turio ea Edara." 
Genesis35:22 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka Yeserele a nna mo hatsiñ ye, Rubene a ea a lala le Bilehe, mogariñuana oa ga rague: mi Yeserele a utlua. — Mi bomoroa Yakobe ba le ba le tueleve:" 
Genesis35:23 Bomoroa Lie; e le le Rubene oa burure oa ga Yakobe, le Simeone, le Leve, le Yude, Yisakare, le Sebulone:" 
Genesis35:24 Bomoroa Rakele; e le le Yosefe, le Benyamine:" 
Genesis35:25 Mi bomoroa Bilehe, lelata ya ga Rakele; e le le Dane, le Nafetale:" 
Genesis35:26 Mi Bomoroa Silepe, lelata ya ga Lie; e le le Gade, le Ashere. Bauo ki bomoroa Yakobe, ba o la ba tsala kua Padan‐arama." 
Genesis35:27 ¶ Mi Yakobe a tla go Yitsake rague kua Mamera, kua motseñ oa Areba, o e leñ Heberona, kua Aberahame le Yitsake ba le ba tlolatlola gona." 
Genesis35:28 Mi malatsi a ga Yitsake e le le nyaga li hundereda le eite. 
Genesis35:29 Mi Yitsake a gonoga, a shua, mi a phutheloa bathuñ ba gague, a le mocohe, a tletse malatsi: mi Esaue le Yakobe bomoroaue ba mo hitla." 
Genesis36:1 MI yana, tse ki litsika tsa ga Esaue, eo e leñ Edome." 
Genesis36:2 Esaue a tsaea basari ba gague ba bomoroarie Kanana; eboñ Ade moroaria Eloe Mohita, le Aholibame moroaria Ane, moroaria Tsibeone Moheva." 
Genesis36:3 Le Basheme moroaria Ishemaele, khantsaria Nebayote." 
Genesis36:4 Mi Ade a tsala le Esaue Elifase; mi Basheme a tsala nae Reuele. 
Genesis36:5 Mi Aholibame a tsala Yeushe, le Yalame, le Korahe: bauo ki bomoroa Esaue, ba o la ba tsala mo hatsiñ ya Kanana." 
Genesis36:6 ¶ Mi Esaue a tsaea basari ba gague, le bomoroaue, le bomoroarie, le bathu botle ba eintlu ea gague, le lithuo tsa gague, le likhomu tsa gague cotle, le lithoto tsa gague cotle, tse o la li bapala mo hatsiñ ya Kanana; mi a ea hatsiñ le sele, a coa ha pele ga Yakobe." 
Genesis36:7 Gone lohumo loa bona lo le logolu bogolu go nna mogo; mi lehatsi ya boeñ yoa bona ya bo le sa ba lekana ka ntla ea lithuo tsa bona. 
Genesis36:8 Esaue a nna yalo mo thabeñ ea Seira. Esaue ki Edome. 
Genesis36:9 ¶ Mi tse ki litsika tsa ga Esaue ra Baedoma mo thabeñ ea Seira. 
Genesis36:10 Ua ki maina a bomoroa Esaue; eboñ Elifase moroa Ade mogatsa Esaue, le Reuele moroa Basheme mogatsa Esaue." 
Genesis36:11 Mi bomoroa Elifase e le le Temane, le Omare, le Tsefoe, le Gatame, le Kenase." 
Genesis36:12 Mi Timene e le le mogariñuana oa ga Elifase moroa Esaue; mi a tsala le Elifase Ameleke; bauo e le le bomoroa Ade, mogatsa Esaue." 
Genesis36:13 Mi ba ki bomoroa Reuele, eboñ Nahate, le Serahe, le Shame, le Mise; bauo e le le bomoroa Bashemate mogatsa Esaue." 
Genesis36:14 Mi ba e le le bomoroa Aholibame, moroaria Ane, moroaria Tsibeone, mogatsa Esaue: mi a tsala le Esaue Yeushe, le Yalame, le Korahe." 
Genesis36:15 ¶ Ba ki likhosana tsa bomoroa Esaue: bomoroa Elifase oa burure oa ga Esaue; e le le Temane khosana, le Omare khosana, le Tsefoe khosana, le Kenase khosana." 
Genesis36:16 Le Korahe khosana, le Gatame khosana, le Ameleke khosana: tseuo ki likhosana tsa ga Elifase mo hatsiñ ya Edoma: bauo e le le bomoroa Ade." 
Genesis36:17 Mi ba ki bomoroa Reuele moroa Esaue; eboñ Nahate khosana, le Sere khosana, le Shame khosana, le Mise khosana: bauo ki likhosana tsa ga Reuele mo hatsiñ ya Edoma; bauo ki bomoroa Basheme mogatsa Esaue." 
Genesis36:18 Mi ba ki bomoroa Aholibame mogatsa Esaue; eboñ Yeushe khosana, le Yalame khosana, le Korahe khosana; bauo ki likhosana tsa ga Aholibame moroaria Ane, mogatsa Esaue." 
Genesis36:19 Bauo ki bomoroa Esaue, eo e leñ Edome, mi bauo ki likhosana tsa bona." 
Genesis36:20 ¶ Ba ki bomoroa Seire Mohora, ba ba le ba nna mo hatsiñ ye; eboñ Lotane, le Shobale, le Tsibeone, le Ane." 
Genesis36:21 Le Dishone, le Etsere, le Dishane: bauo ki likhosana tsa Bahora, bana ba ga Seire mo hatsiñ ya Edoma," 
Genesis36:22 Mi bana ba ga Lotane e le le Hore, le Hemane; mi khantsaria Lotane e le le Timene." 
Genesis36:23 Mi bana ba ga Shobale, e le le ba; eboñ Alevane, le Manahate, le Ebale, le Sefoe, le Oname." 
Genesis36:24 Mi ba ki bana ba ga Tsibeone; eboñ Aye, le Ane; Ane eo ki ena eo o la bona limule mo bogareñganaga, ka a hurisa liesela tsa ga Tsibeone rague." 
Genesis36:25 Mi ba ki bana ba ga Ane; Dishone, le Aholibame moroaria Ane." 
Genesis36:26 Mi ba ki bana ba ga Dishone; eboñ Hemedane, le Eshebane, le Iterane, le Kerane." 
Genesis36:27 Bana ba ga Esere ki ba; eboñ Bilehane, le Savane, le Akane." 
Genesis36:28 Bana ba ga Dishane ki ba; eboñ, Utse, le Arane." 
Genesis36:29 Likhosana tsa Bahora ki tse; eboñ Lotane khosana, le Shobale khosana, le Tsibeone khosana, le Ane khosana," 
Genesis36:30 Le Dishone khosana, le Esere khosana, le Dishane khosana: tseuo ki likhosana tsa Bahora, mo khosaneñ tsa bona mo hatsiñ ya Seira." 
Genesis36:31 Mi tse ki likhosi tse ri tsa busa mo hatsiñ ya Edoma, pele go e si go buse khosi epe mo baneñ ba Yeserele." 
Genesis36:32 Mi Bele moroa Beore a busa mo Edoma; mi leina ya motse oa gague ya birioa Dinchaba. 
Genesis36:33 Mi Bele a shua, mi Yobabe moroa Sere oa Botsera a busa bonnoñ yoa gague." 
Genesis36:34 Mi Yobabe a shua, mi Hushame oa hatsi ya Batimana a busa bonnoñ yoa gague." 
Genesis36:35 Mi Hushame a shua, mi Hadade moroa Bedade, eo o la khemetha Midiane mo nageñ ea Moaba, a busa bonnoñ yoa gague: mi leina ya motse oa gague, e le le Avita." 
Genesis36:36 Mi Hadade a shua, mi Samele oa Masereka a busa bonnoñ yoa gague." 
Genesis36:37 Mi Samele a shua, mi Saule oa Rehobota ha molapoñ a busa bonnoñ yoa gague." 
Genesis36:38 Mi Saule a shua, mi Balehanane moroa Akebore a busa bonnoñ yoa gague." 
Genesis36:39 Mi Balehanane moroa Akebore a shua, mi Hadare a busa bonnoñ yoa gague: mi leina ya motse oa gague e le le Paua; mi leina ya ga mogatse e le le Mehetabele, moroaria Materede, moroaria Me‐sahabe." 
Genesis36:40 ¶ Mi maina ua ki a likhosana tsa ga Esaue, kaha tsikeñ tsa cona, le kaha maheloñ a cona, ka maina a cona; eboñ Timene khosana, le Aleve khosana, le Yetete khosana," 
Genesis36:41 Le Aholibame khosana, le Ele khosana, le Pinone khosana," 
Genesis36:42 Le Kenase khosana, le Temane khosana, le Mibetsare khosana," 
Genesis36:43 Le Magadiele khosana, le Irame khosana: bauo ki likhosana tsa ga Edoma, kaha maagoñ a cona, mo hatsiñ ya boshua yoa bona; ki ena Esaue ra Baedoma." 
Genesis37:1 MI Yakobe a nna mo hatsiñ ye rague o la le moeñ go yeona, hatsiñ ya Kanana." 
Genesis37:2 Tse ki cona litihahalo tse ga Yakobe. Yosefe ka a le linyaga li seventen, a bo a risa lecomane le bomogoluue; mi lekau ya bo le na le bomoroa Bilehe, le bomoroa Selepe bomogatsa rague: mi Yosefe a lere puleri e e boshula kaga bona go rague." 
Genesis37:3 Mi yana Yeserele a bo a rata Yosefe bogolu go bana ba gague botle, gone e le le ñuana oa bocohe yoa gague: mi a mo rihela kobo e e mebala mentsi." 
Genesis37:4 Mi eare bomogoluue ba bona ha rabo a mo rata bogolu go bomogoluue botle, ba mo ila; mi ba sa kake ba bua nae ka kagisho." 
Genesis37:5 ¶ Mi Yosefe a lora toro, mi a e bulelela bomogoluue: mi ba mo ila segolu bogolu." 
Genesis37:6 Mi a ba raea, A ko lo utlue toro e, e ki e lorileñ:" 
Genesis37:7 Mi bonañ, re le re boha liñata gare ga leota, mi bonañ ñata ea me ea nanoga, mi le gona ea ema ea siama; mi bonañ, liñata tsa lona tsa rikanyetsa, mi tsa ikobela ñata ea me." 
Genesis37:8 Mi bomogoluue ba mo raea, A u tla re busa rre? khotsa a u tla na le pusho rure go rona? mi ba mo ila bogolu bogolu ka eintla ea toro tsa gague, le mahuku a gague." 
Genesis37:9 ¶ Mi a hela a lora toro e eñue, mi a e kakanyetsa bomogoluue, mi a re, Bonañ, gape ki lorile toro e eñue, mi bonañ, letsatsi, le khueri, le linaleri li eleven li tsa ’nkobela." 
Genesis37:10 Mi eare a e bulelela rague le bomogoluue, rague a muela, mi a mo raea, Toro e u e lorileñ ki eñ? ’Na, le mago, le bomogoluü a re tla tla rure re ikobela hatsi ha pele ga gago?" 
Genesis37:11 Mi bomogoluue ba mo golegela, mi rague a tsegetsa huku ye." 
Genesis37:12 ¶ Mi bomogoluue ba ea go hurisa lecomane ya ga rabo kua Shekema. 
Genesis37:13 Mi Yeserele a raea Yosefe, A bomogoluü ga ba hurise lecomane kua Shekema? eintlo, mi ki tla gu romela go bona. Mi a mo raea, Ki hanu." 
Genesis37:14 Mi a mo raea, A ko u ee u bone ha bomogoluü ba sa siame, le lecomane ha le sa siame; mi u bo u ’nteretse lehuku. Mi a mo roma a coa mogorogoroñ oa Heberona, mi a hitla kua Shekema." 
Genesis37:15 ¶ Mi monona moñue a mona, mi bonañ, a bo a timela mo nageñ; mi monona eo a motsa a re, U batlañ?" 
Genesis37:16 Mi a re, Ki batla boñkholule: a ko u ’mpulelele kua ba hurisañ gona." 
Genesis37:17 Mi monona a re, Ba hurugile monu; gone ki ba utuile, ba re, A re eeñ kua Dotana. Mi Yosefe a latela bomogoluue, mi a ba hitlela kua Dotana." 
Genesis37:18 Mi eare ba mona a sa le khakala, pele a e si a ba atamele, ba mo logela mano go molaea." 
Genesis37:19 Mi ba rana moñue le eo moñue, Bonañ, molori eo mogolu o etla." 
Genesis37:20 Mi yana a re eeñ, re molaee, mi re mo rigele mo mokoleñ moñue, mi re tla re, Sebatana señue se mo yele; mi re tla bona kaha toro tsa gague li tla nañ ka gona." 
Genesis37:21 Mi Rubene a utlua yeuo, mi a mo golola mo atleñ tsa bona, mi a re, A re si molaeeñ." 
Genesis37:22 Gape Rubene a ba raea, Lo si culole mari, mi lo mo rigele mo mokoleñ o, o o leñ bogareñganaga, mi lo si mo otlolele atla sepe; gore a mo golole atleñ tsa bona, gore a mo rebolele rague." 
Genesis37:23 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka Yosefe a sina hitla go bomogoluue, ba apo’a Yosefe kobo ea gague, kobo e e mebala mentsi e o la na naeo;" 
Genesis37:24 Mi ba mo tsaea, ba mo rigela mo mokoleñ: mi mokole oa bo o sina sepe, ga bo go sina metse mo go ona." 
Genesis37:25 Morago ga mouo ba lula ba ya liyo: mi ba culetsa maitlo a bona, mi ba señka, mi bonañ, leshomo ya Baishemaela ya bo le eta le coa kua Gileada, le likamela tsa yeona, tse ri belegeñ tse ri eñkhañ monate, le balem, le mera, ba ea ba li isa Egepeto." 
Genesis37:26 Mi Yude a raea bomoroa rague, Temohalo e tla nañ, ha re bolaea monna rona, mi re bitiela mari a gague?" 
Genesis37:27 A re mapatseñ mo go Baishemaela, mi a atla tsa rona li si ne go ena; gone ki monna rona, le nama ea rona. Mi bomoroa rague ba utlua." 
Genesis37:28 Mi yana eare bareki ba Bamedia ba heta, ba goga, mi ba entsa Yosefe mo mokoleñ, mi ba bapatsa Yosefe go Baishemaela ba, ka liselevera li le tuente: mi ba, ba isa Yosefe kua Egepeto." 
Genesis37:29 ¶ Mi eare Rubene a boela mokoleñ; bonañ, Yosefe a bo a sieo mo mokoleñ; mi a gagola liaparo tsa gague." 
Genesis37:30 Mi a boela kua go bomonnaue, mi a re, Lekau ga leëo, mi ’na, ki tla ea kae?" 
Genesis37:31 ¶ Mi ba tsaea kobo ea ga Yosefe, mi ba tlaba potsane, mi ba ina kobo mo mariñ." 
Genesis37:32 Mi ba isa kobo e e mebala mentsi, mi ba e lere go rabo; mi ba re, E re e bonye, mi yana itse ha e le kobo ea ga moroau, khotsa nya." 
Genesis37:33 Mi a e itse, mi a re, Ki kobo ea ga moroake; o yeloe ki sebatana; Yosefe o gagogancoe rure." 
Genesis37:34 Mi Yakobe a gagola liaparo tsa gague, mi a baea letsela ya khetse mo mañkopeñ a gague, mi a lelela moroaue ka malatsi a le mantsi." 
Genesis37:35 Mi bomoroaue botle, le bomoroarie botle ba nanoga go mo gomotsa, mi a gana go gomorioa: mi a re, Gone ki tla hologela go moroake mo lecueñ ka khutsahalelo; mi rague a mo lelela yalo." 
Genesis37:36 ¶ Mi Bamedia ba mapatsa mo Egepeto, go Potifare mogoluane oa ga Faroe, mogolu oa batlabani ba ba risañ." 
Genesis38:1 MI ga rihala motleñ ouo Yude a huruga go bomoroa rague, mi a hapogela mononeñ oa Adulama, eo leina ya gague e le le Hire." 
Genesis38:2 MI Yude a bona moroaria Mokanana moñue gona, eo leina ya gague e le le Shuë; mi a mo tsaea, mi a ea mo go ena." 
Genesis38:3 Mi a ithuala, a bona mosimane, Yude a mo sha leina ya Ere." 
Genesis38:4 Mi a ba a ithuala, a bona mosimane, mi a mo sha leina ya Onane." 
Genesis38:5 Mi a hela a ba a ithuala a bona mosimane, mi a mo sha leina ya Shele: mi Yude o la le kua Kesiba ka a mona." 
Genesis38:6 ¶ Mi Yude a tseisa Ere oa burure oa gague mosari, eo leina ya gague e le le Tamare." 
Genesis38:7 Mi Ere, oa burure oa ga Yude, o la le boikepo ha pele ga maitlo a ga Yehova; mi Yehova a molaea." 
Genesis38:8 Mi Yude a raea Onane, U ee mo go mogatsa mogoluü, u mo nyale, mi u cosetse moguluü losika." 
Genesis38:9 Mi Onane, a itse ha losika lo si kitla lo na loa gague, mi ga rihala ka a ea mo go mogatsa mogoluue, a o culolela ha hatsi, gore a si cosetse mogoluue losika." 
Genesis38:10 Mi se o la se riha e le le boshula maitloñ a ga Yehova; ki gona le ena a molaea. 
Genesis38:11 Ereha gona Yude o raeañ Tamare, Na botlolagari mo tluñ ea ga rago e tsamaea Shele moroake a gole; gone a re, Gore e si re khotsa eo le ena a shua, yaka bomogoluue. Mi Tamare a ea a nna mo tluñ ea ga rague." 
Genesis38:12 ¶ Mi malatsi mantsi a sina heta moroaria Shuë, mogatsa Yude, a shua; mi Yude a gomorioa, mi a ea kua batlo-biñ liñku ba gague, go Timenata, ena le Hire, Moadulama, tsala ea gague." 
Genesis38:13 Mi Tamare a buleleloa, ga tua, Bona, matsalago o ea Timenata go tloba liñku tsa gague." 
Genesis38:14 Mi a ikapola aparo tsa botlolagari yoa gague, mi a ipipa ka setsiro, mi a iphutha, mi a lula ha khoroñ ea Enaima e e mo tseleñ e eañ Timenata; gone a bona ha Shele a gorile, mi a sa mo neoe go na ’mosari." 
Genesis38:15 Erile Yude a mona, a itloma e le seaka, ka gone a ipipile sehatlogo sa gague." 
Genesis38:16 Mi a coa tseleñ a hapogela go ena, mi a re, A ko, me ki tle mo go uena; (gone a sa itse ha e le ñuetsi oa gague.) Mi a re, U tla ’nnaeañ gore u tle mo go ’na?" 
Genesis38:17 Mi a re, Ki tla gu romela ka potsane oa lihutsane. Mi a re, A u tla ’mpela señue u tla u tsamaea u e tlisa?" 
Genesis38:18 Mi a re, Ki tla gu belañ? Mi a re, Sekanelo sa gago, le tlouana loa gago, le tsama e e mo atleñ sa gago. Mi a li mo nela, mi a ea mo go ena, mi a ithuarisioa ki ena." 
Genesis38:19 Mi Tamare a nanoga a ea, mi a apola setsiro sa gague, mi a ikapesa aparo tsa botlolagari yoa gague." 
Genesis38:20 Mi Yude a isa potsane ka atla sa Moadulama tsala ea gague, go cula pelo mo atleñ sa mosari: mi a si ka a mona." 
Genesis38:21 Mi a botsa banona ba helo hoñ, a re, Sepepe se kae, se se le se le mo Enaima ha tseleñ? Mi ba re, Gole go sina sepepe heloñ hanu." 
Genesis38:22 Mi a boela go Yude, mi a re, Ga ’nka ka mona: le bona banona ba helo hoñ, ba re, Gole go sina sepepe heloñ hanu." 
Genesis38:23 Mi Yude a re, A a li rue, gore e si be khotsa ra nyatsega: bona, ki isitse potsane e, mi ga ua ka ua mona." 
Genesis38:24 ¶ Mi ga rihala ekane e le morago ga khueri li teri, Yude a buleleloa, ga tua, Tamare ñuetsi oa gago o akahetse; mi le gona, bona, o ithuele ka kakahalo. Mi Yude a re, Mo entsetse eintle, mi a a hisioe." 
Genesis38:25 Erile a entserioa eintle, a romela go matsalague, a re, Ki ithuarisicoe ki muñ oa lilo tse; mi a re, A ko u lemoge lilo tse tsa ga mañ, eboñ sekanelo, le lotlouana, le tsama." 
Genesis38:26 Mi Yude a li itse, mi a re, O tsiamo bololu go ’na; ka gone ki si ka ka mo naea Shele moroake. Mi a si ka a tlola a mo itse." 
Genesis38:27 ¶ Mi ga rihala motla oa pelego ea gague o sina tla, bonañ, mahatla a la le mo sepopeloñ sa gague." 
Genesis38:28 Mi ga rihala ka a belega, moñue a entsetsa eintle seatla; mi melegisi a moha seatla ka tlale ea sekarelata, a re, Eo, o rule pele." 
Genesis38:29 Mi ga rihala ka a gonyetsa atla sa gague, bonañ, moroa rague a coa; mi melegisi a re, U thobetseñ? Thobo e, e go uena; ki gona leina ya gague le ya birioa Paretse." 
Genesis38:30 Mi ga coa moroa rague morago, eo o nañ le tlale ea sekarelata mo atleñ sa gague: mi leina ya gague ya birioa Sare." 
Genesis39:1 MI Yosefe a isioa kua Egepeto; mi Potifare mogoluane oa ga Faroe, eboñ mogolu oa batlabani ba ba risañ, Moegepeto, a mo reka atleñ tsa Baishemaela, ba ba mo isitseñ gona." 
Genesis39:2 Mi Yehova a bo a na le Yosefe, mi eabo e le monona oa letlogonolo; mi a bo a le mo tluñ ea Moegepeto muñuague." 
Genesis39:3 Mi eare muñuague a bona ha Yehova a na nae, mi ka Yehova a tsegahatsa cotle tse o li rihañ ka atla sa gague;" 
Genesis39:4 Yalo Yosefe a bona tsalano maitloñ a gague, mi a mo rihela: mi a mo laorisa eintlu ea gague, le cotle tse o nañ naco a li mo tsenya seatleñ." 
Genesis39:5 Mi ga rihala ga motla o la a mo laorisa eintlu ea gague, le cotle tse o nañ naco, Yehova a tsegahatsa eintlu ea Moegepeto ka eintla ea ga Yosefe, E, tsegahaco ea ga Yehova ea na mo go cotle tse o nañ naco mo tluñ ea gague, le tse ri kua nageñ." 
Genesis39:6 Mi a lesa cotle tse o nañ naco mo atleñ sa ga Yosefe; mi a sa itse sepe sa tse o nañ naco, ha e si liyo tse o li yañ cosi. Mi Yosefe a bo a le mele moiñtle, mi a le sehatlogo seiñtle." 
Genesis39:7 ¶ Mi ga rihala morago ga lilo tse, mogatsa muñoague a tlabetsa Yosefe ka maitlo a gague, mi a re, Lala le ’na." 
Genesis39:8 Mi a gana, mi a raea mogatsa muñoague, Bona, muñoake ga a itse se se nañ le ’na mo tluñ, mi cotle tse o nañ naco o li ’ntsentse seatleñ." 
Genesis39:9 Ga go ope eo mogolu go ’na mo tluñ e, mi ga a thibe sepe go ’na, ha e si uena, gone u mogatse: ana ’nka riha boleo yo bogolu yo yañ, ka go leohela Morimo?" 
Genesis39:10 Mi ga rihala ka a bua le Yosefe ka malatsi go tlomagana, mi ka ena a sa mo retse go lala nae, khotsa go na nae." 
Genesis39:11 Mi ga rihala tsatsiñ leñue Yosefe a tsena mo tluñ go riha tiho ea gague, mi gabo go si ope oa banona ba eintlu mo teñ." 
Genesis39:12 Mi a mo phamola ka seaparo sa gague, a re, Robala le ’na; mi a lesa aparo sa gague mo atleñ sa gague, mi a tsaba, a coela kua eintle." 
Genesis39:13 Mi ga rihala ka a bona a lesa aparo sa gague mo atleñ sa gague, mi a tsabetse kua eintle," 
Genesis39:14 Hoñ a bitsa banona ba eintlu ea gague, mi a bua nabo, a re, Bonañ, o lerile Mohebera go rona, go re shotla; o la tlile go ’na go lala le ’na, mi ki le ka bitsa ka koru e kholu;" 
Genesis39:15 Mi ga rihala ka a utlua ki culetsa koru ea me, ki bitsa, a tlogela aparo sa gague ha go ’na, a tsaba, a coela kua eintle." 
Genesis39:16 Mi a buluka seaparo sa gague ga tsamaea muñoague a tla gae. 
Genesis39:17 Mi a bua nae kaha mahukuñ ua, a re, Motlañka oa Sehebera, eo u mo lerileñ go rona, o la tla go ’na go ’ncotla;" 
Genesis39:18 Mi ga rihala ka ki culetsa koru ea me ki bitsa, a tlogela aparo sa gague go ’na, mi a tsabela kua eintle." 
Genesis39:19 Mi ga rihala ka muñoague a utlua mahuku a mosari oa gague o a mulelelañ, a re, Motlañka oa gago o ’ntihile kaha mahukuñ ua, bogale yoa gague yoa tuka." 
Genesis39:20 Mi muñoague Yosefe a mo tsaea, mi a mo tsenya mo tluñ ea kholegelo, heloñ ha bagolegoi ba khosi ba golegeloañ gona; mi a na gona mo tluñ ea kholegelo." 
Genesis39:21 Mo Yehova a bo a na le Yosefe, mi a mo shupetsa pelunomi, mi a mo naea botsalano mo maitloñ a muluki eintlu ea kholegelo." 
Genesis39:22 Mi muluki eintlu ea kholegelo a nela bagolegoi ba ba mo tluñ ea kholegelo mo atleñ sa ga Yosefe; mi cotle tse ba li rihañ gona ea na ena morihi. 
Genesis39:23 Mi muluki eintlu ea kholegelo a bo a sa lebe sepe se se mo atleñ sa ga Yosefe, gone eabo Yehova a na nae, mi se o se rihañ Yehova a se tsegahatsa." 
Genesis40:1 MI ga rihala morago ga lilo tseuo, motheleri oa khosi ea Egepeto le moapei ba leohela muñ oa bona, khosi ea Egepeto." 
Genesis40:2 Mi Faroe a yayaregela bagoluane ba gague ba tu, eboñ motheleri eo mogolu le moapei eo mogolu." 
Genesis40:3 Mi a ba tsenya pulukeloñ, mo tluñ ea eo mogolu oa batlabani ba ba risañ, mo tluñ ea kholegelo, kua Yosefe o golegecoeñ gona." 
Genesis40:4 Mi eo mogolu oa batlabani ba ba risañ, a ba nela tishoñ ea ga Yosefe, mi a ba rihela: mi ba na malatsi mañue mo pulukeloñ." 
Genesis40:5 Mi ba lora toro, bo tu yoa bona, moñue le moñue a lora toro ea gague sigoñ bo le boñue, moñue le moñue kaha phuthololoñ ea toro ea gague; eboñ motheleri le moapei oa khosi ea Egepeto, ba ba le ba golegiloe mo tluñ ea kholegelo." 
Genesis40:6 Mi Yosefe a tla go bona mo moshoñ, mi a ba leba, mi bonañ, ba tlontse."
