2Kings15:30 Mi Hoshe moroa Ele a golaganela Peke moroa Remalie, a mo daea, a molaea, a busa boemoñ yoa gague ka ñuaga oa bo‐tuente oa ga Yotame moroa Usie." 
2Kings15:31 Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Peke, le cotle tse o la a li riha, bonañ, li kuariloe mo bukeñ ea tihalo tsa likhosi tsa Bayeserela." 
2Kings15:32 ¶ Yotame moroa Usie khosi ea Yuda a simolola go busa ka ñuaga oa bo‐tu oa Peke moroa Remalie khosi ea Bayeserela. 
2Kings15:33 A simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tuente faeve, mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li sekesteñ. Mi leina ya mague e le le Yerushe, moroaria Tsadoke." 
2Kings15:34 Mi a thokhamisa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova: a riha kaha cotleñ tse Usie rague o la a li riha. 
2Kings15:35 Leha gontse yalo mahelo a a gorimo a bo a sa tlosioa: bathu ba bo ba sa tlabela ba hisa ensense mo maheloñ a a gorimo. A aga khoro e e gorimo ea eintlu ea ga Yehova. 
2Kings15:36 Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Yotame, le cotle tse o la a li riha, a ga lia kualoa mo bukeñ ea tihalo tsa likhosi tsa Yuda?" 
2Kings15:37 Yehova a simolola ka metla euo go romela Retsine khosi ea Siria, le Peke moroa Remalie go Yuda." 
2Kings15:38 Mi Yotame a robala le bo‐rague, mi a hitloa le bo‐rague mo motseñ oa Davide rague: mi Ahase moroaue a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
2Kings16:1 AHASE moroa Yotame khosi ea Yuda a simolola go busa ka ñuaga oa bo‐seveñten oa Peke moroa Remalie. 
2Kings16:2 Ahase a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tuente, mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li sekesten, mi a si ka a thokhamisa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova Morimo oa gague, yaka Davide rague." 
2Kings16:3 Gone a sepela mo tseleñ ea likhosi tsa Bayeserela, E, mi a ralatsa moroaue molelo, kaha maileñ a merahe, e Yehova o la a e leleka ha pele ga bana ba Yeserele." 
2Kings16:4 Mi a tlabela a hisetsa ensense mo maheloñ a a gorimo, le mo lithabaneñ, le kua tlatse ga tlare tse ri talana cotle." 
2Kings16:5 ¶ Ereha gona Retsine khosi ea Siria, le Peke moroa Remalie khosi ea Bayeserela, ba bololelañ Yerusalema go tlabana: mi ba tlasela Ahase, mi ba sa nonohe go henya." 
2Kings16:6 Retsine khosi ea Siria a bosetsa Siria Elata ka motla ouo, mi a latlela Bayuda kua eintle ga Elata: mi Basiria ba tla go Elata, mi ba nntse gona le ka yenu." 
2Kings16:7 Mi Ahase a romela baroñoi go Tigelata‐pilesere khosi ea Asiria, a re, Ki motlañka oa gago le moroau: tla, u ’nkholole mo atleñ sa khosi ea Siria, le mo atleñ sa khosi ea Bayeserela tse ri ’ncogelañ." 
2Kings16:8 Mi Ahase a tsaea selevera le gouda tse ri bonoañ mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, le mo mahumoñ a eintlu ea khosi, a li isa theleseco go khosiñ ea Asiria." 
2Kings16:9 Mi khosi ea Asiria ea mo retsa: gone khosi ea Asiria ea bololela Damaseka, ea o thopa, ea isa ba ona bacuaroi kua Kira, mi ea bolaea Retsine." 
2Kings16:10 ¶ Mi Ahase khosi a ea Damaseka go khatlana le Tigelata‐pilesere khosi ea Asiria, mi a bona aletara e e le le kua Damaseka: mi Ahase khosi a isa cuano ea aletara, le sekaelo sa eona, kaha tihoñ eotle ea eona go Uriye moperiseti." 
2Kings16:11 Mi Uriye moperiseti a aga aletara kaha cotleñ tse Ahase khosi o la a li isa kua Damaseka: yalo Uriye moperiseti a e rihela go tla ga Ahase khosi a coa Damaseka. 
2Kings16:12 Mi eare khosi e coa Damaseka, khosi ea bona aletara: mi khosi ea atamela aletara, ea hisetsa go eona." 
2Kings16:13 Mi ea hisa cupelo ea eona ea phisho, le cupelo ea eona ea liyo, ea thela cupelo ea eona ea noo, ea khatsa mari a cupelo ea eona ea kagisho mo aletareñ." 
2Kings16:14 Mi aletara ea khotlo, e e le le ha pele ga Yehova, ea e tlosa ha pele ga eintlu ha gare ga aletara ea eona le eintlu ea ga Yehova, ea e baea ha eintleñ ea Noreta ea aletara ea eona." 
2Kings16:15 Mi Ahase khosi a laola Uriye moperiseti, a re, Cupelo ea mosho ea phisho, le cupelo ea matsiboea ea liyo, le cupelo ea khosi ea phisho, le cupelo ea eona ea liyo, le cupelo ea phisho ea bathu botle ba lehatsi, le cupelo ea bona ea liyo, le cupelo tsa bona tsa noo, u li hisetse mo aletareñ e kholu; mi khatsa mari aotle a cupelo @a phisho, le mari aotle a tlabelo go eona: mi aletara ea khotlo e tla na go ’na go botsisa ka eona." 
2Kings16:16 Mi Uriye moperiseti a riha kaha cotleñ tse Ahase a li laotse. 
2Kings16:17 ¶ Mi Ahase khosi a khaola masinamelo a likoloana, a tlosa megopu ea tlapelo go cona, mi a pagolola leoatle mo likhomuñ tsa khotlo tse li li tlatse ga yeona, a le baea mo bopapa-toñ yoa matlapa." 
2Kings16:18 Mi loobo loa Sabata lo ba le ba lo aga mo tluñ, le botseno yo bo kua eintle yoa khosi, a li tlosetsa khosi ea Asiria mo tluñ ea ga Yehova." 
2Kings16:19 ¶ Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Ahase tse o la a li riha, a ga lia kualoa mo bukeñ ea tihalo tsa likhosi tsa Yuda?" 
2Kings16:20 Mi Ahase a robala le bo‐rague, a hitloa le bo‐rague mo motseñ oa Davide: Mi Hisikie moroaue a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
2Kings17:1 HOSHEE moroa Ele a simolola go busa Bayeserela mo Samaria ka ñuaga oa bo‐tueleve oa ga Ahase khosi ea Yuda, mi a busa ka nyaga li naene." 
2Kings17:2 Mi a shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, mi esiñ yaka khosi tsa Bayeserela tse li li pele ga gague." 
2Kings17:3 Shalemanesere khosi ea Asiria a mololela; mi Hoshee a na motlañka oa gague, mi a mo naea lineo." 
2Kings17:4 Mi khosi ea Asiria ea bona kholaganyeco go Hoshee: gone a la a romela baroñoi go Soe khosi ea Egepeto, mi a si ka a isa lineo go khosiñ ea Asiria, yaka ka ñuaga ñuaga: ki gona khosi ea Asiria e mo kopelelañ, ea mo golega mo tluñ ea kholegelo." 
2Kings17:5 Gone khosi ea Asiria ea bololela mo hatsiñ yeotle, mi ea ea go Samaria, e o tlaolelela ka nyaga li teri." 
2Kings17:6 ¶ Khosi ea Asiria ea thopa Samaria ka ñuaga oa bo‐naene oa Hoshee, ea isa Bayeserela bacuaroi kua Asiria, ea ba nnisa mo Halaka, le mo Habora ha molapoñ oa Gosana, le mo metseñ ea Bameda." 
2Kings17:7 Gone go le go rihetse, bana ba Yeserele ba leohetse Yehova Morimo oa bona, eo o la a ba entsa mo hatsiñ ya Egepeto, le mo atleñ sa ga Faroe khosi ea Egepeto, mi ba boiha merimo e sele," 
2Kings17:8 Mi ba sepela mo litaeoñ tsa merahe, e Yehova o la a e tlosa ha pele ga bana ba Yeserele, le tsa likhosi tsa Bayeserela tse ba le ba li riha." 
2Kings17:9 Mi bana ba Yeserele ba le ba bipa lilo tse ba li siamololelañ Yehova Morimo oa bona, mi ba ikagela mahelo a a gorimo mo metseñ eotle ea bona, go simolola ka turio ea barisi le go motse o o hemecoeñ." 
2Kings17:10 Mi ba le ba ikemisetsa licuanco tse ri thokhameñ le likhuana mo thabeñ cotle tse ri gorileñ, le kua tlatse ga tlare tse ri talana cotle:" 
2Kings17:11 Mi koñ ba le ba hisetsa ensense mo maheloñ a a gorimo aotle, yaka merahe e Yehova o la a e tlosa ha pele ga bona, mi ba le ba riha lilo tsa boshula ba gakatsa Yehova:" 
2Kings17:12 Gone ba le ba rihela licuanco tsa merimo, tse Yehova o la a li ba rela, Si riheñ seo se." 
2Kings17:13 Erile Yehova a itsise Bayeserela le Bayuda, ka baperiseti botle, le balebi botle, a re, Shukologañ mo tseleñ tsa lona tsa boshula, mi lo tsegetse taolo tsa me, le litaeo tsa me, kaha molaoñ otle o ki le ka o laolela bo‐rra enu, o ki le ka o romela go lona ka baperofeti batlañka ba me." 
2Kings17:14 Leha gontse yalo, ba si ka ba retsa, mi ba thatahatsa thamo tsa bona, yaka thamo tsa bo‐rabo, ba ba le ba sa rumela Yehova Morimo oa bona." 
2Kings17:15 Mi ba latla litaeo tsa gague, le kholagano ea gague e o la a e riha le bo‐rabo, le licupo tsa gague tse o la a li shupa kaga bona; mi ba latela boithamako, ba thamakahala, ba latela merahe e e le le tikologoñ ea bona, e Yehova o la a e ba laolela, gore ba si rihe yaka eona." 
2Kings17:16 Mi ba le ba tlogela taolo cotle tsa ga Yehova Morimo oa bona, ba itihela licuanco tse ri thecoeñ, eboñ linamane li tu, mi ba riha likhuana, ba obamela entua ea legorimo eotle, mi ba rihela Baale." 
2Kings17:17 Mi ba ralatsa bomoroa bona le bomoroaria bona mo moleloñ, mi ba riha boitseyoanape, ba riha mereo, mi ba ipapatsa go shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova go mo gakatsa." 
2Kings17:18 Ki gona Yehova o galehelañ Bayeserela segolu, a ba tlosa mo hatlogoñ sa gague: ga bo go sa sala ope ha e si loco loa Yude losi." 
2Kings17:19 Le Bayuda ba si ka ba tsegetsa taolo tsa ga Yehova Morimo oa bona, mi ba sepela mo litaeoñ tsa Bayeserela tse ba le ba li riha." 
2Kings17:20 Mi Yehova a latla losika lotle loa Bayeserela, a ba katisa, a ba tsenya mo atleñ tsa bathopi, ea tsamaea a ba latla mo hatlogoñ sa gague." 
2Kings17:21 Gone a gagola Bayeserela go ba eintlu ea ga Davide; mi ba riha Yeroboame moroa Nebate khosi: mi Yeroboame a phaila Bayeserela gore ba si inele Yehova, a ba leohisa seleo se segolu." 
2Kings17:22 Gone bana ba Yeserele ba sepela mo maleoñ a ga Yeroboame aotle ua o la a a riha; ba si ka ba a hapoga; 
2Kings17:23 Ea tsamaea Yehova a tlosa Bayeserela mo hatlogoñ sa gague, yaka a la a bua ka baperofeti batlañka ba gague botle. Yalo Bayeserela ba isioa Asiria bacuaroi ba coa mo hatsiñ ya bona le ka yenu." 
2Kings17:24 ¶ Mi khosi ea Asiria ea tlisa bathu kua Babelona, le kua Kuta, le kua Ava, le kua Hamata, le kua Sefarevaima, ea ba nnisa mo metseñ ea Samaria boemoñ yoa bana ba Yeserele: mi ba rua Samaria ba nna mo metseñ ea yeona." 
2Kings17:25 Mi ga rihala ka ba simolola go nna gona, ba si ka ba boiha Yehova: mi Yehova a tlisa litau go bona, tse ri tsa bolaea bañue ba bona." 
2Kings17:26 Ki gona ba buañ le khosi ea Asiria, ba re, Merahe e u e tlositseñ, u e nnisitse mo metseñ ea Samaria, ga e itse mokhua oa morimo oa lehatsi ye: ki gona o tlisitseñ litau go eona, mi bona, lia e bolaea, gone e sa itse mokhua oa morimo oa lehatsi." 
2Kings17:27 Ereha gona khosi ea Asiria e laolañ, ea re, Isañ moñue oa baperiseti gona ba lo ba entsitseñ gona; mi a a ee a nne gona, mi a a ba rute mokhua oa morimo oa lehatsi." 
2Kings17:28 Mi moñue oa baperiseti ba ba entsicoeñ Samaria a ea a nna kua Beta‐ela, a ba ruta kaha ba ka boihañ Yehova ka gona." 
2Kings17:29 Leha gontse yalo, morahe moñue le moñue oa riha morimo oa ona, o o baea mo matluñ a mahelo a a gorimo, a Basamaria ba le ba a riha, morahe moñue le moñue mo motseñ oa ona o o nntseñ go ona." 
2Kings17:30 Mi banona ba Babelona ba riha Sukota‐benote, mi banona ba Kuta ba riha Neregale, mi banona ba Hamata ba riha Ashime." 
2Kings17:31 Mi Baava ba riha Nibehase le Taretake, mi Basefarevaima ba hisetsa Aderameleke le Anameleke, merimo ea Sefarevaima bana ba bona ka molelo." 
2Kings17:32 Le gona ba boiha Yehova, mi ba itihela baperiseti ba mahelo a a gorimo ka ba ba sa kaioeñ ba bona, ba ba ba bakanyetsañ mo matluñ a mahelo a a gorimo." 
2Kings17:33 Ba boiha Yehova, le merimo ea bona ba e rihela, kaha mokhueñ oa merahe e ba le ba entsicoe go eona." 
2Kings17:34 Ba riha le ka yenu kaha mekhueñ ea eintla: ga ba boihe Yehova, mi ga ba rihe kaha litaeoñ, le kaha litsiamishoñ, le kaha molaoñ le taolo, tse Yehova o la a li laolela bana ba Yakobe, eo o mo sheleñ leina ya Yeserele:" 
2Kings17:35 Ba Yehova o la a riha kholagano le bona, a ba laola, a re, Si boiheñ merimo e sele, le esiñ go e ikobela, le esiñ go e rihela, le esiñ go e tlabela;" 
2Kings17:36 Mi Yehova eo o lo entsitseñ mo hatsiñ ya Egepeto ka nonoho e kholu, le ka cogo ye le otlologileñ, boihañ ena, le ena lo mo obamele, le ena lo mo tlabele." 
2Kings17:37 Mi litaeo, le litsiamisho, le molao, le taolo, tse o la a li lo kualela, lo li tlokomele go li riha ka gale; mi si boiheñ merimo e sele." 
2Kings17:38 Mi kholagano e ki e rihileñ le lona, lo si e lebale; mi si boiheñ merimo e sele." 
2Kings17:39 Mi lo boihe Yehova Morimo oa lona: mi o tla lo golola mo atleñ tsa baba ba lona botle. 
2Kings17:40 Leha gontse yalo ba si ka ba retsa, mi ba riha kaha mokhueñ oa bona oa eintla." 
2Kings17:41 Mi ba merahe e ba boiha Yehova, mi ba rihela licuanco tse ri setiloeñ tsa bona; E, le bana ba bona, le bana ba bana ba bona, ba riha yake bo‐rabo le ka yenu." 
2Kings18:1 MI ga rihala Hisikie moroa Ahase khosi ea Yuda a simolola go busa ka ñuaga oa bo‐teri oa Hoshee moroa Ele khosi ea Bayeserela. 
2Kings18:2 A simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tuente faeve; mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li tuente naene. Mi leina ya mague e le le Abe, moroaria Sakarie." 
2Kings18:3 Mi a thokhamisa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, kaha cotleñ tse Davide rague o la a li riha." 
2Kings18:4 ¶ A tlosa mahelo a a gorimo, a thuba licuanco tse ri thokhameñ, a rema likhuana, a thubaganya noga ea khotlo e Moshe o la a e riha; gone bana ba Yeserele ba le ba e hisetsa ensense le go metleñ euo. Mi a e sha leina ya Nehushetana." 
2Kings18:5 A ikanya Yehova Morimo oa Bayeserela; mi ga bo go si ope eo o cuanañ nae morago ga gague mo khosiñ cotle tsa Yuda, le esiñ ope pele ga gague." 
2Kings18:6 Mi a ñaparela Yehova, mi a sa hapoge go mo sala morago, mi a tsegetsa taolo tsa gague, tse Yehova o la a li laolela Moshe." 
2Kings18:7 Mi Yehova a bo a na nae; mi a tsegahala gotle kua o bololelañ gona: mi a cuülolela khosi ea Asiria, mi a sa e rihele." 
2Kings18:8 A khemetha Bafiliseta le go ea kua Gasa, le meleloane ea ona, go simolola ka turio ea barisi le go motseñ o o hemecoeñ." 
2Kings18:9 ¶ Mi ga rihala Shalemanesere khosi ea Asiria a bololela Samaria, a o tlaolelela, ka ñuaga oa bo‐for oa Hisikie khosi, o e leñ ñuaga oa bo‐seven oa Hoshee moroa Ele khosi ea Bayeserela." 
2Kings18:10 Mi ba o thopa mo khutloñ sa nyaga li teri: E, Samaria o lo oa thopioa ka ñuaga oa bo‐sekes oa ga Hisikie, o e leñ ñuaga oa bo‐naene oa ga Hoshee khosi ea Bayeserela." 
2Kings18:11 Mi khosi ea Asiria ea isa Bayeserela go Asiria bacuaroi, ea ba nnisa kua Hala le Habora ha molapoñ oa Gosana, le mo metseñ ea Bameda:" 
2Kings18:12 Ka gone ba si ka ba akela koru ea ga Yehova Morimo oa bona, ba tlorile kholagano ea gague, le cotle tse Moshe motlañka oa Yehova o la a li laola, ba sa li akele, le esiñ go li riha." 
2Kings18:13 ¶ Mi Sanekeribe khosi ea Asiria a bololela metse e e hemecoeñ ea Yuda eotle, a e thopa ka ñuaga oa bo‐forten oa ga Hisikie khosi." 
2Kings18:14 Mi Hisikie khosi ea Yuda a romela go khosiñ ea Asiria kua Lakisha, a re, Ki leohile; boea go ’na: se u se ’mpelesañ ki tla se belega. Mi khosi ea Asiria ea lopa litalenta li teri hundereda tsa selevera, le litalenta li terete tsa gouda go Hisikie khosi ea Yuda." 
2Kings18:15 Mi Hisikie a mo naea selevera se se bonoañ mo tluñ ea ga Yehova shotle, le mo mahumoñ a eintlu ea khosi." 
2Kings18:16 Hisikie a manolola gouda mo meyakoñ ea tempela ea ga Yehova ka motla ouo, le mo pilareñ tse Hisikie khosi ea Yuda o la a li manega, a e naea khosi ea Asiria." 
2Kings18:17 Mi khosi ea Asiria ea roma Taretane, le Rabesarise le Rabeshake go Hisikie khosi ba coa Lakisha ka entua e kholu go ea Yerusalema. Mi ba bolola ba hitla Yerusalema. Mi eare ba sina bolola ba hitla, ba ema ha tseleñ ea metse ea lekariba ye le kua gorimo, ha tseleñ e kholu ea naga ea motlacui." 
2Kings18:18 Mi ba biletsa go khosiñ, mi ga coela go bona Eliakime motlameri eintlu, moroa Hileke, le Shebene mokuari, le Yoahe mokualeri bogosi moroa Asafe." 
2Kings18:19 Mi Rabeshake a ba raea, A ko lo bulelele Hisikie; lo re, Khosi e kholu, khosi ea Asiria e bua yalo, Boikanyo yo ki bohe, yo u bo ikanyañ?" 
2Kings18:20 Ua re, (mi ki puo hela,) Go sale khakololo le bonatla go tlabana; u ikantse mañ yana, ka u ’ncuuloletse?" 
2Kings18:21 Bona yana, u ikantse seikokotlelo se sa lotlaka lo lo phitsegileñ, eboñ Egepeto, se, ha moñue a se ikaega se tla tsena mo atleñ sa gague, se se tlaba: Faroe khosi ea Egepeto ontse yalo go botle ba ba mo ikanyañ." 
2Kings18:22 Mi ere lo tla ’nthaea, Re ikanya Yehova Morimo oa rona; a ga si ena, eo Hisikie o tlositseñ mahelo a a gorimo a gague, le lialetara tsa gague, mi a raea Bayuda le Bayerusalema, Lo obamele ha pele ga aletara e e mo Yerusalema?" 
2Kings18:23 Mi yana a ko u nelele muñoake khosi ea Asiria lipelo, mi ki tla gu naea lipitse li tu thousanda ha u ka ipatlela bapalami go li palama." 
2Kings18:24 Mi u ko u bosetsañ hatlogo sa moñue oa balaori eo motlana bogolu oa batlañka ba muñoake, u ikanyetsa Egepeto licariota le bapalami?" 
2Kings18:25 Yana, a ki bololetse lehatsi ye go le senya ki sina le Yehova? Yehova o ’ntheile, Bololela lehatsi ye, u le senye." 
2Kings18:26 Ereha gona Eliakime moroa Hilekie, le Shebene, le Yoahe, ba raeañ Rabeshake, ba re, A ko u bue le batlañka benu ka Sesiria, gone re se utlua: mi si bue le rona ka Seyuda mo tsebeñ tsa bathu ba, ba ba mo lorakoñ." 
2Kings18:27 Mi Rabeshake a ba raea, A muñoake o ’nthometse go muñoago le uena, go bua mahuku ua? a e le e si le go banoneñ ba ba rutseñ ha lorakoñ, gore ba ye masepa a bona, le go noa motlapo oa bona le lona?" 
2Kings18:28 Mi Rabeshake a ema a thomeletsa ka koru e kholu ka Seyuda, mi a bua a re, Utluañ mahuku a khosi e kholu, khosi ea Asiria:" 
2Kings18:29 Go bua khosi yalo, ea re, A Hisikie a si lo tsietse; gone a retelecoe go lo golola mo atleñ sa eona." 
2Kings18:30 Mi a Hisikie a si lo ikanyise Yehova, a re, Yehova o tla re gololela rure; mi motse o ga o kitla o tseñoa mo atleñ sa khosi ea Asiria." 
2Kings18:31 Si retseñ Hisikie: gone go bua yalo khosi ea Asiria, Rihañ le ’na kagisho, mi lo coele go ’na, mi lo ye moñue le moñue loa movina oa gague, le moñue le moñue loa mofeige oa gague, mi lo noe moñue le moñue ga metse a seriba sa gague:" 
2Kings18:32 Ki tsamaee ki tle go lo isa kua hatsiñ ye le cuanañ le lehatsi ya lona, hatsi ya liyo le boyaloa, lehatsi ya mabele a señkhue, le masimo a mevina, lehatsi ya metluare, le ya loukuane, le ya linotse, gore lo tsele, lo si shue: mi si retseñ Hisikie, gone oa lo tlotleletsa, a re, Yehova o tla re golola." 
2Kings18:33 A moñue oa merimo ea merahe o gololetse hatsi ya ona rure mo atleñ sa khosi ea Asiria? 
2Kings18:34 E kae merimo ea Hamata, le Arepada? e kae merimo ea Sefarevaima, le ea Hena, le ea Ava? a e golotse Samaria mo atleñ sa me?" 
2Kings18:35 Ki ehe mo merimoñ eotle ea mahatsi ua, e e golotseñ hatsi ya eona mo atleñ sa me, ha Yehova a ka golola Yerusalema mo atleñ sa me?" 
2Kings18:36 Mi bathu ba ririmala, mi ba si ka ba mo araba ka huku lepe: gone taolo ea khosi e le le e, Lo si mo arabe." 
2Kings18:37 Mi Eliakime motlameri eintlu, moroa Hilekie, le Shebene mokuari, le Yoahe mokualeri bogosi moroa Asefe, ba tla go Hisikie ka liaparo tsa ma-phaga, mi ba mulelela mahuku a ga Rabeshake." 
2Kings19:1 MI ga rihala Hisikie khosi a sina utlua, a gagola aparo tsa gague, a ikapesa tsela ya khetse, a ea mo tluñ ea ga Yehova." 
2Kings19:2 A romela Yesaye moperofeti moroa Amotse, Eliakime motlameri eintlu, le Shebene mokuari, le bagolu ba baperiseti, ba apere matsela a likhetse." 
2Kings19:3 Mi ba mo raea, Go bua yalo Hisikie, a re, tsatsi yenu ki tsatsi ya tlalelo, le khalemelo, le khalo: gone lithoroana li kukunya, mi nonoho ea go tsala e sieo." 
2Kings19:4 Kampo Yehova Morimo oa gago o tla utlua mahuku aotle a ga Rabeshake, eo khosi ea Asiria muñoague e mo romileñ go khoba Morimo o o tserileñ, o khalemela mahuku, ua Yehova Morimo oa gago o a utluileñ: ki gona culeletsa masalela a a setseñ morapelo." 
2Kings19:5 Mi batlañka ba Hisikie khosi ba ea go Yesaye. 
2Kings19:6 ¶ Mi Yesaye a ba raea, Lo ree muñ oa lona yalo, Go bua yalo Yehova, Si boihe mahuku a u a utluileñ, ua basimane ba khosi ea Asiria ba ’nkharileñ ka aona." 
2Kings19:7 Bona, ki tla e tsenya moea o sele, mi e tla utlua tumo, mi e tla boela kua hatsiñ ya eona; mi ki tla e osa ka caka mo hatsiñ ya eona." 
2Kings19:8 ¶ Erile Rabeshake a sina boea, a hitlela khosi ea Asiria e tlasela Libena: gone a la a utlua e tlogetse Lakisha." 
2Kings19:9 Mi ka e utlua ga Tirehake, khosi ea Etiopia, go tua, Bona, o bolola go tlabana le uena: ea hela e romela baroñoi go Hisikie, e re," 
2Kings19:10 Lo bue le Hisikie khosi ea Yuda yalo, lo re, A Morimo oa gago o u o ikantseñ o si gu tsietse, o re, Yerusalema ga o kitla o neloa mo atleñ sa khosi ea Asiria." 
2Kings19:11 Bona, u utluile kaha likhosi tsa Asiria li rihetseñ mahatsi aotle ka gona, li a senyeritse rure: mi uena a u tla gololoa?" 
2Kings19:12 A merimo ea merahe e bo‐rre ba e sentseñ e le ea e golola: eboñ Gosana, le Harana, le Retesefa, le bana ba Edena, ba ba mo Telasareñ?" 
2Kings19:13 E kae khosi ea Hamata, le khosi ea Arepada, le khosi ea motse oa Sefarevaima, le ea Hena, le ea Iva?" 
2Kings19:14 ¶ Mi Hisikie a cula liepisetole mo atleñ tsa baroñoi, a li buisa: mi Hisikie a ea mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, a li menololela ha pele ga Yehova." 
2Kings19:15 Mi Hisikie a rapela ha pele ga Yehova, a re, Yehova Morimo oa Bayeserela, eo o lutseñ ha gare ga likeruba, uena, u Morimo, uena uesi, oa magosi aotle a lehatsi; u rihile legorimo le lehatsi." 
2Kings19:16 Yehova, sekega tsebe ea gago, u utlue: Yehova, burulola maitlo a gago, mi bona: mi utlua mahuku a ga Sanekeribe, eo o mo rometseñ go khoba Morimo o o tserileñ." 
2Kings19:17 Rure, Yehova, likhosi tsa Asiria li khakhabaritse merahe, le mahatsi a eona," 
2Kings19:18 Mi li latletse mo moleloñ merimo ea eona: ka e si merimo, mi e le le logoñ, tiho tsa atla tsa bathu: ki gona li e herisitseñ." 
2Kings19:19 Mi yana Yehova, Morimo oa rona, rea gu rapela, u re golole mo atleñ sa gague, gore magosi aotle a lehatsi a itse ha u le Yehova Morimo, u le uesi." 
2Kings19:20 ¶ Ereha gona Yesaye moroa Amotse o romañ go Hisikie, a re, Go bua yalo Yehova Morimo oa Bayeserela, Ere ka u ’nthapetse kaga Sanekeribe khosi ea Asiria, ki gu utluile." 
2Kings19:21 Huku ye ki yeona ye Yehova o le buileñ kaga gague: Moroaria Tsiona oa lekharebe oa gu nyatsa, a gu shotla; moroaria Yerusalema oa gu thukhuthela tlogo." 
2Kings19:22 U khobile u kharile mañ? u tlatlositse koru, le maitlo a gago u a culeletsa mañ gorimo? eboñ Moitsephi oa Bayeserela." 
2Kings19:23 U khobile Yehova ka baroñoi ba gago, mi u reile, Ki tlatlogetse mo tloreñ tsa lithaba, le mo liphatleñ tsa Lebanona ka bontsi yoa cariota tsa me, ka rema mesedara ea eona e e gorileñ, le mefira ea eona e e itseñkecoeñ: mi ki tla hitlela borobalo yoa bokhutlo yoa eona, le sekhua se se seiñtle bogolu sa eona." 
2Kings19:24 Ka epa ka noa metse a seeñ, mi ki tla cisa kelelo cotle tsa Egepeto ka sebete sa nao tsa me." 
2Kings19:25 A ga ua ka ua utlua, ha ki sibolo bakanya seuo, ka se thaea mo metleñ ea bogolugolu? mi yana kia se rihahatsa, ha u ko u hetola metse e e hemecoeñ mekoa ea lirobego." 
2Kings19:26 Ki gona banni ba eona ba nono-hologañ ba siloharioa: ba tlayoa ki litlon, ba cuana le boyañ yoa naga, le loreme lo lo talana, yaka boyañ mo tlomeshoñ, le mabele a a cubiloeñ a esi a thube." 
2Kings19:27 Mi tulo ea gago, le pololo ea gago, le khorogo ea gago, kia go itse, le yayarego ea gago ha go ’na." 
2Kings19:28 Ka gone yayarego ea gago le bokaka yoa gago li tlatlogetse mo tsebeñ tsa me, ki tla tsenya kobe ea me mo eñkoñ ea gago, le mogala oa me mo pounameñ tsa gago, ki gu bosa mo tseleñ e u tlileñ ka eona." 
2Kings19:29 Mi se, se tla na cupo go uena, Go tla yeoa se se imerisañ mo ñuageñ onu, le se se tlogañ go shona mo ñuageñ oa bo‐tu: mi yalañ mo ñuageñ oa bo‐teri, lo robe, mi tlomañ masimo a mevine, lo ye louñuo loa aona." 
2Kings19:30 Mi ba ba pherileñ ba ba setseñ ba ba eintlu ea Yude, ba tla hela ba namela mecoe tlatse, mi ba tla uñuela louñuo gorimo." 
2Kings19:31 Gone go tla coa Yerusalema masalela, le ba ba pherileñ mo thabeñ ea Tsiona; lehuha ya ga Yehova oa lintua le tla riha yalo." 
2Kings19:32 Ki gona go buañ yalo Yehova kaga khosi ea Asiria, Ga e kitla e tsena mo motseñ o, le esiñ go hulela mocui go ona, ga e kitla e tla ha pele ga ona ka thebe, le esiñ go o epela mosele." 
2Kings19:33 E tla boea ka tsela e, e le ea tla ka eona, mi ga e kitla e tsena mo motseñ o, go bua Yehova." 
2Kings19:34 Gone ki tla hemela motse o, go o golola ka eintla ea me, le ka eintla ea ga Davide motlañka oa me." 
2Kings19:35 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka sigo youo, moengela oa ga Yehova a coela a khemetha ba uan hundereda thousanda le eite faeve mo botlaoleloñ yoa Baasiria: mi erile ba phakela mo moshoñ bonañ, ea bo e le lirepa tse ri shuleñ botle." 
2Kings19:36 Mi Sanekeribe khosi ea Asiria, a tloga a ea a boea, a nna kua Neneve." 
2Kings19:37 Mi ga rihala ka a obamela mo tluñ ea Niseroke morimo oa gague, Aderameleke le Sharetsere bomoroaue ba molaea ka caka: mi ba phelela kua hatsiñ ya Ararata. Mi Esarehadone moroaue a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
2Kings20:1 HISIKIE a bo a bobolela mo khonogoñ metleñ euo. Mi Yesaye moperofeti moroa Amotse a ea go ena, a mo raea, Go bua yalo Yehova, Bakanya eintlu ea gago: gone u tla shua, u sa tsele." 
2Kings20:2 Ereha gona o garimisetsañ hatlogo sa gague mo lomoteñ, a rapela Yehova, a re," 
2Kings20:3 Au Yehova! kia gu rapela, gakologeloa kaha ki sepetseñ ka gona ha pele ga gago ka boamarure, le ka pelu e e itekanetseñ, ka lemohatsa mo maitloñ a gago. Mi Hisikie a lela segolu." 
2Kings20:4 Mi ga rihala eare Yesaye a e si a coele mo loloapeñ lo lo ha gare, lehuku ya ga Yehova ya mo rihalela, ya re," 
2Kings20:5 Boea, u ree Hisikie mokaeri oa bathu ba me, Go bua yalo Yehova Morimo oa ga Davide rago, Ki utluile morapelo oa gago, ki bonye keleri tsa gago: bona ki tla gu horisa: mi u tla ea kua tluñ ea ga Yehova ka tsatsi ya bo‐teri." 
2Kings20:6 Mi ki tla okeletsa malatsi a gago nyaga li faeveten: mi ki tla gu golola le motse o mo atleñ sa khosi ea Asiria; mi ki tla hemela motse o ka eintla ea me, le ka eintla ea ga Davida motlañka oa me." 
2Kings20:7 Mi Yesaye a re, Tsaeañ moñoloi oa lifeige. Mi ba o tsaea ba o baea mo seshoñ, mi a hola." 
2Kings20:8 ¶ Mi Hisikie a raea Yesaye, Seshupo ki sehe ha Yehova o tla ’mphorisa, le gona ha ki tla ea kua tluñ ea ga Yehova ka tsatsi ya boteri?" 
2Kings20:9 Mi Yesaye a re, Se ki seshupo go uena se se coañ go Yehova, ha Yehova o tla riha lehuku ye o le buileñ: a moroti o tla ea pele lioura li ten, khotsa a o tla boela morago lioura li ten?" 
2Kings20:10 Mi Hisikie a re, Ki se se botlana mo morotiñ go hologa lioura li ten: nya, a moroti o boele morago lioura li ten." 
2Kings20:11 Mi Yesaye moperofeti a biletsa go Yehova: mi a bosetsa moroti lioura li ten morago, mo lioureñ tse o hologetseñ ka cona, mo dialeñ ea Ahase." 
2Kings20:12 ¶ Bero‐daka‐baladane, moroa Baladane, khosi ea Babelona, a romela Hisikie liepisetole le theleseco mo motleñ ouo, gone a la a utlua ha Hisikie a la a bobola." 
2Kings20:13 Mi Hisikie a ba retsa, a ba shupetsa eintlu eotle ea lohumo loa gague, selevera, le gouda le lilo tsa loñko, le loukuane lo lo rategañ, le eintlu eotle ea libolao tsa gague: le cotle tse ri bonoañ mo mahumoñ a gague: gole go si sepe mo tluñ ea gague le mo pushoñ eotle ea gague se Hisikie o sa se ba bontsañ." 
2Kings20:14 ¶ Ereha gona go eañ Yesaye moperofeti go Hisikie khosi, a mo raea, Banona ba, ba reileñ? mi ba gu tletse kae? Mi Hisikie a re, Ba tsile ba coa mo hatsiñ ye le khakala, kua Babelona." 
2Kings20:15 Mi a re, Ba bonyeñ mo tluñ ea gago? Mi Hisikie a re, Ba bonye cotle tse ri mo tluñ ea me: ga go sepe mo mahumoñ a me se ki sa se ba bontsañ." 
2Kings20:16 Ereha gona Yesaye o raeañ Hisikie, Utlua lehuku ya ga Yehova." 
2Kings20:17 Bona, metla e etla mogañ cotle tse ri mo tluñ ea gago, le tse bo‐rago ba li bulukileñ le mo nakoñ enu, li tla belegeloa Babelona: ga go sepe se se tla salañ, go bua Yehova." 
2Kings20:18 Mi bomoroau ba ba tla coañ go uena, ba u tla ba bonañ, ba tla ba tlosa; mi ba tla na likala mo palisoñ ea khosi ea Babelona." 
2Kings20:19 Mi Hisikie a raea Yesaye, Lehuku ya ga Yehova ye u le buileñ le molemo. Mi a re, A ga si, ha go na kagisho le boamarure mo malatsiñ a me?" 
2Kings20:20 Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Hisikie, le bonatla yotle yoa gague, le kaha o la a riha lekariba, le tsela ea metse, a tlisa metse mo motseñ, a ga lia kualoa mo bukeñ ea tihalo ea likhosi tsa Yuda?" 
2Kings20:21 Mi Hisikie a robala le bo‐rague: mi Manase moroaue a busa boemoñ yoa gague. 
2Kings21:1 MANASE a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tueleve, mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li faevete faeve. Mi leina ya mague e le le Hefetse‐be." 
2Kings21:2 Mi a shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, kaha maileñ a merahe, e Yehova o la a e leleka ha pele ga bana ba Yeserele." 
2Kings21:3 Gone a ba a aga mahelo a a gorimo, ua Hisikie rague o la a a herisa; mi a agela Baale lialetara, a riha sekhuana, yaka Ahabe khosi ea Bayeserela o la a riha; a obamela entua ea legorimo eotle a e rihela." 
2Kings21:4 Mi a aga lialetara mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, e Yehova o la a bua ga eona, a re, Ki tla baea leina ya me mo Yerusalema." 
2Kings21:5 Mi a agela entua ea legorimo eotle lialetara mo maloapeñ a tu a eintlu ea ga Yehova. 
2Kings21:6 Mi a ralatsa moroaue mo moleloñ, a shuaba ka maru, a riha ka mereo, mi a riha ka baloi, le baitseanape: a shulatsa segolu mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, go mo gakatsa." 
2Kings21:7 Mi secuanco se se setiloeñ sa sekhuana se o la a se riha a se baea mo tluñ e Yehova o la a e raea Davide, le Solomone moroaue, a re, Ki tla baea leina ya me mo tlun e ka bosakhutleñ, le mo Yerusalema o ki o itseñketseñ mo licoñ tsa Bayeserela cotle:" 
2Kings21:8 Mi ga ’nkitla ki tlola ki katosa linao tsa Bayeserela mo hatsiñ ye ki le neileñ bo‐rabo; ha ba tlokomela go riha kaha cotleñ tse ki li ba laoletseñ, le kaha molaoñ otle o Moshe motlañka oa me o o ba laoletseñ." 
2Kings21:9 Mi ba si ka ba retsa: mi Manase a ba timetsa go shulatsa bogolu go merahe e Yehova o la a e senya ha pele ga bana ba Yeserele. 
2Kings21:10 ¶ Mi Yehova a bua ka baperofeti batlañka ba gague; a re," 
2Kings21:11 Ere ka Manase khosi ea Yuda o rihile maila ua, a shulatsa bogolu go cotle tsa Baamora ba le ba li riha, ba ba le ba le pele ga gague, le go leohisa le bona Bayuda ka licuanco tsa merimo tsa gague:" 
2Kings21:12 Ki gona go buañ yalo Yehova Morimo oa Bayeserela, Bonañ, ki tla tlisetsa Yerusalema le Yuda boshula, yo moñue le moñue eo o bo utluañ, tsebe tsa gague co tu li tla shuma ka yona." 
2Kings21:13 Mi ki tla gagamatsa lori loa Samaria go Yerusalema, le pelumeta ea ba eintlu ea ga Ahabe: mi ki tla phimola Yerusalema yaka moñue a phimola moritsana, a o phimola a o ribega." 
2Kings21:14 Mi ki tla tlogela masalela a boshua yoa me, ki a tsenya mo atleñ tsa baba ba aona; mi a tla na khapo le thopo mo babeñ ba aona botle;" 
2Kings21:15 Gone a shulatsitse mo maitloñ a me, a ’nkhakatsa, go simolola ka tsatsi ye bo‐rra aona ba ruleñ mo hatsiñ ya Egepeto, le ka yenu." 
2Kings21:16 Le gona Manase a culola mari a a sinañ molatu a magolu bogolu, ea tsamaea a tlatsa Yerusalema go simolola ka khutlo señue go ea go se señue; bogolu go boleo yoa gague yo o la a bo leohisa Bayuda, ka go shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova." 
2Kings21:17 ¶ Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Manase, le cotle tse o la a li riha, le boleo yoa gague yo a bo leohileñ, a ga lia kualoa mo bukeñ ea tihalo tsa likhosi tsa Yuda?" 
2Kings21:18 Mi Manase a robala le bo‐rague, mi a hitloa mo tsimoñ ea eintlu ea gague, eboñ tsimo ea Use: mi Amone moroaue a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
2Kings21:19 ¶ Amone a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tuente tu, mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li tu. Mi leina ya mague e le le Meshulemete moroaria Harutse oa Yoteba." 
2Kings21:20 Mi a shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, yaka Manase rague a la a riha." 
2Kings21:21 Mi a sepela mo tseleñ eotle e rague o la a sepela go eona, a rihela cuanco tsa merimo tse rague a la a li rihela a li obamela:" 
2Kings21:22 Mi a latla Yehova Morimo oa bo‐rague, a sa sepele mo tseleñ ea ga Yehova." 
2Kings21:23 Mi batlañka ba ga Amone ba mo golaganela, ba bolaea khosi mo tluñ ea eona." 
2Kings21:24 Mi bathu ba lehatsi ba khemetha ba ba golaganetseñ Amone khosi botle; mi bathu ba lehatsi ba riha Yosie moroaue khosi boemoñ yoa gague. 
2Kings21:25 Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Amone tse o la a li riha, a ga lia kualoa mo bukeñ ea tihalo tsa likhosi tsa Yuda?" 
2Kings21:26 Mi a hitloa mo phupuñ ea gague, mo tsimoñ ea Use: mi Yosie moroaue a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
2Kings22:1 YOSIE a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li eit, mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li terete uan. Mi leina ya mague e le le Yedide, moroaria Adaie oa Botsekata." 
2Kings22:2 Mi a thokhamisa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, a sepela mo tseleñ ea Davide rague eotle, mi a sa hapogele go atleñ se se siameñ khotsa go sa molema." 
2Kings22:3 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka ñuaga oa bo‐eiten oa Yosie khosi, khosi ea roma Shafane mokuari, moroa Atsalie, moroa Meshulame kua tluñ ea ga Yehova, ea re," 
2Kings22:4 Ea go Hilekie moperiseti eo mogolu, gore a bale selevera se se isicoeñ mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, se barisi ba moyako ba se phuthileñ mo bathuñ:" 
2Kings22:5 Mi a ba se tsenye mo atleñ tsa ba ba rihañ tiho, ba ba laolecoeñ eintlu ea ga Yehova: gore ba se nee ba ba rihañ tiho e e mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, go mamatlelela khagogo tsa eintlu." 
2Kings22:6 Eboñ go babetli ba likhoñ, le baagi, le baagi ba limota, go reka likhoñ le maye a a betliloeñ go mamatlelela eintlu." 
2Kings22:7 Leha gontse yalo, ga bo go sina palo ea mari a a tseñoañ mo atleñ tsa bona, gone ba riha ka boikaño." 
2Kings22:8 ¶ Mi Hilekie moperiseti eo mogolu, a raea Shafane mokuari, ki bonye buka ea molao mo tluñ ea ga Yehova. Mi Hilekie a naea Shafane buka, mi a e buisa." 
2Kings22:9 Mi Shafane mokuari a ea kua khosiñ, a isa lehuku go khosiñ, a re, Batlañka benu ba phuthile mari a a bonoañ mo tluñ, ra a tsenya mo atleñ tsa bona ba ba rihañ tiho, ba ba laolecoeñ eintlu eo ga Yehova." 
2Kings22:10 Mi Shafane mokuari a bulelela khosi, a re, Hilekie moperiseti o ’nneile buka. Mi Shafane a e buisa ha pele ga khosi." 
2Kings22:11 Mi ga rihala, eare khosi e utlua mahuku a buka ea molao, ea gagola aparo tsa eona." 
2Kings22:12 Mi khosi ea laola Hilekie moperiseti, le Ahikame moroa Shafane le Akebore moroa Mikaye, le Shafane mokuari, le Asahie motlañka oa khosi, ea re," 
2Kings22:13 Eañ, lo ’mpoletse, le bathu, le Bayuda botle Yehova, kaga mahuku a buka e, e e bonyoeñ: gone bogale yoa ga Yehova yo bo re tuketseñ bogolu, gone bo‐rra ecu ba si ka ba retsa makuku a buka e, go riha kaha cotleñ tse re ri kualecoeñ." 
2Kings22:14 Mi Hilekie moperiseti, le Ahikame, le Akebore, le Shafane, le Asahie, ba ea go Hulede moperofeti oa sesari, mosari oa Shalume muluki oa liaparo, moroa Tikeve, moroa Harehase; (mi Hulede a nntse mo Yerusalema mo khaoloñ ea bo‐tu;) mi ba bua nae." 
2Kings22:15 ¶ Mi a ba raea, Go bua yalo Yehova Morimo oa Bayeserela, Raeañ monona eo o lo ’nthometseñ," 
2Kings22:16 Go bua yalo Yehova, Bona, ki tla tlisetsa helo ha boshula, le mo banniñ ba gona, eboñ mahuku aotle a buka e khosi ea Yuda e e buisitseñ:" 
2Kings22:17 Gone ba ’ntatlile, ba hisetsa go merimoñ e sele ensense, gore ba ’nkhakatse ka tiho cotle tsa atla tsa bona; ki gona bogale bo tla tukiseri-oañ helo ha, mi bo si kitla bo tiñoa." 
2Kings22:18 Mi khosi ea Yuda e e lo romileñ go botsa Yehova, lo bue yalo le eona, Go bua yalo Yehova Morimo oa Bayeserela, Kaga mahuku ua u a utluileñ;" 
2Kings22:19 Ere ka pelu ea gago e nolaharioa, u ikatisitse ha pele ga Yehova, u sina utlua se ki se buetseñ helo ha, le banni ba gona, ki re, Ba tla na tsenyego, le thogo, u gagotse aparo tsa gago, u lerile ha pele ga me; le ’na ki gu utluile, go bua Yehova." 
2Kings22:20 Ki gona, bona, ki tla gu phuthela go bo‐rago, mi u tla phutheloa go phupuñ ea gago ka kagisho; mi maitlo a gago a si kitla a bona sepe sa boshula yo ki tla bo tlisetsañ helo ha. Mi ba isa lehuku kua khosiñ." 
2Kings23:1 MI khosi ea roma, mi bagolu botle ba Yuda le ba Yerusalema ba e phuthegela." 
2Kings23:2 Mi khosi ea ea kua tluñ ea ga Yehova, le banona ba Yuda botle le banni ba Yerusalema botle naeo, le baperise ti, le baperofeti, le bathu botle banye le bagolu: mi ea buisa mahuku aotle a buka ea kholagano mo tsebeñ tsa bona e e le ea bonoa mo tluñ ea ga Yehova." 
2Kings23:3 Mi khosi ea ema ha pilareñ, ea riha kholagano ha pele ga Yehova, go inela Yehova, le go tsegetsa taolo tsa gague, le licupo tsa gague, le litaeo tsa gague, ka pelu eotle le ka moea otle, go tlomamisa mahuku a kholagano e, a a kuariloeñ mo bukeñ e. Mi bathu ba rumalana le kholagano botle." 
2Kings23:4 ¶ Mi khosi ea laola Hilekie moperiseti eo mogolu, le baperiseti ba phapano ea bo‐tu, le barisi ba moyako go entsa lilo cotle tse ri tsa riheloa Baale, secuanco sa sekhuana, le entua ea legorimo eotle mo tempeleñ ea ga Yehova: mi ea li hisetsa kua eintle ga Yerusalema mo nageñ tsa Kederona, ea belesetsa Betaela lorole loa cona." 
2Kings23:5 Mi ea khutlisa baperiseti ba cuanco tsa merimo, ba khosi tsa Bayuda li tsa ba laolela go hisetsa ensense mo maheloñ a a gorimo mo metseñ ea Yuda le tikologoñ ea Yerusalema; le bona ba ba hisetsañ Baale ensense, le letsatsi, le khueri, le lipelanata, le entua ea legorimo eotle." 
2Kings23:6 Mi ea entsetsa eintle ga Yerusalema secuanco sa merimo sa sekhuana mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, ea se isa kua molacoaneñ oa Kederona, ea se hisa ha molacoaneñ oa Kederona, ea se nota go na lorole, mi ea latlela lorole loa shona mo liphupuñ tsa bana ba bathu." 
2Kings23:7 Mi a rutla matlu a Basodoma, a a ha tluñ ea ga Yehova, ha basari ba nyedelañ secuanco sa merimo sa sekhuana lilepelelo." 
2Kings23:8 Mi ea entsa baperiseti botle mo metseñ ea Yuda, ea itsekolola mahelo a a gorimo ha baperiseti ba le ba hisa ensense gona, go simolola ka Geba go ea Bera‐sheba, ea rutla mahelo a a gorimo a likhoro a a mo mokayoñ oa khoro ea ga Yehoshue molaori oa motse, a a la le ha atleñ sa molema sa moñue eo o tsenañ mo khoroñ ea motse." 
2Kings23:9 Mi baperiseti ba mahelo a a gorimo ba si ka ba ea go aletareñ ea Yehova mo Yerusalema, ba ya hela señkhue se se sa berisioañ mo go bo‐rra bona." 
2Kings23:10 Mi ea itsekolola Tofeta, o o leñ mo mogorogoroñ oa bana ba Hinome, gore go si ne ope eo o ralaletsañ Moleke moroaue khotsa moroarie molelo." 
2Kings23:11 Mi ea tlosa lipitse, tse khosi tsa Yuda ri tsa li naea letsatsi, tse li li ha botsenoñ yoa eintlu ea ga Yehova, ha tluñ ea kua teñ ea ga Natanameleke kala, e e le le ha lintlaneñ, ea hisa cariota tsa letsatsi ka molelo." 
2Kings23:12 Mi lialetara tse li li ha tlomeshoñ ea eintlu ea gorimo ea ga Ahase, tse khosi tsa Yuda li tsa li riha, le lialetara tse Manase o la a li riha mo maloapeñ a tu a eintlu ea ga Yehova, khosi ea li rutla, ea li goshumetsa gona, ea latlela role loa cona mo molacoaneñ oa Kederona." 
2Kings23:13 Mi khosi ea itsekolola mahelo a a gorimo a a ha pele ga Yerusalema, ha atleñ se se siameñ sa thaba ea Mashe-kita, ua Solomone khosi ea Bayeserela o la a a agela Ashetarote maila a Batsidona, le Kemoshe maila a Bamoaba, le Milekome mathamo a bana ba Amone." 
2Kings23:14 Mi ea thuba licuanco tse ri thokhameñ, ea rema likhuana, ea tlatsa maemo a cona ka marapo a bathu." 
2Kings23:15 ¶ Le eona aletara e e kua Betaela, le helo ga gorimo ha Yeroboame moroa Nebate, eo o la a leohisa Bayeserele, o la a go riha, ea rutla aletara euo le helo ga gorimo, ea hisa helo ga gorimo, ea go nota go na lorole, mi ea hisa sekhuana." 
2Kings23:16 Mi ka Yosie a retologa, a bona liphupu tse li li mo thabeñ, mi a roma, a entsa marapo mo liphupuñ, a a hisetsa ha aletareñ, a e itsekolola, kaha hukuñ ya ga Yehova ye monona oa Morimo o la a le utluatsa, eo o la a utluatsa mahuku ua." 
2Kings23:17 Mi a re, Seshupo se ki se bonañ ki sañ? Mi banona ba motse ba mulelela ba re, Ki phupu ea monona oa Morimo, eo o la a coa Yuda, a utluatsa lilo tse u li rihetseñ aletara ea Bata‐ela." 
2Kings23:18 Mi a re, Mo lese; a go si ne ope eo o huruañ marapo a gague. Mi ba lesa marapo a gague, le marapo a moperofeti eo o la a coa Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Mi Yosie a tlosa le aona matlu aotle a mahelo a a gorimo a a mo metseñ ea Samaria, ua khosi tsa Bayeserela li tsa a riha go gakatsa Yehova, a a rihela kaha tihoñ cotle tse o la a li riha kua Beta‐ela." 
2Kings23:20 Mi a bolaela baperiseti botle ba mahelo a a gorimo ba ba le ba le gona mo lialetareñ, a hisetsa marapo a bathu go cona, mi a boela Yerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 ¶ Mi khosi ea laola bathu botle ea re, Rihelañ Yehova Morimo oa lona Tlolaganyo, yaka go kuariloe mo bukeñ e ea kholagano." 
2Kings23:22 Rure ga bo go si ka ga rihoa Tlolaganyo yaka e, le ka metla ea basiamisi ba ba le ba siamisa Bayeserela, le esiñ mo metleñ eotle ea khosi tsa Bayeserela, le ea khosi tsa Yuda;" 
2Kings23:23 Mi Tlolaganyo e e le ea riheloa Yehova mo Yerusalema ka ñuaga oa bo‐eiteñ oa Yosie khosi. 
2Kings23:24 ¶ Le gona Yosie a tlosa baloi, le baitseanape, le literafa, le licuanco tsa merimo, le maila aotle a a bonoañ mo hatsiñ ya Yuda, le mo Yerusalema, gore a tlomamise mahuku a molao a a kuariloeñ mo bukeñ e Hilekie moperiseti o la a e bona mo tluñ ea ga Yehova." 
2Kings23:25 Mi go le go si khosi epe pele ga gague e e cuanañ nae, e e le ea boela go Yehova ka pelu ea eona eotle, le ka moea oa eona otle, le ka nonoho ea eona eotle, kaha molaoñ otle oa ga Moshe; le gona ga goa coga epe morago ga gague yaka ena." 
2Kings23:26 ¶ Leha gontse yalo Yehova ga a ka a boea mo bogaleñ yo bogolu yo bo hisañ yoa gague, yo bogale yoa gague yo o la a tukela Bayuda ka yona, ka eintla ea khakaco cotle tse Manase a la a mo gakatsa ka cona." 
2Kings23:27 Mi Yehova a re, Ki tla tlosa le bona Bayuda mo hatlogoñ sa me, yaka ki tlositse Bayeserela, mi ki tla latla motse o oa Yerusalema, o ki o itseñketseñ, le eintlu e ki buileñ ga eona, ka re, Leina ya me le tla na gona." 
2Kings23:28 Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Yosie, le cotle tse o la a li riha, a ga lia kualoa mo bukeñ ea tihalo tsa likhosi tsa Yuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Mi Faro‐nekoe khosi ea Egepeto a bololela khosi ea Asiria kua molapoñ oa Euferate mo malatsiñ a gague: mi Yosie khosi a mololela; mi a sina mona a molaea kua Migido. 
2Kings23:30 Mi batlañka ba mo tlisa ka cariota kua Migido a shua, ba mo isa go Yerusalema, mi a hitloa mo phupuñ ea gague. Mi bathu ba lehatsi ba tsaea Yehoahase moroa Yosie, ba mo tlotsa, ba mo riha khosi boemoñ yoa rague." 
2Kings23:31 ¶ Yehoahase a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tuente teri; mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka khueri li teri. Mi leina ya mague e le le Hamutale, moroaria Yeremie oa Libena." 
2Kings23:32 Mi a shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, kaha cotleñ tse bo‐rague ba le ba li riha." 
2Kings23:33 Mi Faro‐nekoe a mo golega kua Ribela mo hatsiñ ya Hamata, gore a si buse mo Yerusalema; mi a khethisa lehatsi litalenta tsa selevera li uan hundereda, le talenta ea gouda e le eñue." 
2Kings23:34 Mi Faro‐nekoe a riha Eliakime moroa Yosie khosi boemoñ yoa Yosie rague, mi a hetolela leina ya gague Yehoyakime; mi a cula Yehoahase; mi a hitla Egepeto, a shuela gona." 
2Kings23:35 Mi Yehoyakime a naea Faroe selevera le gouda; mi a keleka lehatsi go naea mari ua kaha molomoñ oa Faroe; a emelelela bathu ba lehatsi selevera le gouda, moñue le moñue kaha kelekoñ ea gague, go li naea Faro‐nekoe." 
2Kings23:36 ¶ Yehoyakime a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tuente faeve; mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li eleven. Mi leina ya mague e le le Sebude, moroaria Pedaye oa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Mi a shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, kaha cotleñ tse bo‐rague ba le ba li riha." 
2Kings24:1 NEBUKADENETSARE khosi ea Babelona a bolola mo malatsiñ a gague, mi Yehoyakime a na motlañka oa gague ka nyaga li teri; mi a boea a mo cuülolela." 
2Kings24:2 Mi Yehova a mololetsa manokuane a Bakaledia, le manokuane a Basiria, le manokuane a Bamoaba, le manokuane a bana ba Amone, a a bololetsa Bayuda go ba herisa, kaha hukuñ ya ga Yehova, ye o la a le bua ka baperofeti batlañka ba gague." 
2Kings24:3 Rure, seo se sa rihalela Bayuda kaha molomoñ oa ga Yehova, go ba tlosa mo hatlogoñ sa gague, ka maleo a ga Manase, kaha cotleñ tse o la a li riha;" 
2Kings24:4 Mi le gona ka mari a a sinañ molatu ua o la a a culola; gone a la a tlatsa Yerusalema ka mari a a sinañ molatu; ki gona Yehova o ganeñ go icuarela. 
2Kings24:5 Mi tihalo tse ri setseñ tsa ga Yehoyakime, le cotle tse o la a li riha, a ga lia kualoa mo bukeñ ea tihalo tsa likhosi tsa Yuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Mi Yehoyakime a robala le bo‐rague: mi Yehoyakine moroaue a busa boemoñ yoa gague. 
2Kings24:7 Mi khosi ea Egepeto e si ka ea tlola e coa mo hatsiñ ya eona: gone khosi ea Babelona e le ea tsaea cotle tsa khosi ea Egepeto, go simolola ka molapo oa Egepeto go ea kua molapoñ oa Euferate." 
2Kings24:8 ¶ Yehoyakine a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li eiteñ; mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka khueri li teri. Mi leina ya mague e le le Nehushete, moroaria Elenatane oa Yerusalema." 
2Kings24:9 Mi a shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, kaha cotleñ tse rague o la a li riha." 
2Kings24:10 Mi batlañka ba ga Nebukadenetsare khosi ea Babelona ba bololela Yerusalema mo motleñ ouo, mi motse oa tlaoleleloa." 
2Kings24:11 Mi Nebukadenetsare khosi ea Babelona a bololela motse, mi batlañka ba gague ba o tlaolelela." 
2Kings24:12 Mi Yehoyakine khosi ea Yuda a coela go khosiñ ea Babelona, ena, le mague, le batlañka ba gague, le balaori ba gague, le likala tsa gague: mi khosi ea Babelona ea mo cuara ka ñuaga oa bo‐eit oa pusho ea eona." 
2Kings24:13 Mi ea entsa mahumo aotle a eintlu ea ga Yehova gona, le mahumo a eintlu ea khosi, mi ea manolola lilo tsa gouda cotle, tse Solomone khosi ea Bayeserela o la a li riha mo tempeleñ ea ga Yehova, yaka Yehova a la a bua." 
2Kings24:14 Mi ea isa ba Yerusalema botle, le balaori botle, le ligañka tsa bonatla cotle, eboñ bacuaroi ba ten thousanda, le barihi botle le bathuri: ga bo go si ope eo o setseñ ha e si bahumanegi ba lehatsi." 
2Kings24:15 Mi ea isa Yekoyakine go Babelona, le ma khosi, le basari ba khosi, le likala tsa eona, le khosana tsa lehatsi, ea ba entsa go Yerusalema ea ba isa bacuaroi kua Babelona." 
2Kings24:16 Le banona ba bonatla, eboñ ba seven thousanda, le barihi le bathuri ba uan thousanda, le ligañka cotle tse ri tloaetseñ tlabano, bauo khosi ea Babelona ea ba isa bacuaroi kua Babelona." 
2Kings24:17 ¶ Mi khosi ea Babelona ea riha Matanie malomague khosi boemoñ yoa gague, mi ea hetolela leina ya gague Tsedekie." 
2Kings24:18 Tsedekie a simolola go busa ka a le oa nyaga li tuente uan, mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li eleven. Mi leina ya mague e le le Hamutale, moroaria Yeremie oa Libena." 
2Kings24:19 Mi a shulatsa mo maitloñ a ga Yehova, kaha cotleñ tse Yehoyakime o la a li riha." 
2Kings24:20 Gone bogale yoa ga Yehova yoa rihalela ba Yerusalema le Bayuda, ea tsamaea a ba latla mo hatlogoñ sa gague. Mi Tsedekie a cuulolela khosi ea Babelona." 
2Kings25:1 MI ga rihala Nebukadenetsare khosi ea Babelona a ea Yerusalema, ena, le entua ea gague eotle, ka ñuaga oa bo‐naen oa pusho ea gague, le ka khueri ea bo‐ten le ka tsatsi ya bo‐ten ya khueri, mi a o tlaolelela; mi ba o agela kago tsa tebelo tikologoñ." 
2Kings25:2 Mi motse oa tlaoleleloa go ea kua ñuageñ oa bo‐eleven oa ga Tsedekie khosi. 
2Kings25:3 Mi loshekeri lo lo le thata mo motseñ ka tsatsi ya bo‐naen ya khueri ea bo‐for, mi liyo tsa tlokahalela bathu ba lehatsi." 
2Kings25:4 Mi motse oa thobeseleloa, mi batlabani botle ba tsaba ka bosigo ka tsela ea khoro gare ga lithako li tu, tse ri ha tsimoñ ea khosi: (mi Bakaledia ba le ba le tikologoñ ea motse:) mi khosi ea ea ka tsela ea sekaka." 
2Kings25:5 Mi entua ea Bakaledia ea konatelela khosi, ea e hitlela mo likakeñ tsa Yeriko: mi entua eotle ea eona ea e halalela." 
2Kings25:6 Mi ba cuara khosi, ba e isa go khosiñ ea Babelona kua Ribela: mi ba siamisa ga eona." 
2Kings25:7 Mi ba bolaea bomoroa Tsedekie ka pele ga maitlo a gague, mi ba huhatsa maitlo a ga Tsedekie, ba mo golega ka mehiri ea khotlo e tu, ba mo isa kua Babelona." 
2Kings25:8 ¶ Mi ga tla Nebusar‐adane, mogolu oa bahemeri, motlañka oa khosi ea Babelona mo Yerusalema, ka khueri ea bo‐faeve, le ka tsatsi ya bo‐seven ya khueri, o e leñ ñuaga oa bo‐naenten oa Nebukadenetsare khosi, khosi ea Babelona:" 
2Kings25:9 Mi a hisa eintlu ea ga Yehova, le eintlu ea khosi, le matlu a Yerusalema aotle, mi a hisa matlu aotle a bagolu ka molelo." 
2Kings25:10 Mi entua eotle ea Bakaledia, e e le e na le mogolu oa bahemeri, ea rutla lithako tsa Yerusalema tikologoñ." 
2Kings25:11 Mi bathu ba ba setseñ ba ba le ba tlogeloa mo motseñ, le batenegi ba ba le ba tenegela go khosiñ ea Babelona, le masalela a bontsi, Nebusar‐adane mogolu oa bahemeri a ba tlosa." 
2Kings25:12 Mi mogolu oa bahemeri a tlogela ba bahumanegi ba lehatsi go na barihi mevine, le balemi." 
2Kings25:13 Mi Bakaledia ba thubaganya lipilara tsa khotlo tse li li mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, le likoloana, le leoatle ya khotlo tse li li mo tluñ ea ga Yehova, mi ba isa khotlo ea cona go Babelona." 
2Kings25:14 Mi ba tlosa lipitsa, le lishovela, le lipomo, le linco, le lilo tsa khotlo cotle tse ba le ba rihela ka cona." 
2Kings25:15 Mi mogolu oa bahemeri a tlosa maisho a molelo, le likhatseco, leha e le tsa gouda khotsa tsa selevera." 
2Kings25:16 Lipilara li tu, le leoatle le leñue, le likoloana tse Solomone o la a li rihela eintlu ea ga Yehova; khotlo ea lilo tseuo e le e sina tekanyo." 
2Kings25:17 Bogorimo yoa pilara eñue e le le likubeta li eiten, mi tlogo e e le le go eona ea khotlo: bogorimo yoa tlogo e le le likubeta li teri; mi tiho ea lotloa, le ligeranata mo tlogoñ tikologoñ, e le le tsa khotlo cotle; mi pilara ea bo‐tu e le ea na yaka tseuo, le eona tiho ea lotloa." 
2Kings25:18 ¶ Mi mogolu oa bahemeri a tsaea Seraye moperiseti eo mogolu, le Tsefanye moperiseti oa bo‐tu, le barisi ba moyako ba teri." 
2Kings25:19 Mi a entsa kala e le eñue mo motseñ, e e le ea laoleloa batlabani, le banona ba faeve ba bona ba ba le ba le ha pele ga khosi, ba ba bonoañ mo motseñ, le mokuari eo mogolu oa entua, eo o kualelañ entua bathu ba lehatsi, le banona ba sekesete ba bathu ba lehatsi ba ba bonoañ mo motseñ." 
2Kings25:20 Mi Nebusar‐adane mogolu oa bahemeri a tsaea bauo, a ba isa go khosiñ ea Babelona kua Ribela:" 
2Kings25:21 Mi khosi ea Babelona ea ba bolaea ea ba gonola kua Ribela mo hatsiñ ya Hamata. Yalo Bayuda ba tlosioa mo hatsiñ ya bona. 
2Kings25:22 ¶ Mi kaga bathu ba ba setseñ mo hatsiñ ya Yuda, ba Nebukadenetsare khosi ea Babelona o ba lesitseñ, a ba laolela Gedalie moroa Ahikame, moroa Shafane." 
2Kings25:23 Mi eare khosana tsa lintua cotle, cona le banona ba cona, li utlua ha khosi ea Babelona e le ea riha Gedalie molaorisioi, tsa ea go Gedalie kua Mitsepa, eboñ Yishemaele moroa Netanie, le Yohanane moroa Karehe, le Seraye moroa Tanehumete oa Menetofa, le Yasanie moroa Momaakate, cona le banona ba cona." 
2Kings25:24 Mi Gedalie a li ikanela le banona ba cona, a li raea, Si boiheñ go na batlañka ba Bakaledia: nnañ mo lehatsiñ, mi lo rihele khosi ea Babelona; mi lo tla lemohaleloa." 
2Kings25:25 Mi ga rihala ka khueri ea bo‐seven, Yishemaele moroa Netanie moroa Eleshame oa losika loa bogosi a tla, le banona ba ten ba na nae, ba bolaea Gedalie; mi a shua, le Bayuda le Bakaledia ba ba nañ nae kua Mitsepa." 
2Kings25:26 Mi bathu botle, banye le bagolu, le likhosana tsa lintua, ba nonoga, ba ea Egepeto: gone ba boiha Bakaledia." 
2Kings25:27 ¶ Mi ga rihala ka ñuaga o Evila‐merodake khosi ea Babelona o simololañ go busa ka ona, a culetsa tlogo ea ga Yehoyakine khosi ea Yuda mo tluñ ea kholegelo, eboñ ka ñuaga oa bo‐terete seven oa bocuaro yoa ga Yehoyakine khosi ea Yuda, le ka khueri ea bo‐tuelve, le ka tsatsi ya bo‐tuente seven ya khueri:" 
2Kings25:28 Mi a bua nae ka molemo, a baea terone ea gague gorimo ga terone tsa likhosi tse ri tsa na nae mo Babelona;" 
2Kings25:29 Mi a hetola aparo tsa gague tsa eintlu ea kholegelo: mi a ya liyo ka gale ha pele ga gague, mo malatsiñ aotle a tselo yoa gague." 
2Kings25:30 Mi moyo oa gague e le le moyo o o neoañ ki khosi ka gale, tekanyo ea tsatsi le tsatsi, mo malatsiñ aotle a botselo yoa gague." 
1Chronicles1:1 ADAME, le Sete, le Enose," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenane, le Mahalalele, le Yarede," 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoke, le Metusele, le Lameke," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noe, le Sheme, le Hame, le Yapete." 
1Chronicles1:5 ¶ Mi bomoroa Yapete, e le le Gomere, le Magoge, le Madae, le Yavane, le Tubale, le Mesheke, le Tirase." 
1Chronicles1:6 Mi bomoroa Gomere, e le le Ashekenase, le Rifate, le Togareme." 
1Chronicles1:7 Mi bomoroa Yavane, e le le Elishe, le Taresheshe, le Kitime, le Dodanime." 
1Chronicles1:8 ¶ Mi bomoroa Hame, e le le Kushe, le Metseraime, le Pute, le Kanane." 
1Chronicles1:9 Mi bomoroa Kushe, e le le Sebe, le Havile, le Sabete, le Rame, le Sabeteke. Mi bomoroa Rame, e le le Shebe, le Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:10 Mi Kushe a tsala Nimerode: eo a simolola go gañkahala mo lehatsiñ. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mi Metseraime a tsala Baluda, le Baanama, le Balehaba, le Banafetuha," 
1Chronicles1:12 Le Bapaterusa, le Baakaseluha, (ba Bafiliseta ba ruleñ go bona,) le Bakafetora." 
1Chronicles1:13 Mi Kanane a tsala Tsidone oa burure oa gague, le Hete," 
1Chronicles1:14 Le bona Bayebusa, le Baamora le Bageregasha," 
1Chronicles1:15 Le Baheva, le Baareka, le Basina," 
1Chronicles1:16 Le Baarevada, le Batsimara, le Bahamata." 
1Chronicles1:17 ¶ Bomoroa Sheme, e le le Elame, le Ashure, le Arepakesade, le Lude, le Arame, le Utse, le Hule, le Getere, le Mesheke." 
1Chronicles1:18 Mi Arepakesade a tsala Shele, mi Shele a tsala Hebere." 
1Chronicles1:19 Mi Hebere a boneloa basimane ba tu: leina ya moñue e le le Pelege; gone lehatsi le khaogancoe mo malatsiñ a gague: mi leina ya monnaue e le le Yoketane. 
1Chronicles1:20 Mi Yoketane a tsala Alemode, le Shelefe, le Hatsaremavete, le Yere," 
1Chronicles1:21 Le Hadarame, le Usale, le Dikele." 
1Chronicles1:22 Le Obale, le Abimaele, le Shebe," 
1Chronicles1:23 Le Ofire, le Havile, le Yobabe. Botle ba e le le bomoroa Yoketane." 
1Chronicles1:24 ¶ Sheme, le Arepakesade, le Shele," 
1Chronicles1:25 Hebere, le Pelege, le Reue," 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruge, le Nahore, le Tere," 
1Chronicles1:27 Aberame, eo o leñ Aberahame." 
1Chronicles1:28 Bomoroa Aberahame, e le le Yitsake, le Yishemaele." 
1Chronicles1:29 ¶ Tse ki likokomana tsa bona; oa burure oa Yishemaele e le le Nabayote; le Kedare, le Adebele, le Mibesame," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misheme, le Dume, le Mase, le Hadare, le Teme," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeture, le Nafishe, le Kedeme. Bauo ki bomoroa Yishemaele." 
1Chronicles1:32 ¶ Mi bomoroa Keture, mogariñuana oa Aberahame ki ba: a bona Simerane, le Yokeshane, le Medane, le Midiane, le Yishebake, le Shue. Mi bomoroa Yokeshane, e le le Shebe, le Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:33 Mi bomoroa Midiane, e le le Efe, le Efere, le Henoke, le Abide, le Eledahe. Botle ba e le le bomoroa Keture." 
1Chronicles1:34 Mi Aberahame a tsala Yitsake. Bomoroa Yitsake, e le le Esaue le Yeserele." 
1Chronicles1:35 ¶ Mi bomoroa Esaue, e le le Elifase, le Ruele, le Yeushe, le Yalame, le Kore." 
1Chronicles1:36 Bomoroa Elifase, e le le Temane, le Omare, le Tsefoe, le Gatame, le Kenase, le Timene, le Amaleke." 
1Chronicles1:37 Bomoroa Reuele, e le le Nahate, le Sere, le Shame, le Mise." 
1Chronicles1:38 Mi bomoroa Seire, e le le Lotane, le Shobale, le Tsibeone, le Ane, le Dishone, le Etsere, le Dishane." 
1Chronicles1:39 Mi bomoroa Lotane, e le le Hore, le Homane: mi Timene e le le khantsaria Lotane." 
1Chronicles1:40 Bomoroa Shobale, e le le Alevane, le Manahate, le Ebale, le Sefoe, le Oname. Mi bomoroa Tsibeone, e le le Aye, le Ane." 
1Chronicles1:41 Bomoroa Ane, e le le Dishone. Mi bomoroa Dishone, e le le Hemedane, le Eshebane, le Yiterane, le Kerane." 
1Chronicles1:42 Bomoroa Etsere, e le le Bilehane, le Savane, le Yakane. Bomoroa Dishane, e le le Utse, le Arane." 
1Chronicles1:43 ¶ Mi tse ki likhosi tse ri tsa busa mo hatsiñ ya Edoma pele go e si go buse khosi epe mo baneñ ba Yeserele; eboñ Bele moroa Beore: mi leina ya motse oa gague e le le Dinehaba. 
1Chronicles1:44 Mi Bele a shua, mi Yobabe moroa Sere oa Botsera a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
1Chronicles1:45 Mi Yobabe a shua, mi Hushame oa hatsi ya Batimana a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
1Chronicles1:46 Mi Hushame a shua, mi Hadade moroa Bedade, eo o la a khemetha Bamidiana mo nageñ ea Moaba, a busa boemoñ yoa gague: mi leina ya motse oa gague, e le le Avita." 
1Chronicles1:47 Mi Hadade a shua, mi Samele oa Masereka a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
1Chronicles1:48 Mi Samele a shua, mi Saule oa Rehobota ha molapoñ a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
1Chronicles1:49 Mi Saule a shua, mi Bale‐hanane moroa Akebore a busa boemoñ yoa gague." 
1Chronicles1:50 Mi Bale‐hanane a shua, mi Hadare a busa boemoñ yoa gague: mi leina ya motse oa gague e le le Paua; mi leina ya mosari oa gague e le le Mehetabele, moroaria Materede, moroaria Me‐sahabe." 
1Chronicles1:51 Mi Hadade a shua. Mi ga bo gole likhosana mo Edoma, eboñ Timene khosana, le Aleve khosana, le Yetete khosana." 
1Chronicles1:52 Aholibame khosana, le Ele khosana, le Pinone khosana," 
1Chronicles1:53 Le Kenase khosana, le Temane khosana, le Mibetsare khosana," 
1Chronicles1:54 Le Magadiele khosana, le Yirame khosana. Bauo ki khosana tsa Edoma." 
1Chronicles2:1 BA ki bomoroa Yeserele, eboñ Rubene, le Simeone, le Leve, le Yude, le Yisakare, le Sebulone;" 
1Chronicles2:2 Dane, le Yosefe, le Benyamine, le Nafetale, le Gade, le Ashere." 
1Chronicles2:3 ¶ Bomoroa Yude, e le le Ere, le Onane, le Shele: ba teri ba ba le ba melegeloa ki moroaria Shue oa Mokanana. Mi Ere, oa burure oa Yude, a le boshula mo maitloñ a ga Yehova; mi a molaea." 
1Chronicles2:4 Mi Tamare ñuetsi oa gague a melegela Paretse le Sere. Bomoroa Yude botle e le le ba faeve. 
1Chronicles2:5 Bomoroa Paretse, e le le Hetserone le Hamule." 
1Chronicles2:6 Mi bomoroa Sere, e le le Simere, le Etane, le Hemane, le Kalekole, le Darede: botle ba e le le bafaeve." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mi bomoroa Kareme, e le le Akane, mokhoberi oa Bayeserela, eo o la a tlola ka se se rogiloeñ." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mi moroa Etane, e le le Asarie." 
1Chronicles2:9 Bomoroa Hetserone, ba ba le ba melegeloa, e le le Yerahemele, le Rame, le Kalebe." 
1Chronicles2:10 Mi Rame a tsala Aminadabe; mi Aminadabe a tsala Nashone, khosana ea bana ba Yude;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Mi Nashone a tsala Saleme, mi Saleme a tsala Boase," 
1Chronicles2:12 Mi Boase a tsala Obede, mi Obede a tsala Yeshae," 
1Chronicles2:13 Mi Yeshae a tsala Eliabe oa burure oa gague, le Abinadabe oa bo‐tu, le Shime oa bo‐teri," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanele oa bo‐for, le Radae oa bo‐faeve," 
1Chronicles2:15 Le Otseme oa bo‐sekes, le Davide oa bo‐seven:" 
1Chronicles2:16 Mi bokhantsaria bona, e le le Tseruye, le Abigaile. Mi bomoroa Tseruye, e le le Abishe, le Yoabe, le Asahele, bateri." 
1Chronicles2:17 Mi Abigaile a bona Amase: mi ra Amase e le le Yetere oa Moyishemaela. 
1Chronicles2:18 ¶ Mi Kalebe moroa Hetserone a tsala bana ka Asube mosari oa gague, le ka Yeriote: bana ba gague ki ba, eboñ Yeshere, le Shobabe, le Aredone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Mi Asube a shua, mi Kalebe a tsaea Eferate, eo a melegela Hure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Mi Hure a tsala Ure, mi Ure a tsala Betsalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 ¶ Mi morago ga mouo Hetserone a tsena mo go moroaria Makire, ra Gileade, a mo nyala ka a le oa nyaga li sekeste, mi a melegela Segube." 
1Chronicles2:22 Mi Segube a tsala Yaire, mi a na le metse e tuente teri mo hatsiñ ya Gileada." 
1Chronicles2:23 Mi a thopa Geshura, le Arama, le metsana ea Yaire go Makire, le Kenata, le metsana ea eona, eboñ metse e sekeste. Eotle e le le ea bomoroa Makire ra Gileade." 
1Chronicles2:24 Mi Abie mosari oa Hetserone a melegela Ashure ra Tekoe, morago ga loshu loa Hetserone kua Kalebe‐eferata." 
1Chronicles2:25 ¶ Mi bomoroa Yerahemele oa burure oa Hetserone, e le le Rame oa burure, le Bune, le Orene le Otseme, le Ahiye." 
1Chronicles2:26 Mi Yerahemele o la a na le mosari eo moñue, leina ya gague e le le Atare: o la le ma Oname." 
1Chronicles2:27 Mi bomoroa Rame oa burure oa Yerahemele, e le le Matse, le Yamine, le Ekere." 
1Chronicles2:28 Mi bomoroa Oname, e le le Shamae, le Yade. Mi bomoroa Shamae, e le le Nadabe, le Abishure." 
1Chronicles2:29 Mi leina ya mosari oa Abishure, e le le Abihaile, mi a melegela Ahebane, le Molide." 
1Chronicles2:30 Mi bomoroa Nadabe, e le le Selede, le Apaime: mi Selede a shua a sina bana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Mi moroa Apaime, e le le Yishe, mi moroa Yishe, e le le Sheshane. Mi Ahelae, e le le ñuana oa Sheshane." 
1Chronicles2:32 Mi bomoroa Yade monna Shamae, e le le Yetere, le Yonatane: mi Yetere a shua a sina bana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Mi bomoroa Yonatane, e le le Pelete, le Sase. Bauo e le le bomoroa Yerahemele." 
1Chronicles2:34 ¶ Mi Sheshane o la a sina basimane, a na le basetsana. Mi Sheshane a na le motlañka oa Moegepeto, eo leina ya gague e le le Yarehe." 
1Chronicles2:35 Mi Sheshane a nela Yarehe motlañka oa gague moroarie go na mosari; mi a melegela Ate. 
1Chronicles2:36 Mi Ate a tsala Natane, mi Natane a tsala Sabade." 
1Chronicles2:37 Mi Sabade a tsala Efalale, mi Efalale a tsala Obede," 
1Chronicles2:38 Mi Obede a tsala Yehue, mi Yehue a tsala Asarie," 
1Chronicles2:39 Mi Asarie a tsala Heletse, mi Heletse a tsala Elease," 
1Chronicles2:40 Mi Elease a tsala Siseme, mi Siseme a tsala Shalume," 
1Chronicles2:41 Mi Shalume a tsala Yekamie, mi Yekamie a tsala Elishame." 
1Chronicles2:42 ¶ Mi bomoroa Kalebe monna Yerahemele, e le le Meshe oa burure oa gague, eo ki ra Sife, le oa bomoroa Mareshe, ra Heberone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Mi bomoroa Heberone, e le le Kore, le Tapue, le Rekeme, le Sheme." 
1Chronicles2:44 Mi Sheme a tsala Rahame, ra Yorekame: mi Rekeme a tsala Shamae." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mi moroa Shamae, e le le Maone: mi Maone e le le ra Beta‐tsure." 
1Chronicles2:46 Mi Efe, mogariñuana oa Kalebe, a belega Harane, le Motse, le Gasese: mi Harane a tsala Gasese." 
1Chronicles2:47 Mi bomoroa Yahedae, e le le Regeme, le Yotame, le Geshane, le Pelete, le Efe, le Shaafe." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maake, mogariñuana oa Kalebe, a belega Shebere, le Tirehane." 
1Chronicles2:49 Mi a belega le ena Shaafe ra Mademane, le Shefe ra Makebene, la ra Gibe: mi moroaria Kalebe e le le Akese." 
1Chronicles2:50 ¶ Ba e le le bana ba Kalebe moroa Hure, oa burure oa Eferate, eboñ Shobale ra ba Kereyata‐yearima," 
1Chronicles2:51 Le Saleme ra ba Beta‐lehema le Harefe ra ba Beta‐gadera. 
1Chronicles2:52 Le Shobale ra ba Kireyata‐yearima, a na le basimane, eboñ Haroe le eintla eñue ea Bamenuota." 
1Chronicles2:53 Mi litsika tsa Kireyata‐yearime, e le le Bayitera, le Baputa, le Bashumata, le Bamishera; ba, Batsareata le Baeshetaula ba ruleñ go bona." 
1Chronicles2:54 Bomoroa Saleme, e le le ba Beta‐lehema, le Banetofata, le ba Aterota‐beta‐yoaba, le eintla eñue ea Bamanaheta, le Batsora." 
1Chronicles2:55 Mi litsika tsa bakuari ba ba nntseñ mo Yabetsa, eboñ Batirata, le Bashemeata, le Basukata. Bauo e le le Bakena ba ba coañ Hemate, ra ba eintlu ea Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 MI ba e le le bomoroa Davide, ba le ba melegeloa kua Heberona; oa burure e le le Amenone, oa Ahinoame oa Moyisereëla: oa bo‐tu, e le le Daniele, oa Abigaile oa Mokaremela." 
1Chronicles3:1 MI ba e le le bomoroa Davide, ba le ba melegeloa kua Heberona; oa burure e le le Amenone, oa Ahinoame oa Moyisereëla: oa bo‐tu, e le le Daniele, oa Abigaile oa Mokaremela." 
1Chronicles3:2 Oa bo‐teri, e le le Abesalome moroa Maake moroaria Telemaie khosi ea Geshura: oa bo‐for, e le le Adoniye moroa Hagite." 
1Chronicles3:3 Oa bo‐faeve, e le le Shefatie oa Abitale: oa bo‐sekes, e le le Yitereame oa Egele mosari oa gague." 
1Chronicles3:4 Ba sekes ba, ba melegeloa kua Heberona: mi a busa gona ka nyaga li seven le likhueri li sekes: mi a busa mo Yerusalema ka nyaga li terete teri." 
1Chronicles3:5 Mi ba, ba melegeloa mo Yerusalema, eboñ Shimee, le Shobabe, le Natane, le Solomone, ba for, e le le ba Bata‐shebe moroaria Amiele." 
1Chronicles3:6 Le Yibehare, le Elishame, le Elifelete." 
1Chronicles3:7 Le Noge, le Nefege, le Yafie," 
1Chronicles3:8 Le Elishame, le Eliade, le Elifelete, ba naen." 
1Chronicles3:9 Bauo botle e le le bomoroa Davide, bogolu go bomoroa bagariñuana, le Tamare khantsaria bona." 
1Chronicles3:10 ¶ Mi moroa Solomone, e le le Rehoboame, le Abie moroaue, le Ase moroaue, le Yehoshafate moroaue." 
1Chronicles3:11 Le Yorame moroaue, le Ahasie moroaue, le Yoashe moroaue," 
1Chronicles3:12 Le Amatsie moroaue, le Asarie moroaue, le Yotame moroaue," 
1Chronicles3:13 Le Ahase moroaue, le Hesikie moroaue, le Manase moroaue." 
1Chronicles3:14 Le Amone moroaue, le Yosie, moroaue." 
1Chronicles3:15 Mi bomoroa Yosie, e le le Yohanane oa burure, le Yehoiakime oa bo‐tu, le Tsedekie oa bo‐teri, le Shalume oa bo‐for." 
1Chronicles3:16 Mi bomoroa Yehoiakime, e le le Yekonie moroaue, le Tsedekie moroaue." 
1Chronicles3:17 ¶ Mi bomoroa Yekonie mocuaroi, e le le Shealetiele moroaue," 
1Chronicles3:18 Le Malekirame, le Pedaie, le Shenatsare, le Yekamie, le Hoshame le Nedabie." 
1Chronicles3:19 Mi bomoroa Pedaie, e le le Serubabele, le Shimee: mi bomoroa Serubabele, e le le Meshulame, le Hananie, le Shelomite khantsaria bona." 
1Chronicles3:20 Le Hashube, le Ohele, le Berekie, le Hasadie, le Yushabehesede, ba faeve." 
1Chronicles3:21 Mi bomoroa Hananie, e le le Pelatie, le Yesaye: le bomoroa Refaye, le bomoroa Arenane, le bomoroa Obadie, le bomoroa Shekanie." 
1Chronicles3:22 Mi moroa Shekanie, e le le Shemaye: mi bomoroa Shemaye, e le le Hatushe, le Yigeale, le Berie, le Narie, le Asarie, le Shafate, ba sekes." 
1Chronicles3:23 Mi bomoroa Nearie, e le le Elioenae, le Hisikie, le Arikame, ba teri." 
1Chronicles3:24 Mi bomoroa Elioenae, e le le Hodaiye, le Eliashibe, le Pelaye, le Akube, le Yohanane, le Delaye, le Anane, ba seven." 
1Chronicles4:1 BOMOROA Yude, e le le Paretse, le Hetserone, le Kareme, le Hure, le Shobale." 
1Chronicles4:2 Mi Reaye moroa Shobale a tsala Yahate; mi Yahate a tsala Ahumae, le Lahade. Tse ki litsika tsa Batsorata." 
1Chronicles4:3 Mi ba e le le ba ra Etame, eboñ Yisereele, le Yisheme, le Yidebashe: mi leina ya khantsaria bona e le le Hatselelepone." 
1Chronicles4:4 Mi Penuele e le le ra Gedore, le Esere ra Hushe. Bauo ki bomoroa Hure, oa burure oa Eferate, ra ba Beta‐lehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 ¶ Mi Ashure ra Tekoe a na le basari ba tu, Hele le Naare." 
1Chronicles4:6 Mi Naare a melegela Ahusame, le Hesere, le Temene, le Haahashetare. Bauo e le le bomoroa Naare." 
1Chronicles4:7 Mi bomoroa Hele, e le le Tserete, le Yetsohare, le Etanane." 
1Chronicles4:8 Mi Kotse a tsala Amube, le Tsobebe, le litsika tsa Aharehele moroa Harume." 
1Chronicles4:9 Mi Yabetse a le tlotlego bogolu go bana ba ga rague: mi mague a mo sha leina ya Yabetse, a re, Gone ki monye ka thekisego." 
1Chronicles4:10 Mi Yabetse a biletsa go Morimo oa Bayeserela, a re, Ha u ’ntsegahale-tsa rure, le go intsihatsa moleloane oa me, le seatla sa gago se na le ’na, se ’mpuluka mo boshuleñ, gore bo si ’mphutsahatse. Mi Morimo oa mo tlisetsa se o se lopileñ." 
1Chronicles4:11 ¶ Mi Kelube moroa ra Shue a tsala Mehire, eo e leñ ra Eshetone." 
1Chronicles4:12 Mi Eshetone a tsala Betarafe, le Pasehe, le Tihinae ra Irenahashe. Ba ki banona ba Reke." 
1Chronicles4:13 Mi bomoroa Kenase, e le le Oteniele, le Seraye: mi bomoroa Oteniele, e le le Hatate, le Meonotae." 
1Chronicles4:14 Mi Meonotae a tsala Ofere: mi Seraye a tsala Yoabe ra bona ba mogorogoro oa barihi; gone e le le barihi. 
1Chronicles4:15 Mi bomoroa Kalebe moroa Yefune, e le le Irue, le Ele, le Naame: mi bomoroa Ele, eboñ Kenase, le Yehalele." 
1Chronicles4:16 Mi bomoroa Yehalele, e le le Sife, le Sifae, le Tirie, le Asarele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Mi bomoroa Esre, e le le Yetere, le Merede, le Efere, le Yalone: mi Bitie a belega Miriame, le Shamae, le Yishebe ra Eshetemoe." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mi mosari oa gague, eboñ Yehudiye a belega Yerede ra Gedore, le Hebere ra Sokoe, le Yekutiele ra Sanoe. Mi bauo ki bomoroa Bitie moroaria Faroe, eo Merede o mo nyetseñ." 
1Chronicles4:19 Mi bomoroa Hodie mosari oa gague, eboñ khantsaria Nahame, e le le Shimone ra Keile oa Mogarema, le Eshetemoe oa Momakata." 
1Chronicles4:20 Mi bomoroa Shimone, e le le Amenone, le Rime, le Bene‐hanane le Tilone. Mi bomoroa Yishe, e le le Sohete, le Bene‐sohete." 
1Chronicles4:21 ¶ Mi bomoroa Shele moroa Yude, e le le Ere ra Leke, le Lade ra Mareshe, le litsika tsa ba eintlu ea ba ba rihelañ ba eintlu ea Ashebee lene ye le sesane;" 
1Chronicles4:22 Le Yokime, le banona ba Kosebe, le Yoashe, le Sarafe, ba ba le ba busa kua Moaba, mi ba boela Beta ‐lehema le Hadebarime‐aketikima." 
1Chronicles4:23 Bauo, le banni ba Netaima le Gadera, e le le babopi ba ba le ba nna le khosi mo tihoñ ea eona." 
1Chronicles4:24 ¶ Bomoroa Simeone, e le le Nemuele, le Yamine, le Yaribe, le Sere, le Saule:" 
1Chronicles4:25 Le Shalume moroaue, le Mibesame moroaue, le Misheme moroaue." 
1Chronicles4:26 Mi bomoroa Misheme, e le le Hamuele moroaue, le Sakure moroaue, le Sheme moroaue." 
1Chronicles4:27 Mi Sheme a na le tsimane e sekesten le tsetsana e sekes: mi bana ba ga rague ba bo ba sina bana bantsi, mi ga bo go si lope loa tsika tsa bona lo lo loa intsihala yaka bana ba Yude." 
1Chronicles4:28 Mi ba nna kua Bera‐sheba, le kua Molada, le kua Hatsarashuala," 
1Chronicles4:29 Le kua Bileha, le kua Etsema, le kua Tolada," 
1Chronicles4:30 Le kua Betuela, le kua Horema, le kua Tsikelaga," 
1Chronicles4:31 Le kua Beta‐marekabota, le kua Hatsora‐susima, le kua Betabirea, le kua Sharaima. Euo e le le metse ea bona go ea go pushoñ ea ga Davide." 
1Chronicles4:32 Mi metsana ea bona, e le le Etama, le Aina, le Rimona, le Tokena, le Ashana, metse e faeve:" 
1Chronicles4:33 Le metsana ea bona eotle e le le tikologoñ ea metse euo, le kua go Baala. Auo e le le manno a bona, le palo ea losika loa bona." 
1Chronicles4:34 ¶ Meshobale, le Yameleke, le Yoshe moroa Amatsie," 
1Chronicles4:35 Le Yoele, le Yehue moroa Yosibie, moroa Seraye, moroa Asiele," 
1Chronicles4:36 Le Elioenae, le Yaakobe, le Yeshohaye, le Asaye, le Adiele, le Yesimiele, le Benaye," 
1Chronicles4:37 Le Sise moroa Shife, moroa Alone, moroa Yedaye, moroa Shimire, moroa Shemaye;" 
1Chronicles4:38 Bauo, ba ba birioañ ka maina e le le khosana tsa ba litsika tsa cona: mi ba matlu a bo‐raco ba intsihala segolu." 
1Chronicles4:39 Mi ba ea kua botsenoñ yoa Gedora, kua eintleñ ea Iseta ea mogorogoro, go batlela macomane a bona bohulo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Mi ba bona bohulo yo bo nonneñ yoa molemo, mi lehatsi e le le ya katlamo, le iketlo, le ikhuco: gone ba Hame ba le ba nna gona pele." 
1Chronicles4:41 Mi bauo ba ba kuariloeñ ka maina, ba ea ka metsi ea Hisikie khosi ea Yuda, ba khemetha litenta le manno a bona ba ba bonoañ gona, mi ba a senyetsa rure le ka yenu, ba nna mo maemoñ a bona: gone gole gole bohulo gona yoa macomane a bona." 
1Chronicles4:42 Mi bañue ba bona, eboñ banona ba faeve hundereda ba bomoroa Simeone, ba coela go thabeñ tsa Seira, ba na le Pelatie, le Nearie, le Refaye, le Usiele, bomoroa Yishe, go na tlogotlogo tsa bona." 
1Chronicles4:43 Mi ba khemetha ba ba setseñ ba Baamaleka ba ba le ba phela, mi ba nna gona le ka yenu." 
1Chronicles5:1 MI bomoroa Rubene oa burure oa Yeserele, (gone e le le oa burure; mi ka a itsepholola bolau yoa rague, tsalo yoa eintla yoa gague yoa neoa bomoroa Yosefe moroa Yeserele: mi esiñ ha palo ea losika e ka baloa kaha tsaloñ yoa eintla." 
1Chronicles5:2 Gone leha tsalo yoa eintla e le le yoa Yosefe, Yude o la a nonohaletse bana ba ga rague mi mokaeri a coa go ena:)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Bomoroa Rubene oa burure oa Yeserele, e le le Hanoke, le Palue, le Hetserone, le Kareme." 
1Chronicles5:4 Bomoroa Yoele, e le le Shemaye moroaue, le Goge moroaue, le Shime moroaue," 
1Chronicles5:5 Le Mike moroaue, le Reaye moroaue, le Baale moroaue," 
1Chronicles5:6 Le Beere moroaue, eo Tilegata‐pilesere khosi ea Asiria a mo isa a le mocuaroi: e le le khosana ea Barubena." 
1Chronicles5:7 Le bomoroaue kaha tsikeñ tsa bona, erile palo ea losika ea kokomana tsa bona e baloa, e le le Yeiele, le Sekarie, litlogotlogo." 
1Chronicles5:8 Le Bele moroa Asase, moroa Sheme, moroa Yoele, eo o la a nna kua Aroera, le kua Nebo le Baalameona:" 
1Chronicles5:9 Mi a nnela kua Iseteñ, le kua botsenoñ yoa bogareganaga go simolola ka noka ea Euferate: gone khomu tsa bona tsa intsihala mo hatsiñ ya Gileada." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mi ba tlabana le Bahagara mo metsiñ ea Saule, ba ba le ba oa ka bona: mi ba nna mo tenteñ tsa bona ha eintleñ eotle ea Gileada ea Iseta." 
1Chronicles5:11 ¶ Mi bana ba Gade ba nna go lebagana le bona mo hatsiñ ya Bashana go ea Saleka: 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoele e le le tlogo, le Shafane oa bo‐tu, le Yaene, le Shafate kua Bashana." 
1Chronicles5:13 Mi bana ba ga rabo kaha ba matlu a bo‐rabo, e le le Mikaele, le Meshulame, le Shebe, le Yorae, le Yakane, le Sie, le Hebere, ba seven." 
1Chronicles5:14 Bauo ki bana ba Abihaile moroa Hure, moroa Yaroe, moroa Gileade, moroa Mikaele, moroa Yeshishae, moroa Yahedoe, moroa Buse;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Le Ahe, moroa Abediele, moroa Gune, tlogo ea ba eintlu ea bo‐rabo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Mi ba le ba nna kua Gileada mo Bashaneñ, le mo metsaneñ ea ona, le mo lintlaneñ tsa Sharona go ea ha meleloaneñ ea ona." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bauo botle ba baloa kaha paloñ ea losika mo malatsiñ a Yotane khosi ea Yuda, le ka malatsi a Yeroboame khosi ea Bayeserela." 
1Chronicles5:18 Mi bomoroa Rubene, le Bagada, le eintla eñue ea loco loa Manase, ba banona ba bonatla, banona ba ba kabañ thebe le caka, le go laela bora, ba ba ithutileñ go tlabana, e le le ba forte for thousanda, le seven hundereda le sekeste, ba ba bololañ entua." 
1Chronicles5:19 Mi ba tlabana le Bahagara, le Yetura, le Nefisha le Nodaba." 
1Chronicles5:20 Mi ba ba thuserioa, mi Bahagara ba tseñoa mo atleñ tsa bona, le botle ba ba nañ nabo: gone ba khayayegela Morimo ba le mo tlabanoñ, mi oa rapelesega go bona: gone ba o ikanya." 
1Chronicles5:21 Mi ba thopa lithuo tsa bona, eboñ likamela li faevete thousanda, le liñku li tu hundereda le faevete thousanda, le liesela li tu thousanda, le bathu ba uan hundereda thousanda." 
1Chronicles5:22 Mi ga oa bantsi ba ba bolailoeñ, gone tlabano e le le ea Morimo. Mi ba nna mo maemoñ a bona, ea tsamaea ba isioa bacuaroi." 
1Chronicles5:23 ¶ Mi bana ba eintla eñue ea loco loa Manase ba nna mo hatsiñ yeuo: ba intsihala go simolola ka Bashana go ea kua Baala‐heremona, le Senira, le kua thabeñ ea Heremana." 
1Chronicles5:24 Mi tseuo e le le tlogotlogo tsa matlu a bo‐rabo, eboñ Efere, le Yishe, le Eliele, le Aseriele, le Yeremie, le Hodovie, le Yahediele, ligañka tsa bonatla, banona ba maina, le tlogotlogo tsa matlu a bo‐rabo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Mi ba tlolela Morimo oa bo‐rabo, ba akahalela merimoñ ea bathu ba lehatsi, ba Morimo o ba sentseñ ha pele ga bona." 
1Chronicles5:26 Mi Morimo oa Bayeserela oa cosa moea oa Pule khosi ea Asiria, le moea oa Tilegata‐pilesere khosi ea Asiria, mi a ba isa bacuaroi, eboñ Barubena, le Bagada, le eintla eñue ea loco loa Manase, a ba isa kua go Hala, le Habora, le Hara, le go molapoñ oa Gosana, le ka yenu." 
1Chronicles6:1 BOMOROA Leve, e le le Gereshone, le Kohate, le Merare." 
1Chronicles6:2 Mi bomoroa Kohate, e le le Amerame, le Yitsehare, le Heberone, le Usiele." 
1Chronicles6:3 Mi bana ba Amerame, e le le Arone, le Moshe, le Miriame. Mi bomoroa Arone e le le Nadabe, le Abihue, le Eleasare, le Itamare." 
1Chronicles6:4 ¶ Eleasare a tsala Finehase, mi Finehase a tsala Abishue," 
1Chronicles6:5 Mi Abishue a tsala Buke, mi Buke a tsala Use," 
1Chronicles6:6 Mi Use a tsala Seraheye, mi Seraheye a tsala Merayote," 
1Chronicles6:7 Mi Merayote a tsala Amarie, mi Amarie a tsala Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:8 Mi Ahitube a tsala Tsadoke, mi Tsadoke a tsala Ahimatse," 
1Chronicles6:9 Mi Ahimatse a tsala Asarie, mi Asarie a tsala Yohanane," 
1Chronicles6:10 Mi Yohanane a tsala Asarie, (ki ena eo o la a rihela boperiseto mo tluñ e Solomone o la a e aga kua Yerusalema:)" 
1Chronicles6:11 Mi Asarie a tsala Amarie, mi Amarie a tsala Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:12 Mi Ahitube a tsala Tsadoke, mi Tsadoke a tsala Shalume," 
1Chronicles6:13 Mi Shalume a tsala Hilekie, mi Hilekie a tsala Asarie," 
1Chronicles6:14 Mi Asarie a tsala Seraye, mi Seraye a tsala Yehotsadake," 
1Chronicles6:15 Mi Yehotsadake a ea nabo, erile Yehova a isa Bayuda le ba Yerusalema bacuaroi ka Nebukadenetsare." 
1Chronicles6:16 ¶ Bomoroa Leve, e le le Gereshone, le Kohate, le Merare." 
1Chronicles6:17 Mi ua ki maina a bomoroa Gereshone, eboñ Libene, le Shime." 
1Chronicles6:18 Mi bomoroa Kohate, e le le Amerame, le Yitsehare, le Heberone, le Usiele." 
1Chronicles6:19 Mi bomoroa Merare, e le le Mahele, le Mushe. Mi tse ki litsika tsa Baleva kaha bo‐rabo." 
1Chronicles6:20 Ba Gereshone, Libene e le le moroaue, le Yahate moroaue, le Sime moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:21 Yoe moroaue, le Yidoe moroaue, le Sere moroaue, le Yeatere moroaue." 
1Chronicles6:22 Bomoroa Kohate, e le le Aminadabe moroaue, le Kore moroaue, le Asire moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elekane moroaue, le Ebesafe moroaue, le Asire moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tohate moroaue, le Uriele moroaue, le Usie moroaue, le Shaule moroaue." 
1Chronicles6:25 Mi bomoroa Elekane, e le le Amasae, le Ahimote." 
1Chronicles6:26 Elekane: bomoroa Elekane, e le le Tsofe moroaue, le Nahate moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:27 Le Eliabe moroaue, le Yerohame moroaue, le Elekane moroaue." 
1Chronicles6:28 Mi bomoroa Samuele, e le le Yoele oa burure le Abie oa bo‐tu." 
1Chronicles6:29 Bomoroa Merare, e le le Mahele, le Libene moroaue, le Shime moroaue, le Use moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:30 Le Shimee moroaue, le Hagie moroaue, le Asaie moroaue." 
1Chronicles6:31 Mi ba ki bona ba Davide o la a ba laolela tihelo ea kopelo mo tluñ ea Yehova, areke e sina ikhutsisioa." 
1Chronicles6:32 Mi ba rihela ha pele ga taberenakela ea tenta ea kokoanelo ka lihela, ea tsamaea Solomone a aga eintlu ea Yehova mo Yerusalema: mi ba ema mo tiheloñ ea bona yaka mokhua oa bona." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ba ki bona ba ba le ba rihela le bomoroa bona. Ba bomoroa Bakohata, eboñ Hemane, mooperi, moroa Yoele, moroa Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:34 Moroa Elekane, moroa Yerohame, moroa Eliele, moroa Tohe," 
1Chronicles6:35 Moroa Tsufe, moroa Elekane, moroa Mahate, moroa Amasae," 
1Chronicles6:36 Moroa Elekane, moroa Yoele, moroa Asarie, moroa Tsefanie," 
1Chronicles6:37 Moroa Tahate, moroa Asire, moroa Abiasafe, moroa Kore," 
1Chronicles6:38 Moroa Yitsare, moroa Kohate, moroa Leve, moroa Yeserele." 
1Chronicles6:39 ¶ Le Asafe monnaue, a ema ha atleñ se se siameñ sa gague, eboñ Asafe moroa Berekie, moroa Shimee," 
1Chronicles6:40 Moroa Mikaele, moroa Baaseye, moroa Malekie." 
1Chronicles6:41 Moroa Etene, moroa Sere, moroa Adaye," 
1Chronicles6:42 Moroa Etane, moroa Sime, moroa Shime," 
1Chronicles6:43 Moroa Yahate, moroa Gereshone, moroa Leve." 
1Chronicles6:44 Mi bomoroa Merare bana ba bo‐rabo ba ema ha eintleñ ea molema, eboñ Etane, moroa Kishe, moroa Abede, moroa Maluke," 
1Chronicles6:45 Moroa Hashabie, moroa Amatsie, moroa Hilekie," 
1Chronicles6:46 Moroa Ametse, moroa Bane, moroa Shamere," 
1Chronicles6:47 Moroa Mahele, moroa Mushe, moroa Merare, moroa Leve." 
1Chronicles6:48 Mi Baleva bana ba bo‐rabo ba le ba laoleloa tihelo cotle tsa taberenakela ea eintlu ea Morimo. 
1Chronicles6:49 ¶ Mi Arone le bomoroaue ba hisetsa mo aletareñ ea cupelo ea phisho, le mo aletareñ ea ensense, mi ba laoleloa tihelo cotle tsa helo ga itsepho ea maitsepho, le go ruantsa Bayeserela kaha cotleñ tse Moshe motlañka oa Morimo a li laola." 
1Chronicles6:50 Mi ba ki bomoroa Arone, eboñ Eleasare moroaue, le Finehase moroaue, le Abishue moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:51 Le Buke moroaue, le Use moroaue, le Serahie moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:52 Le Merayote moroaue, le Amarie moroaue, le Ahitube moroaue," 
1Chronicles6:53 Tsadoke moroaue, le Ahimatse moroaue." 
1Chronicles6:54 ¶ Mi ua e le le manno a bona, kaha liturioñ tsa bona mo meleloaneñ ea bona, eboñ a bomoroa Arone, ba tsika tsa Bakohata: gone kabelo ea eintla e le le ea bona." 
1Chronicles6:55 Mi ba ba naea Heberona mo hatsiñ ya Yuda, le lintlana tsa ona tikologoñ ea ona." 
1Chronicles6:56 Mi linaga tsa motse, le metsana ea ona, ba e naea Kalebe moroa Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Mi ba naea bomoroa Arone metse ea Yuda, eboñ, Heberona, motse oa botsabelo, le Libena le lintlana tsa ona, le Yatire, le Eshetemoa, le lintlana tsa eona." 
1Chronicles6:58 Le Hilena le lintlana tsa ona, le Debira le lintlana tsa ona," 
1Chronicles6:59 Le Ashana le lintlana tsa ona, le Beta‐shemesha le lintlana tsa ona:" 
1Chronicles6:60 Mi ga loco loa Benyamine, eboñ Geba le lintlana tsa ona, le Alemeta le lintlana tsa ona, le Anatota le lintlana tsa ona. Metse eotle ea bona mo tsikeñ tsa bona e le le metse e tereten." 
1Chronicles6:61 Mi bomoroa Kohate ba ba setseñ go sikeñ loa loco lo, ba neoa metse e ten ea eintla eñue ea loco, eboñ eintla eñue ea Manase ka kelero." 
1Chronicles6:62 Le bomoroa Gereshone mo tsikeñ tsa bona ba neoa metse e tereten ea loco loa Yisakare, le ea loco loa Ashere, le ea loco loa Nafetale, le ea loco loa Manase mo Bashaneñ." 
1Chronicles6:63 Bomoroa Merare mo tsikeñ tsa bona, ba neoa metse e tueleve ka kelero, ea loco loa Rubene, le ea loco loa Gade, le ea loco loa Sebulone."
